name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours.
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e334128/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ1dFdndjQmNSRA/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA4MDg/LbmNsWE1SdUJlaw/qP2hpZHM9bmNlejV1dkE2VEFER2tscw/gaJXsUA/s8t5ac8fc29)
| |
---
| |
---
them, I wanted you to be one of the first to hear this awesome news. BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY** **DAY** at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** just got huge. **[And that’s why I’m sending you this email with a 24-hour deadline.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** them, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity.
---
* Hosting **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person.
* The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good.
* And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom.

---
For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. [**them, I hope you’ll rush back your crucial gift in the next 24-hours.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like:
---
| | _A is for Activist._ _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
| [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | _A is for Activist_. _Occupy Wall Street_ says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America!
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. [**Please help us make SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY a success by rushing back your best emergency gift of $35, $50, or even $500.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) And because it’s so critical that you get your **crucial** gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. **[Now we’re at a watershed moment and I’m asking for your support.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us.
---
Thank you!
---
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
Kirk Cameron
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
P.S. them, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding **SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY** at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. [**Please rush back your emergency gift in just 24 hours.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk
---
|
---

---
**Brave Books** 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301

BRAVE Books has been invited by President Trump’s DOE to host our SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress! Friend, talk about taking back our libraries! Just three years ago, we were fighting to get into local public libraries across the country to counter the Left’s “Drag Queen” Story Hours. Radical librarians sabotaged our efforts. Leftists cursed us with insults. And now, thanks to unwavering support from patriots like you, on August 16th, we’ll be sharing lessons in humility, freedom, and patriotism with children and parents at the largest library in the world -- America’s Library. But as excited as I am to announce our Library of Congress event, it's also a little daunting. SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY just got huge. them, I’m praying you will help BRAVE Books make the most of this incredible opportunity. Hosting SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress helps us reach hundreds more children and their families in person. The media coverage gets our conservative message in front of untold numbers of children and families who need to hear that our country and our God are good. And our presence at the Library of Congress sends a powerful message that America is about faith, family and freedom. For too long the Left has filled the hearts and minds of children with lies. What a blessing it will be to share God’s truth on August 16th at the Library of Congress. But friend, the date is barreling towards us and our budget just skyrocketed. The new audio/visual needs alone for an event of this magnitude are more than BRAVE Books can handle without your help. We simply can’t make the most of this opportunity without you. SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress will be our most impactful event yet to counter the radical librarians and leftist school boards who are filling our children’s hearts and minds with horrible books like: | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | | A is for Activist. Occupy Wall Street says this ABC board book is “like reading Howard Zinn’s A People’s History of the United States, but for two-year-olds.” them, A People’s History of the United States brainwashed a generation of high school and college students to hate America! | | The 1619 Project: Born on the Water by Nikole Hannah-Jones. This book teaches 6-8-year-olds about the Black Resistance movement in the United States. And then of course, there are the Scholastic Books. Scholastic has been holding schools hostage for generations with their “fundraising” promises while warping young minds in return. The school Book Fairs you may remember are now filled with disgusting books you don’t want anywhere near your grandchildren. Scholastic has a whole series of books written by former football player Colin Kaepernick who found fame by taking a knee during our National Anthem. And their current LGBTQ selections for children are pure evil. From Run Away with Me, one of their many books about an illicit affair between two high school boys, to Escape from St. Hell which tries to normalize a girl’s transition into a boy... and with thousands of titles in between... Friend, in the face of all this it’s hard to imagine that a small Christian publisher like BRAVE Books could make a difference. But listen to this... God’s design is so perfect. Did you know that the British burned our Library of Congress to the ground on August 24, 1814? Then five months later, Congress purchased Thomas Jefferson’s personal library of 6,487 books as the foundation of a new American Library. And for decades, the Left has been dragging our country further and further away from Thomas Jefferson’s original vision for our nation. But on August 16, 2025, “we the people” will bring that vision back to the Library of Congress -- back to America. We can’t do it without you. And because it’s so critical that you get your crucial gift back in just 24 hours, as a “Fast Response Bonus” for your gift of $100 or more, I’d love to send you the first book I wrote with BRAVE called As You Grow. As You Grow tells the story of a tiny seed that, through the fruit of the Spirit, turns into a mighty tree. Friend, that’s BRAVE Books. All that we do is only possible through God’s grace and your generosity. Whether your emergency gift is $35, $50, $100 or anything higher or lower -- what’s most important is that you respond in the next 24 hours because August 16th is just weeks away. The Holy Spirit has opened a door for us to host an incredible SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress. Please help us seize this opportunity to bring our message of freedom, America’s greatness, and God’s love to our nation’s capital while we have the chance. BRAVE Books is on a mission to help parents raise children who love God, love freedom, and love America! And we’re so happy you’re with us. Thank you! Kirk Cameron P.S. them, we began this journey to take back our libraries and help parents pour conservative values into their children just three years ago. Now, this August 16th, we’ll be holding SEE YOU AT THE LIBRARY DAY at the Library of Congress! What a way to turn back the Left! But time is short, and we can’t make this day a success without you. When you reply quickly with a gift of $100 or more, I’ll send you As You Grow for a child in your life or you can take it and leave it at your local school, charity shop, doctor’s office or library to reach a child who doesn’t have someone to teach them conservative values. Thank you, Friend! -- Kirk | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite C Conroe, TX 77301 | | | ---|---|---

name: Eric Flores
subject: I’m officially running for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress
body:
I’ve spent my life leading troops & locking up criminals. But today I’m stepping up for a new fight.

| | | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zao0epj3a6ij920tuvgimtr20dm73u089ilo5mco_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm0or4c3h2bs)
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbgbrghil1a6ollcejlgurn2kn0hi75ulb0q32co_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm0or4c3h2bs)
Friend,

My name is Eric Flores — I’m a father, Christian, U.S. Army veteran, and former federal prosecutor.

I’m not a politician. I’ve never run for office. I’ve spent my life leading troops at the southern border and locking up human traffickers.

**But today, I’m officially announcing my run for the MUST-WIN Texas 34 Election — the biggest swing sweat in America.**

I’m Pro-Border Wall, Pro-Life, and 100% Pro-Trump.

In 2020, Biden took this district by 16 points. But in 2024, President Trump flipped it and won by 4.
South Texas is waking up — for the first time in years, we can take this seat back.

Republicans nominated the same losing candidate two cycles in a row — _and we handed this district to the Left both times._

**Not again.**

We’ve never had a better shot — but I’m up against a Democrat machine with deep pockets and powerful allies in Washington.

They’re already working overtime to shut us down before we even get off the ground.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking — with EVERYTHING on the line — for your help today.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqlavncm32ovcbi0e8aq3o53j6qmek15ieivfk1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm0or4c3h2bs)**

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zuh7c6fbvq5skqvadbvcqultbirbsnosjkvblk7o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm0or4c3h2bs)
| | | **If you STILL believe in Pres. Trump’s movement, and you’re TIRED of career politicians selling you out, then join me in this fight.**

Even just $5 will make all the difference.

_We cannot afford to lose this race — so I’m praying I can count on you today._

---
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zmv104a27cgadl73g8lc9rpeg8o9sl4qbpg37v4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm0or4c3h2bs)
****Thank you & God bless,

Eric Flores

name: NEGOP
subject: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
As a proud registered Republican, you are the heartbeat of Nebraska's conservative movement--and we need you now more than ever.
Our revamped NEGOP+ Booster Club is your opportunity to support our mission throughout the year. In the past, a few large donors carried the load, but now it's grassroots supporters like you who are making the real difference. Monthly contributions of $5, $25, or more provide a stable foundation to fund voter outreach, train candidates, and defend our values across the state.
When you join, you'll also receive exclusive perks like custom NEGOP gear, VIP event access, and insider updates from party leaders. Join today at [https://ne.gop/negop/ ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jFz6eovys6Gm1xpqAbKdMlarPYLtuKBomSmBBVpknV_EltaZWH0WZrisdk8PgcmOnUqUbNQH5dZ3w6X17Gh8nm_6NDoFYdx5u1weK6bilpibUxXyV0anp5Ssvx-32a8RtKxsVYgA8pmmhDcMvq-34A==&c=z8fER0Unh7OuFHgeRV3nQwMD2flrjDmiSqGLeSDLECuNQTPdc39avA==&ch=RC1XobLSD3kVFAvMJpSfYtaJJtv8d_KcYIfEZkRp14LtYTXo71nhSQ==)and help build a stronger, bolder NEGOP.
Now, I'm excited to share that I'll be visiting Scottsbluff next week for the first of our statewide Roundtable Discussions, hosted by Government Relations Director Jeanne Reigle. This event will feature Senator Brian Hardin (LD48) and a special appearance by Congressman Adrian Smith, with other guests expected as well.
We'll discuss Healthcare Access and Affordability in Nebraska, followed by a Q&A:
A Venue on Broadway, 17 W 16th St, Scottsbluff Thursday, August 14 1:30 - 3:00 PM
Please RSVP to [govrelations@ne.gop](mailto:govrelations@ne.gop) as space is limited. Confirmed guests will be seated first. No large handbags, backpacks, or signs will be allowed.
Lastly, if you're interested in running for office, let's connect! The NEGOP is partnering with the RNC to host campaign training bootcamps in the coming weeks, and we're always looking for leaders ready to step up.
Thank you for your continued support. Let's keep Nebraska red!

Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---

---

This event will feature Senator Brian Hardin (LD48) and a special appearance by Congressman Adrian Smith, with other guests expected as well. We'll discuss Healthcare Access and Affordability in Nebraska, followed by a Q&A: A Venue on Broadway, 17 W 16th St, Scottsbluff Thursday, August 14 1:30 - 3:00 PM Please RSVP to mailto:govrelations@ne.gop as space is limited. Confirmed guests will be seated first. No large handbags, backpacks, or signs will be allowed. Lastly, if you're interested in running for office, let's connect! The NEGOP is partnering with the RNC to host campaign training bootcamps in the coming weeks, and we're always looking for leaders ready to step up. Thank you for your continued support. Let's keep Nebraska red! Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party | | | | What's Happening... | We've had an incredible summer showing up at county fairs across Nebraska, connecting with voters, supporting our candidates, and celebrating our communities. Check out some highlights from the trail below! | Seward County Fair | Congratulations to Seward County GOP for winning the "Most Patriotic Parade Unit Award!" | | | | | | | Lincoln County Fair Congratulations to Lincoln County GOP for winning First Place in the Sutherland Parade! | | | | | Sarpy County Fair | | | | | | | | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | | == | == | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: Vikram Mansharamani
subject: Vikram's August update
body:
Catch up on my current insights and analyses.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us4.campaign-archive.com/?e=93b2c2b824&u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=f18deffffe)
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6b4f4948f5&e=93b2c2b824)
| | | | |
# Mansharamani Musings
---
| Immigration, tariffs, and the politics of air-conditioning were some of the topics that I discussed last month. I’d welcome your thoughts...
Happy August!
[ _B_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=22164f148f&e=93b2c2b824) _est,**
Vikram**_

---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=6eab16940d&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 5, 2025
In addition to spending time with family, eating some burgers, and watching fireworks, I have always used Independence Day as a time to reflect. Specifically, I can’t help but marvel at the greatness of our country and how lucky I am to have been born here.
While each of us has our own stories, mine really begins half a world away when a retrenching British empire decided to leave the Indian subcontinent. You see, my parents were born in what was then British India, and when London decided to pull back from the region, they separated India into what eventually became three countries – Pakistan, India, and Bangladesh. (It was initially Pakistan and India, and Bangladesh became an independent nation in the 1971 after its nine-month liberation war.) My parents, then children, were on the wrong side...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=0798965936&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=a09e1fc24d&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 11, 2025
Markets were again rattled this week when the on-again, off-again trade war appeared to be once again on. U.S. President Donald Trump [slapped](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=e25f8b1f44&e=93b2c2b824) a number of countries with tariffs, [announced](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=23c8716069&e=93b2c2b824) that the August 1st start date was firm, and [threatened](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=7f0010e8a4&e=93b2c2b824) tariffs on pharmaceuticals and copper as well.
The latter tariff target, copper, is of particular interest to me, because of its role in modern technology and therefore national security. Chile, which accounts for 23% of the world's copper supply, faces a major conundrum, one the United States has imposed on the South American nation. The country is the world’s top producer of the metal for both the U.S. and China. Earlier this year, at a large mining conference in Santiago, I suggested that Chile would have to pick a side. Many Chilean CEOs and government leaders were very uncomfortable with..
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=35ee5c276f&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4b50bf8b76&e=93b2c2b824)
|
---
| JULY 18, 2025
As the founder and chief executive of a [frozen pizza manufacturer](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9d490aa03f&e=93b2c2b824), I closely watch how global events can impact my business. Unsurprisingly, the trade war has been a particular area of my focus. And when the possibility of tomato tariffs arose in April, I did what I have long advised businesses to do when navigating uncertainty: think about scenarios and how the future may unfold, contemplating (before anything happens) how potential developments might impact your business. Then come up with anticipated responses for each scenario....
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=bdf2eadcb4&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d4ac73c701&e=93b2c2b824)
| JULY 27, 2025
In my home state of New Hampshire, July can get hot. While it’s perhaps not as frequent as you might experience in Louisiana, there are lots of days we suffer a wet, sticky kind of hot that makes your clothes stick to you and makes it difficult to breathe. And as anyone from Las Vegas can attest, while heat can be uncomfortable, heat and humidity can be unbearable.
And it’s this humid heat that contributed to my recent decision to install a nitrogen tunnel at the pizza factory I now run. By spraying liquid nitrogen, we’re able to rapidly cool hot products – a functionality that enhances food safety, food quality, and our ability to operate during hot, humid New Hampshire summer days. This has proven especially important (and useful) over the past month when the temperature on the factory floor has soared on several days. If we didn’t have the ability to use liquid nitrogen, we would likely have been forced to shut down...
---
| [CLICK HERE TO CONTINUE READING](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=56b838bc70&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=4633ee0e75&e=93b2c2b824)
|
# NAVIGATING UNCERTAINTY
---
| As many of you are aware, I’ve returned to writing my weekly newsletter and have been pleased by the rapidly growing interest in my thoughts. As I have in the past, I’m addressing a wide range of topics, ranging from geopolitics and economics to social trends to technology. The overall theme of my work is focused on “navigating uncertainty” and how a generalist approach can help us all make sense of what seems like chaos.
If you have not already done so, please consider subscribing! (**It’s Free**!)
---
| [Subscribe to “Navigating Uncertainty” by Vikram Mansharamani](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=dcf408243b&e=93b2c2b824)
---
|
---
|
# Want Vikram to speak at your event?
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=3cae0a5edd&e=93b2c2b824)
| Have an upcoming board meeting, corporate offsite, conference or other event in which you might want to have Vikram share his view about the global economy, geopolitical dynamics, technological developments, or social pressures? Click below to inquire about his availability!
---
| [BOOK VIKRAM](mailto:vikram@mansharamani.com?subject=SPEAKING%20INQUIRY&body=)
---
|
# About Vikram
---
[|
---](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9cabcaf926&e=93b2c2b824)
| **VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He’s currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, [ _**The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=9f6ee7142d&e=93b2c2b824) , [ _**Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=14b1c98edf&e=93b2c2b824) and [ _**Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst**_](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=d2752caeae&e=93b2c2b824). Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
---
| | | | | [](https://mansharamani.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=caf139d4582deef486da11685&id=8eee544f61&e=93b2c2b824)

Vikram for New Hampshire c/o Vikram Mansharamani PO BOX 932 Lincoln, NH 03251 USA

Fellow patriot, after years of cover-ups, redacted "client lists", and

about JEFFREY EPSTEIN into the light.

SUBPOENAS HAVE NOW BEEN ISSUED TO BILL AND HILLARY CLINTON.

JAMES COMEY. ROBERT MUELLER. LORETTA LYNCH. ERIC HOLDER. JEFF

BECAUSE THE TRUTH CAN’T BE BURIED ANY LONGER.

JOIN MTG

Jeffrey Epstein was a CONVICTED PEDOPHILE who operated in PLAIN SIGHT
for decades.

He built an empire of abuse... a pipeline of young girls fed into the
hands of the rich, powerful, and well-connected.

AND NOT ONE OF THE PEOPLE NOW UNDER SUBPOENA LIFTED A FINGER TO STOP
HIM.

What were they hiding?

Who were they protecting?

AND WHY DID NOBODY LIFT A FINGER TO SAVE THOSE YOUNG GIRLS
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]?

Our government has protected the predators and silenced the victims.

While Epstein hosted billionaires and politicians on his private
island, Washington looked the other way.

NO MORE
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

I’m fighting to expose every name, release every document, and hold
every official accountable who turned a blind eye... _or who did
worse_.

THE POLITICAL ESTABLISHMENT WANTS THIS BURIED FOR GOOD, AND THEY WILL
FIGHT TOOTH AND NAIL TO BLOCK THESE INVESTIGATIONS, REDACT THE FILES,
AND INTIMIDATE ANYONE WHO SPEAKS OUT.

Friend, that’s why I need your help...

They’ll call in EVERY FAVOR.

They’ll unleash their MEDIA ATTACK DOGS.

They’ll try to BURY THE FILES, INTIMIDATE WHISTLEBLOWERS, and BLOCK
THIS INVESTIGATION BEFORE IT GETS TOO CLOSE TO THE TRUTH.

THEY’VE GOTTEN AWAY WITH IT FOR DECADES...

AND THIS IS THE CLOSEST WE’VE EVER COME TO UNCOVERING IT.

This might be our only chance, and WE CAN NOT LET IT SLIP THROUGH OUR
FINGERS
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

If we lose this opportunity, we’ll never know what really happened
on that island, we’ll never know just who was complicit, and we’ll
never know just how deep this conspiracy goes.

So if you care about the truth as much as I do—I’m asking you to
chip in whatever you can right now to help me fight back against
what’s coming.

EXPOSE JEFFREY EPSTEIN
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

I won’t back down – not _now,_ not _ever_...

BUT FOR THIS FIGHT TO MAKE IT TO THE END, I NEED YOUR HELP
[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active].

_For Justice,_

[https://secure.winred.com/marjorie-taylor-greene-s-people-over-politicians-c/mtg_don_mawco_wmb_ef-su_rs_20250808?recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

MARJORIE TAYLOR GREENE

name: DemsGive
subject: More ICE agents. Fewer immigration judges.
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund
body:
The federal government is reshaping the system’s staffing priorities.
| | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K24VQV8YM0ZYCSX4VD7CC87X_0)
---
| | | | Hey Peter, ICE is expanding. With a new push backed by $29 billion in federal funding, the agency is offering large incentives to new recruits and casting a wide net to fill 10,000 roles. At the same time, dozens of immigration judges have been let go without cause. Some have spoken out, citing concern about the court system’s ability to keep up. This is a structural shift. More enforcement agents, fewer adjudicators. [**Read the full story**](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K24VQV8YM0ZYCSX4VD7CC87X_1)[](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K24VQV8YM0ZYCSX4VD7CC87X_2) More soon, Andy
DemsGive.org
---
|
---
| **Support the Protect Our Democracy Fund.** When enforcement expands while due process is dismantled, the rule of law is at risk. Your support helps protect fair institutions, legal integrity, and equal justice under the law.
---
| | [ Make a contribution ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01K24VQV8YM0ZYCSX4VD7CC87X_3)

clean_body: The federal government is reshaping the system’s staffing priorities. | | | | | | | | | Hey Peter, ICE is expanding. With a new push backed by $29 billion in federal funding, the agency is offering large incentives to new recruits and casting a wide net to fill 10,000 roles. At the same time, dozens of immigration judges have been let go without cause. Some have spoken out, citing concern about the court system’s ability to keep up. This is a structural shift. More enforcement agents, fewer adjudicators. More soon, Andy DemsGive.org | | Support the Protect Our Democracy Fund. When enforcement expands while due process is dismantled, the rule of law is at risk. Your support helps protect fair institutions, legal integrity, and equal justice under the law. | | | Paid for and authorized by Protect Our Democracy Fund | | No longer want to receive these emails? . DemsGive 712 H St NE Unit # 8746 Washington, DC 20002

name: Eric Flores
subject: I’m officially running for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress
body:
I’ve spent my life leading troops & locking up criminals. But today I’m stepping up for a new fight.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5kdbt6r1ngsjrttli4j84m1hcsqmi4irq335d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbjcdt3nm8be4lmnj90ourko4sdkulpj16rmvaao_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
Friend,

My name is Eric Flores — I’m a father, Christian, U.S. Army veteran, and former federal prosecutor.

I’m not a politician. I’ve never run for office. I’ve spent my life leading troops at the southern border and locking up human traffickers.

**But today, I’m officially announcing my run for the MUST-WIN Texas 34 Election — the biggest swing sweat in America.**

I’m Pro-Border Wall, Pro-Life, and 100% Pro-Trump.

In 2020, Biden took this district by 16 points. But in 2024, President Trump flipped it and won by 4.
South Texas is waking up — for the first time in years, we can take this seat back.

Republicans nominated the same losing candidate two cycles in a row — _and we handed this district to the Left both times._

**Not again.**

We’ve never had a better shot — but I’m up against a Democrat machine with deep pockets and powerful allies in Washington.

They’re already working overtime to shut us down before we even get off the ground.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking — with EVERYTHING on the line — for your help today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5fds0f3t0v58mlo6d7h03bc0jttr2u3jc3u10q8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)**

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrnc4dkkc3ed3vq836l4o947qdkli45hv0u0f340_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
| | | **If you STILL believe in Pres. Trump’s movement, and you’re TIRED of career politicians selling you out, then join me in this fight.**

Even just $5 will make all the difference.

_We cannot afford to lose this race — so I’m praying I can count on you today._

---
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znqas5rkukpggt164e4kqpvbmkcgr6t6fa7ac480_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
****Thank you & God bless,

Eric Flores

name: Donald Trump Jr.
subject: Peter, I need to know where you stand
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC

Friend,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za36o1vr7f0ma8cdnnddm79bvceplpnoagm6k0cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7jtoh8lom4ngcir5tqphjar99u82763dqalrcbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)

Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under booking # 2313757. But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could at least defend myself from the Left’s bogus charges... ...Or so I thought! name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8k6hvelmb0rb7ashfns97q2sgeeqtlh5t8ugpf8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z5nuvs19kbppe3joq68aogrn5bcsbn6rq7o31pvo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z08gp85gk4gd9gt2qnno28ak6s73hvnhfqfst75g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z7ecgsahp3dtors2ncdansmphgf6gkefohqbrg40_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie

name: Eric Flores
subject: I’m officially running for U.S. Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Flores for Congress
body:
I’ve spent my life leading troops & locking up criminals. But today I’m stepping up for a new fight.

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcu51mifb9s5t4vu8ku4duqk6lgn1lbuf9rvmudo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgl9egiav8p1h3av7s8r44tf3cdiomnm8a2g1o38_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
Friend,

My name is Eric Flores — I’m a father, Christian, U.S. Army veteran, and former federal prosecutor.

I’m not a politician. I’ve never run for office. I’ve spent my life leading troops at the southern border and locking up human traffickers.

**But today, I’m officially announcing my run for the MUST-WIN Texas 34 Election — the biggest swing sweat in America.**

I’m Pro-Border Wall, Pro-Life, and 100% Pro-Trump.

In 2020, Biden took this district by 16 points. But in 2024, President Trump flipped it and won by 4.
South Texas is waking up — for the first time in years, we can take this seat back.

Republicans nominated the same losing candidate two cycles in a row — _and we handed this district to the Left both times._

**Not again.**

We’ve never had a better shot — but I’m up against a Democrat machine with deep pockets and powerful allies in Washington.

They’re already working overtime to shut us down before we even get off the ground.

**[That’s why I’m humbly asking — with EVERYTHING on the line — for your help today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlgnt94i1fsit2e6j26nqpjq4pluidke0f8coh08_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)**

[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z477hkbq3eoiuojf206knmnffaualq1895r6mglo_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
| | | **If you STILL believe in Pres. Trump’s movement, and you’re TIRED of career politicians selling you out, then join me in this fight.**

Even just $5 will make all the difference.

_We cannot afford to lose this race — so I’m praying I can count on you today._

---
[CONTRIBUTE TODAY](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zifol5msbl2u59n34o9iklt8enn935s3v9of1tj8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjmcpj5clh2bs)
****Thank you & God bless,

Eric Flores

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8leto8vmd925n8g5hpck63uinfhkc9vso35sto8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm2oj0cjh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq388cen6ovcio7o04qlpl7rm3fg5759d5srvnko_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm2oj0cjh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zal6bhooqp3lfne1l08p27vuvcf4b6r82nss93gg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm2oj0cjh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcq2i9bq8aifdeebor1sgrcs3q48fo2kdnumkik8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm2oj0cjh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

---

Ohio Republican candidate for governor Vivek Ramaswamy **[was challenged about Black history](https://substack.com/redirect/91d1c884-75fa-4443-8df5-82bd2c709765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** at a Cincinnati town hall following a viral beating of a White woman, an audience member named Robert accused America of sweeping Black history "under the table" while remembering other groups' suffering, namely "the ashkenazi jews."
**[Vivek's response was unbelievable...](https://substack.com/redirect/91d1c884-75fa-4443-8df5-82bd2c709765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/91d1c884-75fa-4443-8df5-82bd2c709765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/91d1c884-75fa-4443-8df5-82bd2c709765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Well, look over the 400 years of all the violence that was perpetrated on our people... You want to sweep our history under the table, but you don't sweep the Ashkenazi Jews with the Hitler thing under the table. All the things that you did to the other races of people, you don't sweep that under the table. But when it comes down to the black Negro, we can always sweep what happened to us under the table," Robert told Ramaswamy.
Ramaswamy admitted the question made him "uncomfortable" but said America is "destined to never be perfect" because it's comprised of humans, not gods, arguing it's better to live in a country with ideals that falls short than one with no ideals at all, comparing America to China and Iran.
"We have to confront what is true, not just what makes us comfortable," Ramaswamy explained, stating that no ethnic history should be ignored while also arguing that recent incidents like the Cincinnati beating shouldn't be swept aside either.
Another man wearing a MAGA hat stood up during the event and completely turned the tables on the narrative of black history in America.
**[Watch the jaw-dropping moment here:](https://substack.com/redirect/ab0b25cf-e7ca-49a4-b244-27367b385cce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/a2ed3737-5bac-4649-9987-dd4154e8ec3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[ Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ab0b25cf-e7ca-49a4-b244-27367b385cce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/9af2e821-2c74-4a7a-8f48-2a18d3f0d6b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Investors are watching this fast-growing tech company](https://substack.com/redirect/9af2e821-2c74-4a7a-8f48-2a18d3f0d6b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's **Mode Mobile** , 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.
Their EarnPhone has helped users earn and save over $325M, driving $75M+ in revenue and **[an eye-popping 32,481% growth](https://substack.com/redirect/9af2e821-2c74-4a7a-8f48-2a18d3f0d6b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** And having secured partnerships with **Walmart** and **Best Buy** , Mode's not stopping there...
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into **[an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/9af2e821-2c74-4a7a-8f48-2a18d3f0d6b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.**** The difference is that you have a chance to invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering at just $0.30/share.
They've just been granted the stock ticker _**$MODE**_ by the Nasdaq and the time to invest at their current share price is running out.

But when it comes down to the black Negro, we can always sweep what happened to us under the table," Robert told Ramaswamy. Ramaswamy admitted the question made him "uncomfortable" but said America is "destined to never be perfect" because it's comprised of humans, not gods, arguing it's better to live in a country with ideals that falls short than one with no ideals at all, comparing America to China and Iran. "We have to confront what is true, not just what makes us comfortable," Ramaswamy explained, stating that no ethnic history should be ignored while also arguing that recent incidents like the Cincinnati beating shouldn't be swept aside either. Another man wearing a MAGA hat stood up during the event and completely turned the tables on the narrative of black history in America. | | ---|---|--- No, it's not Nvidia... It's Mode Mobile , 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte. Their EarnPhone has helped users earn and save over $325M, driving $75M+ in revenue and . And having secured partnerships with Walmart and Best Buy , Mode's not stopping there... Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into . The difference is that you have a chance to invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering at just $0.30/share. They've just been granted the stock ticker $MODE by the Nasdaq and the time to invest at their current share price is running out. | | | | ---|---|--- | 1:03 PM | | | | | ---|---|--- | Aug 7 | | | POLL Who should be the "heir to MAGA" be after Trump? | ? ? ? ? ? name: Dan Carr
subject: Faith & Morality
body:
As America faces cultural chaos, collapsing values, and confusion in leadership, Faith and Morality must return to the center of our national conscience.

| |
---|---|---
|
# Faith & Morality
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Aug 8
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
As America faces cultural chaos, collapsing values, and confusion in leadership, _Faith and Morality_ must return to the center of our national conscience. In this episode of _God and Country_ , we examine the spiritual decay of our nation and how the Founding Fathers understood morality and faith as essential to liberty. We challenge every believer to rise with boldness and truth.

Friend,
I’m honored to share that EMILYs List has officially endorsed our campaign!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-el?refcode=0807] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-el?refcode=0808-e&amount=25] EMILYs List knows our fight in the 18th Congressional District is urgent, and they know I’m ready to take it on. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ake-el?refcode=0807]
As we announce this news, Governor Greg Abbott and his allies are trying to silence Houston’s voice. At Trump’s request, their redistricting proposals split up communities, suppress Black and Brown voices, and strip power from the very people who keep Texas moving forward.

body:
|
#
Big news, folks. **Kristen’s campaign to keep MI-08 blue was featured in the _Cook Political Report._** | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112960974/562184224/846650059?refcode=em-8.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYTNmYi01Zjc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMGY0-U5VXugVOl5QC1LkoOIlGP4kneZIUvCtClejdI=) "The freshman Democrat is guaranteed to have a competitive race next year. Republicans have already spent **$800,000** on negative ads attacking her this year."
---
[**Election analysts know keeping this seat blue won’t be easy – especially with Republicans already spending big. That’s why we’re asking you to make an urgent donation of $3 today:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112960976/562184232/846650059?refcode=em-8.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYTNmYi01Zjc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMGY0-U5VXugVOl5QC1LkoOIlGP4kneZIUvCtClejdI=)
[Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112960978/562184242/1362877131?refcode=em-8.7.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OTRiYTNmYi01Zjc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VMGY0-U5VXugVOl5QC1LkoOIlGP4kneZIUvCtClejdI=)

As a reminder, Kristen won this seat despite Trump carrying it by two points last November. That makes it a top target for Republicans, which is why they’re gearing up early.

| | , **Joe Jaworski is crisscrossing Texas, and he wants to meet your community.** Whether it's a local Democratic club, union meeting, church group, student organization, or backyard barbecue — Joe is ready to show up, listen, and share his vision for a fairer, more just Texas. He’s not hiding behind consultants or TV ads. He’s out there, shaking hands, answering tough questions, and showing up where it counts. **Want Joe to speak at an event in your area? Just fill out this quick form to send an invite:**
👉[ **Request Joe to Speak**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=32830879e3&e=5d8d80652b) No event is too big or too small — if you’re gathering people to talk about the future of Texas, Joe wants to be there. **Let’s bring this campaign directly to the people. Hope to see you soon.** —Team Jaworski

body:

Friend,

Before you dread the idea of reading another political email, I want you to know this one’s different.

My opponent voted NO on protecting access to abortion and contraception - and I’m in a TOSS-UP race to defeat him. ---

**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**

But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Friend, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.

That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.

name: Thomas Massie
subject: Friend, I only reach out like this when I must…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1f0ntirjg8vipt4jc1n75t1u62v8b3a1roijq1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76c5h2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zcktoreopbtaq89b9635eanlv7rba6695drh5ujg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76c5h2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0e8654o895pr456fl7sbkao6hk6v4dndj38s1d0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76c5h2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9s78r37qqvjscmkf3h2dgp2c01u0ns66ppunav8_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76c5h2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: It’s you and me, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
I hope this email is correct

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z6h76ubrpa77aqir3rc96t1e4snlhm6msnje7m10_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Friend!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , Friend!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Friend, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **
---
[**Even if you can only chip in a few bucks, will you please make a donation to support my campaign today?**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zbijkda447phbei0h0o3j1jf2qj4rvshso3pgitg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
[ Send in any amount you can spare!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zamnn8degg14dk6kkaq4s3qcd8bedgjugfctao3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
We can't let a far-Left Democrat like Abigail Spanberger turn our country into a socialist dystopia - we must defend everything we've worked so hard to build! [**I 'm counting on you to send in a donation of any amount before midnight, Friend. Please don't let me down!**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zdltv68iggbq6amsgm3mvhk7v73v2hsnvc8a3t40_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
[ I'LL MAKE A DONATION, WINSOME!](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z07lshp1hiaa7b3gbckr4adr07gsirt1lrh75lr0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zlcfqhrb58t4bo55ah4d3nqoqivlamvtk1ni7v00_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
I can't tell you how much I appreciate having you on my team. Together, we will defend our home and ensure our country remains a bastion of conservatism and a land of opportunity!

Thank you again and may God bless you and your family,

Winsome Earle-Sears
_Lt. Governor of Virginia_
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo6jpbg6q1vnlpauv693k178i7sq101damkbc4ig_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---

|
---

| | |
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9gutt9k74r12ll9jvho4vojk4s0tcn9fugggc38_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, Republican candidate running for Governor of Virginia. I broke records as the first black female Lieutenant Governor in Virginia, but my mission isn't over yet!

It's going to take all of us conservatives working together to win. [_**So please, chip in if you can today!**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zcafge72ovqq94h0nlhn2u1r6j26g5jv7ock5df0_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)
---
[ **CHIP IN NOW >>** ](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zvubivo76d1i06d1n51de9ljunl26o3svafng2cg_rp22sh2s8i6epb1cdjm6p76cph2bs)

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Here’s the Latest…
body:
I don’t want to take up too much of your time, but I want to bring you up to speed on some very important developments!

|
| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I don't want to take up too much of your time, but I want to bring you up to speed on some very important developments at Judicial Watch!
**First ....**
We scored **HUGE** wins last week, when federal courts in **California** and **Illinois** both gave the green light to allowing our all-important lawsuits to force those states to clean up their dirty voter rolls to proceed!
The voter rolls in **California** and **Illinois** are a mess.
In fact, there are potentially _millions_ of ineligible names to remove from them... and now we have the green light to use the legal system and the courts to force two of the biggest blue states to use the legal system and the courts to remove _millions of opportunities for voter fraud_!
| [HELP US KEEP FIGHTING FOR CLEAN ELECTIONS](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75829&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

**Second ....**

We recently filed our opening brief to the **U.S. Supreme Court** in advance of our critically important appearance before the High Court next term in our challenge to **Illinois** ' reckless law that "extends" **Election Day** for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law.

You see, Judicial Watch doesn't just fight for clean voter rolls...we are _also in court_ fighting _all_ the Left's efforts to open the door to ineligible ballots being cast, and counted!

[YOUR CONTRIBUTIONS FUEL OUR LAWSUITS](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75829&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

We are using the legal system and the courts to fight on other fronts as well...

...like scoring a _courtroom win_ in **Pennsylvania** against a county government that unlawfully suppressed public records concerning COVID-19 school policies....

...and filing a lawsuit against the stonewalling **Department of Justice** for documents the American people have a right to see regarding the man who attempted to assassinate **President Trump** , and who _killed an innocent bystander_ , in **Pennsylvania** last summer.

Every day, we are fighting for the rule of law _and_ for the American people's right to know.

But the support of patriots like you is indispensable to all our work, and [I hope you will join with us today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75829&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)...thank you!

Sincerely,

Thomas Fitton
President

P.S. Thanks to our members, Judicial Watch has made real progress in the legal battle for election integrity. The momentum is real but so too are the costs of suing states which violate federal law by failing to maintain their voter rolls. Judicial Watch is proud to lead this fight, but we can only do so so if conservatives like you will help us. **[Please consider making a special one-time donation to help fuel our shared fight for clean, honest elections.](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75829&L=35348&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTY/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnM=&hash=6b7d730242d55e52186759e44e828acf66566736e1bae6f943796970e61717b5)**

[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=75829&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Public spaces shouldn’t be a luxury
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Researchers have confirmed what we already know: **Outdoor recreation shouldn't be a luxury, it’s essential to our mental and physical health.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112963326/562191362/-1649917129?refcode=AU_TK_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzk3ZTQ3Yy02Mzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IKH2kNm6zyczsEL_--Frr20jHY_1H508PR0jgKNDjqg=&emci=44d3938f-0973-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=dc97e47c-6374-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=15353729) According to new research from Oregon State University, public recreation spaces like parks, hiking trails, and beaches are essential health infrastructure, similar to pharmacies or hospitals. **[Oregon is home to breathtaking landscapes that we’re so fortunate to enjoy. Tina is committed to the fight for our environment, so will you stand with us today? | Dear Friend, Minnesota was robbed — and the Democrats watched it happen. While hardworking Minnesotans were struggling to make ends meet, over **_$600 Million in taxpayer dollars_** meant for feeding hungry children and others in need was **_stolen_** in the largest fraud scandals in state history. And where were the Democrats? Watching. Shrugging. Covering up. Governor Walz’s administration looked the other way, and now Minnesotans are footing the bill. That’s why we’re launching a **limited edition t-shirt** to send a message loud and clear:

name: Jailed for Justice
subject: My mug shot is here. Let’s talk.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
The MAGA machine wanted a trophy. Now they’ve got my mug shot.
All because I stood up to their voter suppression schemes, their racist gerrymandering, and their attacks on our democracy.
Stand Up. Fight Back.
They have the money. We have the people. Your donation today fuels the fight for justice and fair elections.
Donate Now → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]Every dollar makes a difference. No corporate PACs — just us.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IMG_1540.jpeg]
When I saw it, I thought about something the late Rep . John Lewis once said:
“Never, ever be afraid to make some noise and get in good trouble, necessary trouble. We will find a way to make a way out of no way.”
This is my good trouble. And I will never apologize for fighting for what’s right.

name: Stop MAGA
subject: Remember what we did in WI?
body:
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bMUzvlsL5lPdV-4E8MNaHqoori62CN74R93692Bu0xl2nrx40wKae__-SzlZGfpv0SoZLzREWFiByBu7q92XxeTxcl3Mbg2rYyYU07VEZP_Z9lEMckIZL7IBtVutdPU7MTiU_rzU6K-Wo3Lo9adKSqWLBKzNBdzrEn8y6ELb5aiiA=&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)
---
| Peter,
Not long ago, MAGA billionaires tried to buy the Wisconsin Supreme Court.
They poured tens of millions of dollars into a desperate attempt to flip the court, silence progressive judges, and rig future elections in Trump's favor.
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bMUzvlsL5lPdV-4E8MNaHqoori62CN74R93692Bu0xl2nrx40wKae__-SzlZGfpv0SoZLzREWFiByBu7q92XxeTxcl3Mbg2rYyYU07VEZP_Z9lEMckIZL7IBtVutdPU7MTiU_rzU6K-Wo3Lo9adKSqWOO-QbWer3d8BeFWWg3ULE8=&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)
---
| And they failed -- because Democrats didn't wait until the last minute. We organized early, fought hard, and exposed their plan to the public. The result was one of the most significant judicial wins in a generation.
Now, that same playbook is being run in Pennsylvania -- but with even less attention.
Three Democratic justices are up for retention this November. MAGA operatives, learning from their Wisconsin defeat, are pouring dark money into the state early and quietly. They're counting on the fact that this isn't a flashy election -- that the media won't cover it, that Democratic leaders won't engage, and that voters won't even realize there's a race.
But the stakes couldn't be higher.
If we lose the Pennsylvania Supreme Court, Republicans will take full control of the state's judicial system. They'll gerrymander the congressional map beyond recognition. They'll greenlight voter suppression efforts that could change the outcome of the 2026 midterms and the 2028 presidential election. They'll strip away protections for abortion, labor, and civil rights.
This isn't just about 2025 -- it's about laying the groundwork for everything that comes next. Trump and his allies are already planning for 2028. They're lining up loyal judges, manipulating court systems, and rewriting election rules in their favor.
We can't afford to wait. If we act now, we can follow the same playbook that worked in Wisconsin. We can alert voters. Mobilize our base. Shine a spotlight on their dark-money machine and make sure they don't get away with another power grab in the dark.
But that only happens if we start today.
[So here's what we're asking: Can you chip in $50, $25, or even just $10 to help us take the fight to Pennsylvania before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bMUzvlsL5lPdV-4E8MNaHqoori62CN74R93692Bu0xl2nrx40wKae__-SzlZGfpv0SoZLzREWFiByBu7q92XxeTxcl3Mbg2rYyYU07VEZP_Z9lEMckIZL7IBtVutdPU7MTiU_rzU6K-Wo3Lo9adKSqWCcKAx-VDjtGweHtYiHkUqA=&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)
---
| | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bMUzvlsL5lPdV-4E8MNaHqoori62CN74R93692Bu0xl2nrx40wKae__-SzlZGfpv0SoZLzREWFiByBu7q92XxeTxcl3Mbg2rYyYU07VEZP_Z9lEMckIZL7IBtVutdPU7MTiU_rzU6K-Wo3Lo9adKSqWKtGuvMN9JpiN9ETZAaEfb8=&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)
---
| | | | [Or help defend our courts with a monthly contribution!](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bM4I0fIRtrPLsVHSEqcws-fS3oqh4u3TweSmUBHBuSRo3Dh4sPj0Jw6dXHo2nmh8Z7Uy2kqu99woK9Ifx8d4_CytfT_-vL0wdPrGorcFzGDv1BZiRRamrxcll_LdIw-tVhYGOad9d3Wi3-tnjS-boTmMtC8E4F7VS7vZ25fP_6hLvK0AwHAR0VR_nF538rEdv7&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)
---
This is the most important race of 2025 -- and maybe the most overlooked. But we've been here before. We've won before. We can do it again.
Let's make Pennsylvania our next victory.
-- Defend Our Courts
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H6MKwBQNUBxBaDiieFnCawnnL8AtJ8vQRthyhXBFBimjuIX3HBxG2acSSxgQz7bMUzvlsL5lPdV-4E8MNaHqoori62CN74R93692Bu0xl2nrx40wKae__-SzlZGfpv0SoZLzREWFiByBu7q92XxeTxcl3Mbg2rYyYU07VEZP_Z9lEMckIZL7IBtVutdPU7MTiU_rzU6K-Wo3Lo9adKSqWN5ZpfkPnJZdd5PChD5T5g8=&c=rlMNszLr6Fq_PbnIxjqRoiGiKh2zfmzqlUUk3pzNEpRwbQkNm8r9xA==&ch=2eNwfFV5HVOOOOzHOR61-L3cO9aj1CqxlfULO3UdY8oVr3NJfMWcwQ==)

Friend, In 2020, 2022, and 2024 – despite a pandemic, death threats to officials, and constant misinformation – our elections held. **But we’re not exaggerating when we say this time is different.** Now empowered by an administration filled with election deniers, the threat to free and fair elections is coming directly from the federal government. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112964012/562192899/1071238056?refcode=em-8.8.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ1YWQyZi02NDc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yT6U1U9mrWEsulb8GKArBZiC-Yyje_brShpd5iRMROw=) **The Trump Administration’s Campaign to Undermine the Next Election**
---
Trump has launched a coordinated campaign to undermine the 2026 elections. His administration is rewriting election rules, threatening election officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 results.
And unlike last time, the internal checks that stopped him – the DOJ, career civil servants, nonpartisan election leaders – **are gone.**
He’s clearing the runway to try again. And this fight will come down to the people who actually run our elections – the Secretaries of State on the front lines of our democracy.
Because while Trump and his allies rewrite rules from the top, it’s state-level leaders who will ensure every vote is counted, and certify the results.
[**At DASS, we’re fighting to elect and support Democratic Secretaries of State in battleground states across the country – but we can’t do it without you. So please, can you chip in $3 today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112964013/562192900/1071238056?refcode=em-8.8.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=20&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQ1YWQyZi02NDc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yT6U1U9mrWEsulb8GKArBZiC-Yyje_brShpd5iRMROw=)

clean_body: | = Friend, In 2020, 2022, and 2024 – despite a pandemic, death threats to officials, and constant misinformation – our elections held. But we’re not exaggerating when we say this time is different. Now empowered by an administration filled with election deniers, the threat to free and fair elections is coming directly from the federal government. | = The Trump Administration’s Campaign to Undermine the Next Election Trump has launched a coordinated campaign to undermine the 2026 elections. His administration is rewriting election rules, threatening election officials, and pardoning those who tried to overturn the 2020 results. And unlike last time, the internal checks that stopped him – the DOJ, career civil servants, nonpartisan election leaders – are gone. He’s clearing the runway to try again. And this fight will come down to the people who actually run our elections – the Secretaries of State on the front lines of our democracy. Because while Trump and his allies rewrite rules from the top, it’s state-level leaders who will ensure every vote is counted, and certify the results. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Team DASSl | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only_ organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States.
