[Learn more here](https://substack.com/redirect/14700ebf-13b2-4636-821f-0bb696a01fa8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/89a101c9-c3fb-49e8-925a-31a1f23841a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## Democrats will kill democracy to "save it"...
The Democrats can't stop shouting "democracy is under attack".
Every time they hit a roadblock it seems to be the end of democracy.
But let's be real: their outrage only kicks in when they're losing.
They'll gerrymander maps, push to stack the system, and spin media narratives without a peep about democracy's doom.
But when Republicans fight back or Trump racks up wins, suddenly it's a crisis.
If you ask me, it's not about saving democracy--it's about crying foul when power slips away.
Let's break it down...

| We're sounding the alarm on the **escalating attacks against bodily autonomy, voting rights, and due process across America.

What's in Episode 9:**
---
* The growing danger of **fetal personhood laws**
* **The SAVE Act** and how it could be used to suppress votes, if passed
* **Practical ways to** **defend your agency** and advocate for your family and community.

---
| | **Don't Miss Out: ****Episode 10 of Slingshot The Podcast drops next Thursday at 12PM ET**

From [@newpennsylvania](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YleprmLU3VQ-2BXVwWtg4JCiQNYmrpuFWqFACAJ5sv95lePf-2F6SYuWgEn-2F3smiLWCfkRNCMyjx0JGPN3gylEHOCm0-3DaLTq_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY2Ttts-2FZCaHDOH9iW37LuxUKuv7R8gPqLBYahQJA70kZz6JN2oBkHKfc5Eyy9S1WfjjGBPK-2F2U4Cq-2BJN5kpy8py5iZcoNY0NQ0lH6-2B3755YfiLdWpM3xeLgEfgy6uWqQBUkt-2B6ptgLDcP5AuTvpGnVS19MGiWN6pmUKOBYxJYMcPxzrvWWVwe3AyQb00QcleA) The Voting Rights Act was passed 60 years ago on August 6th, 1965. Yet, our voting rights are still at risk today. With continued attacks on our freedom to vote coming from the federal government and pending legislation, such as the SAVE Act that will disenfranchise marginalized voters, it’s paramount that Pennsylvanians contact their U.S. Congresspeople. Call your senators and representatives: (202) 224-3121. Let them know that there is no better day than today to support and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Our civic duty doesn’t end on election day at the polls. It carries over into all the days following elections, to hold our elected officials accountable and advocate for the advancement of our rights and freedoms – especially our voting rights. [Read our full statement.](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yhfw4GwcAy1ZO0FpWQelFo5U1ZPp6i3jTpn2UJNe1PAeBiZ4LXkx2bTYa6exJLyXzeymQErgICNvYHPrIW-2Boo2yX66EY-2BwSeG3rSx7XTzLm07Mf95lSJueLBgCtjTkqsuw-3D-3DDjle_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY2Ttts-2FZCaHDOH9iW37LuxUKuv7R8gPqLBYahQJA70ka3GIxH5jkZ8m0l5T3je9aGF4IBhB-2B65W1gvhS1wtK0ZRKcF5Vtq7FxhK7ds4HCDQWcPxlscvoLoL2mCYUaim92haIrFSqmaoGpEIuvy9gMkmu5pcyPqjXS8WeugVy2sM01dQuacvvaBW03MLaDjTGM)

**Gerrymandering. Redistricting: What is it and why you should care** [It is not a new tactic,](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9YpZUHkN-2BljZaJXzDP365NJo7SPaKjI1GzBmJZynXkEMcN4FKrp-2Bfq1ujze7FJheO-2F70jWi617RuYJ7LLc4huuNywTx8erSD7ujbIEhdy-2BgkYgi-2Fzk0Dw8YZgB8iNWbsvQDcQ61D6KG92HDRGqijPdCx5Qdn98syh52JsmoCEcz2egwSs_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY2Ttts-2FZCaHDOH9iW37LuxUKuv7R8gPqLBYahQJA70kak56DLPf3tlNUMpSFdEKr0pCY00WyDMIBDA3JEN6U47qHnarw-2BlvM7EnVDPwIZ2funYR62VtBfr8Tz-2FvFtUF9FQOAfl-2B0nmZn52YV2PucFs1yWO1JgDSwBTo-2BYDpI75oKF5fvRLOE4mc5OJDpH4EUM) but it is being used with precision. It is the New Jim Crow, not in rhetoric, but in effect. And it is not limited to Texas. Politicians are redrawing maps not in the spirit of fairness but in the pursuit of control. County Commissioner Roderick Miles, Jr, who serves and represents the constituents of Precinct 1 in Tarrant County, Texas, says that "this is not a fight about political parties. It is a fight about political power and who gets to wield it. It is about whether our democracy can grow to include those it has historically excluded. It is about whether we will allow a new generation of Black and Brown voters to be punished for daring to participate."

| [NPP opened its first Bucks County office](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yhfw4GwcAy1ZO0FpWQelFo6WUM5n6eXhAVX6rZsQT9SAWOAPSNXrW0yjjXZPibSBRuMrAUjejHANuEJIIewJYwy6s5RnW9gADYhe0efLWXU0tIpawLx-2BemOyxRPUryJudfw4ue48buoroHa-2FPFotRTJ5zs5hbThnRWNwA06R2Ef7kgcdKTp64-2BW4t-2FUTp3AsrQ-3D-3D_Wfr_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrY2Ttts-2FZCaHDOH9iW37LuxUKuv7R8gPqLBYahQJA70kZ-2FpwUEoQV1IuQVckKd-2Fmbldqewicnhmdf0-2FBKX-2FDCm2-2BjyaUfO50343KmT65aMILyBDvJljn2JEmUvoEXchfgUZGGnesiuT0-2F4MOz5W5cBDQODdT8kay7bWP8Bmx6KnjRixnpzcoEE9CUhISi3Qb-2BF) in Bensalem on Thursday. Kadida Kenner, the founding CEO of New Pennsylvania Project, said the organization specifically chose to reside in Bensalem because there is a proportionately larger demographic of people of color than Bucks County as a whole. Additionally, according to the America Votes voter file and U.S. census data (CVAP), as of 2024 in Bucks County, 35.8% of Black, Indigenous and other communities of color are not registered to vote compared to 4.6% of their white counterparts, which is higher than the statewide 18 percentage point gap. "It’s really about meeting people where they are," Kenner said. "And, if that means we’re going to an NAACP meeting or we’re going to a cultural festival, which we’ve done in Bucks County, we want to be where the people are, and we want to talk to them about getting registered to vote.”

clean_body: | | | | | Hi Friend , Welcome to the latest New Pennsylvania Project newsletter! Our weekly newsletter has all the news you can use and more! | | | In Case You Missed It: Episode 9 of Slingshot The Podcast Has Dropped | | "Stand Up for Your Rights" | We're sounding the alarm on the escalating attacks against bodily autonomy, voting rights, and due process across America. What's in Episode 9: The growing danger of fetal personhood laws The SAVE Act and how it could be used to suppress votes, if passed Practical ways to defend your agency and advocate for your family and community. | | Don't Miss Out: **Episode 10 of Slingshot The Podcast drops next Thursday at 12PM ET Watch it on , or listen wherever you get your podcasts (Apple, Spotify, etc.) | | | | | From The Voting Rights Act was passed 60 years ago on August 6th, 1965. Yet, our voting rights are still at risk today. With continued attacks on our freedom to vote coming from the federal government and pending legislation, such as the SAVE Act that will disenfranchise marginalized voters, it’s paramount that Pennsylvanians contact their U.S. Congresspeople. Call your senators and representatives: (202) 224-3121. Let them know that there is no better day than today to support and pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act. Our civic duty doesn’t end on election day at the polls. It carries over into all the days following elections, to hold our elected officials accountable and advocate for the advancement of our rights and freedoms – especially our voting rights. | | | | | The Pennsylvania Republican Party’s effort to “vote no” on this year’s Pennsylvania Supreme Court race could backfire and wreak havoc on local court systems. | A comprehensive analysis of hundreds of lawsuits against Trump policies shows dozens of examples of defiance, delay and dishonesty, which experts say pose an unprecedented threat to the U.S. legal system. Judges appointed by presidents of both parties have often sided with the plaintiffs in these cases. | Gerrymandering. Redistricting: What is it and why you should care but it is being used with precision. It is the New Jim Crow, not in rhetoric, but in effect. And it is not limited to Texas. Politicians are redrawing maps not in the spirit of fairness but in the pursuit of control. County Commissioner Roderick Miles, Jr, who serves and represents the constituents of Precinct 1 in Tarrant County, Texas, says that "this is not a fight about political parties. It is a fight about political power and who gets to wield it. It is about whether our democracy can grow to include those it has historically excluded. It is about whether we will allow a new generation of Black and Brown voters to be punished for daring to participate." | | | | | | | Join For Our Future PA and The New Pennsylvania Project to learn how the Pennsylvania Supreme Court historically has protected our civil and voting rights, and why it and the other courts in the state are crucial components in our democracy. There’s a lot of crackdowns happening RIGHT NOW on our previously assumed civil rights: suspending due process and habeas corpus; cracking down speech covered by the first amendment opposed to this administration’s efforts; and even violating elected officials and their staff. When: Monday, August 18 from 6pm - 7pm Where: Zoom | | | | | | in Bensalem on Thursday. Kadida Kenner, the founding CEO of New Pennsylvania Project, said the organization specifically chose to reside in Bensalem because there is a proportionately larger demographic of people of color than Bucks County as a whole. Additionally, according to the America Votes voter file and U.S. census data (CVAP), as of 2024 in Bucks County, 35.8% of Black, Indigenous and other communities of color are not registered to vote compared to 4.6% of their white counterparts, which is higher than the statewide 18 percentage point gap. "It’s really about meeting people where they are," Kenner said. "And, if that means we’re going to an NAACP meeting or we’re going to a cultural festival, which we’ve done in Bucks County, we want to be where the people are, and we want to talk to them about getting registered to vote.” | | | | | Everything we do, from hosting town halls and producing podcasts to knocking on doors, expands Pennsylvania's electorate by engaging Pennsylvanians to be civically involved and encouraging them to turn out to vote twice a year, none of it would be possible without you. | The These moves are unprecedented and in some cases illegal. A clear pattern suggests a growing effort. As the 2026 midterms approach, that effort will likely gather momentum. | Pennsylvania rolls out redesigned provisional ballot envelopes aimed at reducing errors. Secretary of the Commonwealth Al Schmidt a redesigned provisional ballot envelope. The new envelope features clearer instructions, highlighted signature areas, and simplified poll-worker sections. During the November 2024 election, cast in the state were rejected. The redesign follows a similar update of mail-in ballot envelopes in 2023. That update was linked to a 57% drop in mail ballot rejection rates. | The Library of Congress blames a “coding error.” The section is now back up on the website. | As of July 2025, Democrats outnumber Republicans by just 59,000 voters — the party held as recently as a decade ago. Much of that ground has been lost in places where Democrats once dominated. In counties like Westmoreland, Washington, and Fayette — long defined by labor unions and working-class blue voters — Republicans now lead by tens of thousands of registered voters. | | | Thank you for staying informed and engaged! | | Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania Project P.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 412-699-6771 | | | | | ---|---|--- The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible._

Friends, During his campaign, Donald Trump called himself the "_father of IVF._ " He promised free fertility care for all. **He claimed he was pro-family.** Now? **He 's walking it all back -- and blaming women for infertility instead. Let's be real: this wasn't a policy change. It was a con.** Trump lied to women, yes -- but also to everyone who has ever needed IVF to have a family. People who have spent years, savings, and hope trying to conceive. Families holding onto science for a chance at joy. He used them. All of them. Just to score political points. **He did it to make his abortion bans look "compassionate." To mislead voters. To hide the cruelty behind the Dobbs decision. It was all smoke and mirrors -- and now, the people who trusted him are the ones left to suffer. And for what?** _**There is no red or blue, no republican or democrat, when it comes to wanting a child. IVF isn 't left or right. It's deeply personal. And no one should have to beg a politician to build the family they dream of.**_ But Trump is turning reproductive freedom into a battlefield. They've came for abortions previously. They're coming for IVF now. And they won't stop there. That's why No Dem Left Behind is fighting like hell -- especially in rural communities where access to care is disappearing fast. **[Can you chip in $25 or more today to help us get the truth out-- and organize where it's needed most?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvUWHo9tkdcudztgboR-91DCGrGsdAbXd0xNQp7DexsGNRX7DVVYGn7mvykaPnYUZyWuI7sJ0FtrBC3ydtjUaSzEtKQWEMAP3tlUy8mFdV8ijnQSTWTbYGpz1_aSYF5tHjLraK7lNJyooY-JkhMMN1CFFLu5yD9TOa21Ff8tIyB-Y0nBwZvfWwh7vmcRTO1jJ9UQPwC0k_ki6H1lcKFAWrb-QqZ02XVR42LdB7nvreGze-vyVGPVBDCY1PgtDUZEZJzvi5cLHTC0uG5HtpPzjU3aipAByxK7W1mlg2AC04GC3sIx7gzEXxi7mW0EtS3WPeneG4ZzQ_B_NbmTQN3cuWpUEI1di4WOYFhFv-6qiEflmW9nFCeF3i5LVOKgkRRXFA/4iv/LxbZMj44TImXbDJY1cGf-Q/h1/h001.XpOx66nGplq1ZnN4qyu0ow4BpIEZ1uFhfEmpKa5rhic)**

clean_body: | | Friends, During his campaign, Donald Trump called himself the "father of IVF. " He promised free fertility care for all. He claimed he was pro-family. Now? He 's walking it all back -- and blaming women for infertility instead. Let's be real: this wasn't a policy change. It was a con. Trump lied to women, yes -- but also to everyone who has ever needed IVF to have a family. People who have spent years, savings, and hope trying to conceive. Families holding onto science for a chance at joy. He used them. All of them. Just to score political points. He did it to make his abortion bans look "compassionate." To mislead voters. To hide the cruelty behind the Dobbs decision. It was all smoke and mirrors -- and now, the people who trusted him are the ones left to suffer. And for what? There is no red or blue, no republican or democrat, when it comes to wanting a child. IVF isn 't left or right. It's deeply personal. And no one should have to beg a politician to build the family they dream of. But Trump is turning reproductive freedom into a battlefield. They've came for abortions previously. They're coming for IVF now. And they won't stop there. That's why No Dem Left Behind is fighting like hell -- especially in rural communities where access to care is disappearing fast. Trump lied to every person who ever needed help to start a family. Let's make sure he pays for that lie -- with votes. In the fight, The No Dem Left Behind Team | | Mail checks to: No Dem Left Behind P.O. My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left's sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.

| Hi Peter,

**Ryan Mackenzie hasn’t held a single public in-person town hall since taking office.** Instead of hearing directly from you, he’s been busy siding with special interests and Trump’s billionaire donors. He’s avoiding the hard conversations because he knows his record doesn’t hold up.

While Ryan Mackenzie hides in Washington, Carol’s been here in PA-07. She’s been hearing about the real issues that our community is facing — the rising prices at the grocery store, fears of losing their healthcare due to Medicaid cuts, and the need for good-paying jobs. In Congress, she’ll always fight for PA-07 – not walk away.

# **Trump’s 2025 Economic Revolution Is Here
Are Your Retirement Savings Ready?
**
---
**President Trump’s “One Big Beautiful Bill” strives to deliver the largest tax cuts for working and middle class Americans in our country’s history.** His bold plan not only extends the historic 2017 tax cuts but introduces even deeper reforms aimed at empowering American workers and retirees. If you are retired or near retirement, this could mean more money in your savings and a once-in-a-generation opportunity to help protect lasting wealth—**if you’re prepared**. **But here’s the catch:**
This new economic agenda may come with both massive opportunity and serious risk for anyone with a traditional retirement account—like a 401(k), IRA, or TSP. The fatal flaw? These accounts are built on a Wall Street system that assumes stability, free from manipulation and political shocks. And in today’s world, all it could take is one major event—another bank failure, a geopolitical crisis, a market crash—to wipe out decades of your savings like it did in the 2008 Financial Crisis. **If you have a retirement account and want to help safeguard—not just survive—during Trump’s economic revolution, this is your wake-up call.** We’ve outlined a wealth protection strategy inside the **[2025 Retirement Protection Guide](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1941394/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJvdGVjdGluZ215c2F2aW5ncy1lbWFpbC5jb20vdHJ1bXBzLXJlc2V0LWJsdWUtYWR2ZXJ0LTA2MjcyNS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDg/LbmNseWdCUzkwZQ/qP2NuPTg1NS02OTctODA4NSZscz0wMDEtRW1haWwtV2FyLVJvb20mc2ZjaWQ9NzAxUWgwMDAwMFpUcmtz/gaJYnjw/s6n62fdcf98)** — and it’s completely FREE. **Inside this guide, you'll discover an IRS-approved loophole that allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a safe haven asset and hedge your wealth against inflation, market volatility and geopolitical crises.** **Time is short.** Trump’s reforms may be coming fast—and the financial system roller coaster may be a ride that you don’t want to take with your retirement savings.

Donald Trump believes he’s above the law, Peter. He continues to corruptly abuse the Office of the Presidency for his own benefit. **Just look at the last few weeks:** He sent his MAGA allies in Congress to carry out an all-out attack on independent, fact-based reporting by defunding PBS and NPR simply because he can’t handle the objective truth about his blatant corruption. He directed Speaker Mike Johnson to close up shop and send the House of Representatives home for their summer recess early to avoid releasing the Epstein files, which he is included in. And he continues to remove all federal employees who dare to speak out against his dishonest narrative — most recently, the head of the Bureau of Labor Statistics who simply released a bad jobs report based on an exhaustive methodology. But to Trump, because the numbers were bad, the BLS director must have _“rigged”_ the _“phony”_ numbers. It’s clear that Trump will stop at no lengths to eliminate everyone and everything that contradicts his preferred narrative — truth be damned. name: Haley Stevens
subject: I've never been more proud to be from Michigan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I can't wait to tell you ...

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4436?t=2&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
Hi null – it’s Haley.

I just wrapped up the first leg of my _Made in Michigan_ tour, and I can’t wait to tell you all about it. But first, I need to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 right now to help us hit tonight’s $10,000 fundraising goal?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4437?t=3&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)**
| | [Donate](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4438?t=4&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
I’ve got to tell you, null – nothing makes me prouder to be from Michigan than meeting the people who make this state what it is: hardworking, tough as nails, and full of heart.

**We were made in Michigan. And we’re proud of it.**
I grew up surrounded by grit and grease – my family ran a landscaping business, and my dad was a teacher in Detroit public schools. That’s where I learned the values of hard work, perseverance, and to always fight for what’s right.
I’ve fought for Michiganders my whole career – from helping lead the auto rescue that helped save over 200,000 Michigan jobs, to flipping a red seat blue in 2018, to delivering for working families in Congress.
Now, I’m running for Senate, and we’re facing our biggest challenge yet: Donald Trump just endorsed my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers. And a GOP super PAC has already raised $5 million to support him.
_The Hill_ even named Michigan one of the top five Senate seats most likely to flip, and experts say Senate control could be decided by our battleground race.

**I know the stakes. But I was raised the Michigan way – I don’t back down from a fight.**
I need you with me to win, null. Polls show I’m leading Rogers, but only by a little. I truly can’t do it without the support of this grassroots team.
**
[Will you chip in $5 right now to help us hit our $10,000 goal and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4437?t=5&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4439?t=6&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4440?t=7&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4441?t=8&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4438?t=9&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
Thanks for standing with me.

Made in Michigan,
Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4409?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/4436?t=11&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=12&akid=530%2E49239%2EUFXFgG)
Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.
33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
No weekend plans? Join Team Grijalva! We have less than 50 days left until our Election in September!

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/d9932ca4c522/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10308798?e=f7c3700ccb)

| | | | |
# JOIN US THIS WEEKEND!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| Hi Peter,
This weekend kicks off the **General Election phase** of our campaign—and thanks to your energy and dedication, **we’ve made it to the Special General Election on September 23rd**!
With just **7 weekends left** to reach voters, this is our moment to go all in. Together, we have the chance to make history by electing **Adelita Grijalva as Arizona’s first Latina in Congress**. 🌵✨
Every door we knock, every call we make, and every conversation we have brings us closer to victory. We can't let up now—the stakes are high, and the finish line is in sight.
Let’s show up, make some noise, and win this together.
---
| **Here’s what’s happening this week:****Canvassing Door to Door!** Help us go door-to-door and connect with voters face-to-face. We have canvases this week in **Tucson and Nogales!**
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=9e366715f0&e=f7c3700ccb)

---
| [RSVP to Nogales Canvass!](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=8f5ed1dc11&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| For a smoother experience, please**download MiniVAN ahead of your canvass**. [Here](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=5898ff1b62&e=f7c3700ccb) is a guide if you need any help. MiniVAN is the program we use to share your list of doors to knock and where we log responses. **Download links** : MiniVAN for [iPhone](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=571a602071&e=f7c3700ccb) and [Android](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=10fa9ae260&e=f7c3700ccb).
---
| **Thinking about joining us to canvass this weekend? 😊****If you have any questions, please reach out to us, at** : **volunteer@adelitaforcongress.com**
**Con Mucho Cariño,****Naomi De La Rosa Arellano**

name: AG Jason Miyares
subject: Jay Jones is lying to his own voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
His ad says “safety.” His record says “early release for rapists.”| | | Friend,
Jay Jones just released his first general election TV ad — **and it’s all a lie.**

He’s telling Virginians he has a plan to keep us safe. But the same day, **he admitted something stunning to the _Richmond Times-Dispatch:_**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/s/c/AiqLiw9smKm45zFm3IN61JfhV__6Qomkr7Z4kXlS0RWgZrrFVn4w86ySiRvj5QDEV4MhyfihemIagp9FgjB1D9oBe2Pb03-jNsmBb7pXyi04WJ4vR8i5szgLW6R5wwhPgGvEvVm7dWuhmt4Q3mr_vQonR7q9oAIZLpBoKETzT614M7DzsORnhhy2QzbuTm89LrK-5G4C6mLj5aQ9scLYVFY7H28nCiGh6uL-oBcsHLX_BgSp_VHtKxWoBI27CuDpkL1PrFOl-ugvO9baOSqVV3RZ7w5Z_E6KSKQmtVK3JXdrcA_y_1ccm8scWlHcsnKVzY0F1f9XZ73YFh1qJ_OCQlo0HTd64MqHRETcBnU2lJiQkanSQwRWLVAQjljrQz_at-IHJ4a-9icSloarhZpK9H2TghVtUNrAy5mYsTR76fkv4JL3Q0Te4V5a7O9KiC3Gjk-3TcVaUBaq-1HBwu_3hvNMWTDWpmuQJeMFEynHxxb6Tq2sykTGbQJHikr00zzVVV_4BiyBytCPcXiPYerqLI-IyR9wv2et55uV4bmoQlg2Lbvj0RQTgRr0CUi15j70Wd8ShiSNjiOLTsy_UkGt/t8rc4CQeKlAr6sxPwoceBJ7Ex6L0FLke/11)
---
**That’s the real Jay Jones. The same guy who:**

* Voted to let **murderers, rapists, and violent criminals** out of prison early
* Opposed jail time for **repeat domestic abusers and drug dealers near schools**
* Fought against making it a felony to sell fentanyl that **leads to someone’s death**
* Supported no-cash bail policies that **put violent criminals back on our streets before trial**

And now he’s on TV pretending to care about our safety? Jay Jones is lying to his own voters — and hoping they never find out the truth.

clean_body: His ad says “safety.” His record says “early release for rapists.”| | | Friend, Jay Jones just released his first general election TV ad — and it’s all a lie. He’s telling Virginians he has a plan to keep us safe. But the same day, he admitted something stunning to the Richmond Times-Dispatch: That’s the real Jay Jones. The same guy who: Voted to let murderers, rapists, and violent criminals out of prison early Opposed jail time for repeat domestic abusers and drug dealers near schools Fought against making it a felony to sell fentanyl that leads to someone’s death Supported no-cash bail policies that put violent criminals back on our streets before trial And now he’s on TV pretending to care about our safety? Jay Jones is lying to his own voters — and hoping they never find out the truth. I’m proud of my record fighting crime, saving lives, and standing with law enforcement. I’ve never needed to pretend. But I do need your help to make sure Virginians hear the truth about Jay Jones. His ad buy was big — and if we don’t respond, he might get away with it. Will you chip in, , or even right now to help us fight back and expose Jay’s record? We can’t let him lie his way into the Attorney General’s office. Help us fight back against his deception and set the record straight. For Virginia, AG Jason Miyares The People’s Protector | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | Paid for by Miyares for Virginia | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Juanjo, United We Dream
subject: We cannot normalize this
body:
What we’re seeing are alarming steps to roll back in-state tuition, dismantle higher education as we know it, and put the dreams and aspirations of our students in jeopardy. | | | Peter — The _Texas Dream Act_ has always been a benefit to all Texans, not just students. When this legislation abruptly ended in June, its wrongful and undemocratic repeal became the blueprint to end in-state tuition and persecute students across the country. **Make no mistake: We will continue to show up for students in every way we can.** Ensuring education is a right isn’t about benefiting one group of students over another. It’s about ensuring all students — _regardless of their background_ — have the opportunity to learn, gain valuable skills and experience, and secure stable careers. We can’t turn our backs on the people who power our state and make families, businesses, and our future stronger. Students, teachers, elected officials, business leaders, and people of conscience across the country must stay outspoken against these blatant attacks on the right to education for all. **We’re witnessing alarming steps to roll back in-state tuition, dismantle higher education as we know it, and put the dreams and aspirations of our students in jeopardy.** [**We’re fighting every day to demand policies that allow everyone to thrive. If you’re with us, please make a contribution of any amount today. Every dollar will help us organize and advocate for the dignity and justice of immigrants and communities of color.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoJTSOBuHvF4yDS8ugXcTBfs9dZfYG8mn__oeJ5k2OEarejuTYQvcaTFOCkmuRznbke0P8vRCQGLJ-ZALhu9iaJ79lW3zMQfDznM7yWhY_BqAvsvKIOUt-ryF94cBi0U2CuzEuwDsyE152IyG3aHXepXSe4hCT3Eacd8b_krX4NeE98vXBAvtNjiEhCowY45Vr_maIKyaHK1Fgch_Ln8PMJ6BSHkUcqgn_kSx9bAJPkIqaA6ylFmovhA8Z6PGI63AnpA3wM8qxE07zfbKXn4NNGg-gcoVuKDsVVWtPKipeQbAjqVQDO4_bWMMdZfyUOu1yHPnbsaGKvWSZ13LjLGNGU/4iv/axRlLuZkQ4KLLMkTI_mzNA/h0/h001.KC3vj6WjJMFsRiNN_asP3D8uZ86GAtCqMaKsOJpwmz0) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $5](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqswjENXoYacFGtlMLXh6NAeseKeguBhueYD3zJ5W7-TtoJTSOBuHvF4yDS8ugXcTBfs9dZfYG8mn__oeJ5k2OEa44K9FdxVaia9EIm7hTyKqij28Y0en-okTCZnOlLEPP6w7yKRQij8UAuwOnvUvcF4DwfGYQ8FjjTwhIVgbx43DXsu4-DwgXN9f8vkc6Zf7nm2pQ4keG-5JDPMdQtAdn2ERJpchVgleQnIXGmpU0cEc16YxnieosbZlOWDpUnITLFQFPrZ3-v1olR3Jzlv0fWNxlwR-SFACtorufpP9vtzmJ-POFfWyRGneV6ki72YzqE0NdTfX0Hp3tcOOEazOcxgCsqeiYOV0o1ci20KqRTqA72g7XW0KWjGBYASed1sVnpNP15C8mhSQOO7J4QJKR--/4iv/axRlLuZkQ4KLLMkTI_mzNA/h1/h001.v74eQB9Ixz_TGMnc_E_m-Pgsq3qZd8VROmcox66n_Ew)

clean_body: What we’re seeing are alarming steps to roll back in-state tuition, dismantle higher education as we know it, and put the dreams and aspirations of our students in jeopardy. | | | Peter — The Texas Dream Act has always been a benefit to all Texans, not just students. When this legislation abruptly ended in June, its wrongful and undemocratic repeal became the blueprint to end in-state tuition and persecute students across the country. Make no mistake: We will continue to show up for students in every way we can. Ensuring education is a right isn’t about benefiting one group of students over another. It’s about ensuring all students — regardless of their background — have the opportunity to learn, gain valuable skills and experience, and secure stable careers. We can’t turn our backs on the people who power our state and make families, businesses, and our future stronger. Students, teachers, elected officials, business leaders, and people of conscience across the country must stay outspoken against these blatant attacks on the right to education for all. We’re witnessing alarming steps to roll back in-state tuition, dismantle higher education as we know it, and put the dreams and aspirations of our students in jeopardy. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | The respective merchants of record for transactions to United We Dream Network are ActBlue Charities Inc. They receive and process those donations and subsequently give them to the organization or cause indicated on the contribution form within 30 days. This donation is tax-deductible. We cannot normalize state leaders colluding with the federal government to undemocratically undo lawful, longstanding policies that the public strongly supports. Thank you for standing up for the right to education. — Juanjo, United We Dream Follow us on: | | | | |

subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.
| | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/E4i2uQ71dvelJrwq_W9D6rk142gsOtz444-olay3oGHsNzrIiqS6J6iSDSIaQYir6yoamCcj02tHqm6R7cvX9H8pWMaEIlIhSIV2FRaTov9QbNkWpqSI__FP-dtpSHkm6J9vGCOPAl9dO-n8QdL-h0UGCeJ3NHdnQHtFHoOtPrjqUUgxm2Sfdfpr/ARvc_soP0XLdFLawn6R1ru3ZajCay4_o/11)_

| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/DPlUJ6WwyuWicfaOY7Njwgrv7KH_o7kuas8CjvxWg0uf0Lkp03wDI16tceGwPPXiH0MksICJl9j-hnnhqtgXnBo0Rx-zxj5H8Xtv_dgd0U-KtYodKSotBeT353RQqshtY5vRk2eRUSCnjeNc_T6LO6QxBckIIh8ZCwr9QU5g40RFA5kLB0KKK-fc-7upaGPLjO6T5BVsQsoHHuPr1HpgndCxYgUG98kwx_ZbPxSsjQzDpUrv5uOBCZylGlfiGY38um98KCD4uQ27wqN4inFTTFrHb7bwG_giTPPPwo7w-vyDEk7iMABF41_n7I-hpilvg7zNqIIeKmUCHzlPnZGstczo2TAtb5ejNCv-uziuRHSAyO-hPru_PeWT1gngaxajN3k4NMS3wjZoVqTI23WOWXL_7rZRFPOzTEQpPMmjoyw02XfkbJOS-YE4zcs8Gy64FlDwXKnCRDCAuy9LJ4rX6t-Uh-NKuBZKWHm_rcX80OjcZjHR_4x-xJ4oWIAOB7a0GiqzCw1PvZSjVVsG08YIJbmU7g645ZHOvcmuphDySl4tOTKxvFyy1I3JczbHEjdZc8rlweuKcNZqGdfA7QEcWnz8JbjIQ66FVKfp9O1yFMH6L7CS8UGt41OI02leXbyeNF0XuZdIddeiJVFURxN6GwAv4IUCiCGmmSMrLSiEXOKvbhDSuqiJjoi5NTga6zWNgs8qwn2ortvnM0UxG15tkq0cwdMMncnirQ/aQsKbrdYATB1C0JVPGkTfl4T4-TnHCNJ/11) [NO](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/kYEj7r2YcxAdmy_ztK0ufQ18NsANZO3ypGy7iyx2WsNbsy28jO0I-WCKSDfaT4icjYVbWwIvvQb47wfge1YMD6WlWwjLjs-iX491KqUwFw8kiPWHy8pWfoOSf-uTkzUqr_Ojl-AMlV4eRK5hB5ygc-g8DBM8gzWbgtB0Ftvlnwp6T2AiHaWnfeowu5mA00ce-uFirqDbFVs-Cmp6Chm2OY8faG-KHqJ6EJEO_WQsnhwT0k7deXvvcTj4dRVj4LJpeH6kcVFHN40ZlINRT06QwQwjmanGP7PtvGKeuoQJI_Rby_znA8YmV6FcTJ_OV29OSj0OuyOEFas_E_9blgXWdL3RxeihBjlEWKpJq5VUL4Kf8yMq49WSn4XXtOUcWc06eh35cYPZHBgOAWgPhhpbs_lHt8Tpiis5jT0bWSe1CqofJZJJF7afG5sU40oiqFPcwANfALwaPuabxnoY4pDa7a046McFjeq-KfxAn9O_6v1RFAykDHQzCzhz8rCBXFS_Iz34Wk3KHHDkvtjEJFLN0O74kTgUY7gkC1OG4QlHLMuwgluRscqCPWf9Wz3kJsk2xQfDaPtIX46BeThpJwA8lT_QYUtGscqBgxx1AIQbNPBnT6JqRcfaIwUbj1Y9UG6mGAEZ_01y9ehbyZQrTcWuFblJDJNVwk7cxII_O9hY_hMxFsSl5Mp-qckVTJpVw3TyQ0vwCLxCXoBaPr_cR1MTE_luL0GOUWGibA/13vDVaEZS0c9Gxzx8WwYMcxQE2P9EMJ7/11) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/ZbBH1xdi7uv8nWBrzKUrX6jqJToHtsQbwQHwm-8CkOGc05V6W-HbUsZBXHrq9JSCSLN3OO7gyW6yJkebNVsNPAwLWcTlIOVoZox6W4t51mMNnoGCS4huks4XIka0oq_brR41lNjjuqM0K_iBR6P98uKRd6uzH0UDwf6Ja-H906SnRQnuH-w1HR4Ui0T345CtOn79vFoEg1OdszhW5zd_R3ePmXAyhiGQuuwa68wva7pA2MpobzEXW0QoPoyQrhD_yhDQjyMYtaAD6CPHUZ5T3TZoeU4vu51BIJUilWq88bXwcY60ya5mUHOf_vm_bkDfdl02qPluIz0JUbTYq3jCbD-oquShUCKz4Qnmzlo-d3wYsG-nMEHFmKBZd6utkJOpiqY6uwB-Ep9oGFD4rxlzDA2qT7TZHTO-1-xJA-JtElCJ5yCR8mJikRM5Z85TRYHwY-g0eMMT5n_vOI5TqP0_dCliqg04u091voef_Zb0YZ2Hfprz9WjaGh4LlquqDsuNL-Ht86wTv6MqhFNlRMioyZby09ly04cfPumy5nVDwNZlD7mwXyOd3E2m8pyYBKU3OUngpm0tHqUMtIKTW0hay75enI57vUSYruInYk3_yJ4Q8hZk3IahvjBKp_hXm9Baui2SNr70jVzMw2kZI0PI6LIBJCW2AJzHgUmNSWWoEgq_9cOSo_NJfqw1stLVyVmXmBtaSzIypMKBNuHWEby3hmKygG-dPDt1uA/C1Sb-7PbW5UHVtWZWvlzzW3AsE1dizsF/11)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/5051QCws-CXrc4GH-OkX19EGwaSW8sCXpcZemOO811QPycJX5GJWsD3lmn1Gd7Mj0sb7ZAa55FLCqZ0tZSHLUiFASjHG7XSXQq_HIjlvDhK_tZOoZpS1lGL-RA2uD6M4D5rcNgEr1LBbzwLYmqWvpyCWyQBWesDTtacAbIi8XyZFkNWg0ilTOTsT-vo0Jzk2eA9KsS4dUjAb7vldlVfd4xhSLMQJxBeJ_RR7aG7CbRujNaFrSsYLmq8ixDSA0RC2R-P2dC_H050HmPT52HljPDruZGvJ7S3AJZXOdaE1igtu-wsCm-0hvW847iKRdbgxM-L11sywOLfMp0Q9VJ-R1thBSivaKL2PhzpN0pRme4k-7lFb8PyBShrD-Ksb3JbsB9WNNtdk5VwrWW-BgrS_FtPcsXOCuOlmukRC1YDOASzpnyZDpVmpfQxmWfqGyjWnIncfy8Ff_6HJWXID4cnXaaOCcS6FSkofD9t50ZHBmjnt6mRLSnkQ0fU-q0ZboLP83IjC1Bwgvx-IhDZX6AoSE1xr8BoADzRBU65QJNRqn_h_ZOZEr7jMcbU-NTUFzRX2O_iYp179mI4DbrjP81EEa6XmJtM0hwCsqBW6dJfrqk3TskkAk0RlCb05NFrWRZnX99_pUc4IcpNVU-wFdjrzqXVeIJI_I_YUuWsb1YpTT1SAdXugzT-jX4t2q6BuJjNUYEL094RLg3WJ44WdTxlyPfJ0EkfmtJ7mzA/rXEEiqFaD5Cr-2LGTSbCa9jZixrF8Ly6/11)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

clean_body: Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. | | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this | | | | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested. Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America. The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution. But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench. Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda? Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda. As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a Boston Globe op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats." What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic? Please share your thoughts with me using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away. Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: You might not know this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4911%2E35263%2EekWryN)
Peter, something you might not know about me is that I was diagnosed with a serious illness as a child. Fortunately, after spending three months in the hospital, I was able to recover. After I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began to search for an insurance policy to make sure I was protected in case I ever got sick again. But they couldn’t find one. At any price. From any insurer. All because of my previous illness, and these two words: **_“pre-existing condition.”_** **I got into public service because I watched my grandparents make enormous sacrifices to pay for my health care out of pocket.** I’ll never forget what it was like to watch them stay up late at night, worrying that if I fell ill again, they wouldn’t be able to afford the care to help me get better. No one should ever have to worry about things like that. But I know that I’m not alone in this experience. 133 million Americans know what it's like to live with the label "pre-existing condition" attached to our care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage for that exact reason. That’s why I’ve championed health care reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. **Now, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition — and these policy changes have helped millions more Americans access the insurance they need.** But our work is far from over, Peter. Donald Trump has signed into law a policy passed by Republicans in both the House and Senate that will make people sicker, make health care less affordable, and hand a tax break to the wealthiest people in the country. Trump and Republicans’ cuts are going to cause more than 250,000 Wisconsinites to lose their health care in the next 10 years, and that's just not right. It's more important than ever that we defend Wisconsin and take back the Democratic majority in the Senate. **[I’ll never stop fighting to defend affordable health care, but I can’t do this work alone. Will you make a contribution to help me take back our Senate majority and undo the chaos caused by extreme Republicans?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4438?c0=stb-em-aug25.KUWn1c&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4911%2E35263%2EekWryN)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-aug25.L5mwgg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4911%2E35263%2EekWryN)

name: Becky Edwards
subject: It's Time to Vote
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC
body:
Have you made a plan to vote in your municipal primary?

| | | | | [|
---](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=2b0c2247ff&e=6484bb6dd5)
| | | | | Dear Friend,
Utah’s municipal primary elections are just a few days away, and Governing Group needs your help to get principled, thoughtful candidates in races across the state into the general election.
In these crucial final days, your donation lets us help candidates:
* Knock doors in their district to connect directly with undecided voters
Send personalized texts and make targeted phone calls to get out the vote
Create and promote compelling social media content that reaches and inspires potential supporters
Put proven outreach strategies into action to help secure victory on Election Day

We need your help to get these candidates across the finish line. Will you chip in $10, $50, or $100 today to help us elect the best leaders for communities across Utah?
---
| [DONATE](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=0ee39582e1&e=6484bb6dd5)
---
| Another important way to help is to fill out your ballot and vote in your city’s municipal primary election.
Election Day is Tuesday, August 12th, and ballots must be **received** by the county clerk**** no later than 8 PM that day. This is a change from previous years, when ballots only needed to be postmarked by Election Day.
The best way to make sure your ballot arrives on time is to use a ballot dropbox, rather than mailing it.[ Find a dropbox here. ](https://beckyforutah.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9cc818aa94e94ffd36a8547b3&id=687878d70e&e=6484bb6dd5)
Thank you for your support and your civic engagement. Together, we can elevate the voices of those who want to do the hard work of governing.
With gratitude,Becky
---
|
---
|
#### PAID FOR BY GOVERNING GROUP PAC

subject: It’s you and me, Friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor

I wrote this for you _specifically_ , Friend!

Governor Glenn Youngkin, AG Jason Miyares, and I pulled off an incredible victory in 2021. We flipped the three major offices in in virginia - that's no small feat! Each of us owes a debt of gratitude to phenomenal patriots like _**YOU**_ , Friend!

I can't thank you enough for all your help and support so far. I'm not exaggerating one bit when I tell you that we **COULD NOT** have won without you. Without support from folks like you, we wouldn't have been able to turn Virginia into a strong and conservative Commonwealth.

I'm writing to you today because I need your help and support once again. I'm running for Governor to keep up the great work we've been doing for the past few years. My Democrat opponent, Abigail Spanberger, has a _serious_ cash advantage. **Liberal groups are cutting her checks for half a _MILLION_ dollars and Hollywood Leftists are injecting her campaign coffers with unheard-of sums of money.**
---
**Listen Friend, I don 't have liberal groups and Hollywood Democrats propping up my campaign. __I 'm 100% relying on support from grassroots patriots like YOU!__ **

subject: Texas Democrats risked everything for our democracy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
Derek, it’s Beto O’Rourke here. Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. **They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote.** And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for. Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. Only if we all contribute what we can will they have the resources to keep up the fight. clean_body: Derek, it’s Beto O’Rourke here. Republicans have drawn new congressional maps designed to take five Democratic-held seats in Texas—not by earning more votes, but by manipulating the system to lock in GOP power ahead of the 2026 midterm elections. But Texas Democrats didn’t take this sitting down. They just broke quorum to prevent Republicans from having enough members present to hold a vote. And they didn’t do it for headlines. They did it because they believe—just like I do—that the people, not politicians, should choose their leaders. They did it because our democracy is worth fighting for. Texas Democrats are making incredible sacrifices. They need our help. name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: Can I be candid?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250808-664&t=1001&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=em20250808-664&t=1002&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID ]Abdul for US Senate

Hey Peter,

Can I be candid for a moment?

We’re losing young men. To apathy, cynicism, and a version of politics
that tells them their strength lies in cruelty instead of compassion.

The Democratic Party hasn’t done a good job of showing young men that it’s
worth their vote, and MAGA politicians will keep using their twisted
version of masculinity to radicalize and recruit.

This is something we need to face head-on.

Because if we’re serious about rebuilding a coalition that can win,
govern, and fix this broken system, then we must reach the folks we’ve
left behind — and I think I might be uniquely positioned to speak to young
men.

I’m a former athlete. I roast my own coffee and host a podcast. I love
weightlifting, and even got my wife, Sarah, into it!

Look, I’m not pretending to be anyone’s savior, but I know what it’s like
to be one of the guys. And I know what kind of politics we’re up against.

First, we have to listen to what’s frustrating them.

Not just the surface-level stuff, but the deep anger at a system that
promised opportunity and didn’t deliver. The politicians who said “work
hard and play by the rules” but shipped jobs overseas while raking in
stock market profits. The culture that treats them like they’re a problem
to be solved, not people to be welcomed.

Then, we need to offer a vision worth believing in — a politics where
young men see themselves in the future we’re fighting for.

That means building an economy where a good job can actually support a
family. Fighting for guaranteed healthcare so no one has to skip the
doctor or drown in debt. Holding the billionaires and corporations
accountable for rigging the system while telling us to blame each other.

This is how we bring young men into our coalition. With honesty. With
empathy. And with the courage to say: We need you with us.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250808-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250808-664&refcode2=664_251025_GbgwID&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID ]If you agree with that, I hope you’ll chip in $10 today.
This campaign is 100% people-powered by folks like you, believing we can
build something better together.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-ms-aes-20250808-1-ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250808-664&refcode2=664_251025_GbgwID&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

P.S. If you’ve got a young man in your life — a son, a nephew, a coworker,
a friend — forward them this email. Let them know there’s a home for them
here. Not because we’re trying to win votes, but because we’re trying to
build a country they can thrive in.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1003&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1004&akid=664%2E251025%2EGbgwID

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

# Bank of America Just Warned the Dollar Could Collapse — Here's What You Need to Know
**A hidden crisis is brewing. Here’s what you need to know to survive it.** Dear Patriot, In a chilling forecast, Bank of America has just issued a warning that every **American should take seriously** : **The U.S. dollar is on the verge of collapse.** For years, experts have quietly whispered about America’s GROWING debt, our inflation crisis, and politicians reckless spending—but now one of the biggest banks on Earth is openly sounding the alarm. Bank of America analysts predict a historic decline in the dollar’s value—**threatening your savings, retirement accounts, and the very foundation of your financial future.** And the numbers don’t lie:
* The U.S. is adding **$1 trillion in debt every 100 days**
* Global investors are fleeing the dollar in record numbers
* Confidence in America’s currency is at a **20-year low**

If the dollar crashes, everything changes. Grocery prices could skyrocket. Retirement savings could vanish. Your hard-earned wealth could evaporate overnight. But you still have time to**take control** —if you act before the collapse accelerates. That’s why many Americans are moving their money into **physical gold and precious metals** —a time-tested store of value that has survived every financial crisis in history. Protect your wealth today. name: Laura Friedman
subject: I want your input, friend.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laura Friedman for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112979507/562243150/-1623651544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWMxZjk4NmEtN2Y3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=VKHrJAbaFGyaCUGgzSzf7gPzj-h4Tg8XmXaiDTF5mtY=) Friend, It might be “recess” in the House, but our work doesn’t stop. This movement is only as strong as the people behind it, and I'm humbled that this community has entrusted me to hear their concerns and deliver results in Congress. I value the feedback of my supporters and constituents, so I wanted to ask you: As we embark on another month of the Trump administration -- and as I lead the fight against unauthorized ICE raids and cuts to Medicaid and Planned Parenthood -- I am interested in what other challenges you want to see addressed in Congress. [**Please take a moment to share your thoughts about our campaign, the issues we face as a nation, or anything else that's on your mind. | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need Democrats to come together and ensure Ohio has a BIG grassroots movement to combat their attacks. | | | | | Thank you, Blue Amp Action | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Action PAC PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

name: VoteVets
subject: “It wasn’t that easy for me either.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump can’t help but insult the Military, Veterans, their families, and the sacrifices they make. Maybe that’s why there are so many Veterans signing up with VoteVets to run for elected office?
#
This guy seriously can’t stop.
Trump hosted 100 Purple Heart recipients at the White House yesterday. 100 people who were wounded in combat defending the United States. And still, Trump couldn’t avoid making it about himself.
Trump: “It wasn’t easy for me either.” Please, just shut the hell up already.
Don’t forget, this is Captain Bone Spurs. He called dodging STDs in the 1980s his “personal Vietnam.” “I feel like a great and very brave soldier.”
Same guy who skipped out on attending a memorial service for fallen Americans at a cemetery in France because of a little rain.
“Nobody’s done more for the military than me.”
“I like people who weren’t captured.”
Trump can’t help but insult the Military, Veterans, their families, and the sacrifices they make. Maybe that’s why there are so many Veterans signing up with VoteVets to run for elected office?
Trump and the MAGA Right are showing their true colors when it comes to honoring service members. And this election cycle, we’ve got an ace up our sleeve.
Literally thousands of Veterans from every service and every part of this country are going to run and win this year and next because Trump can’t stop attacking the Military, our democracy, and everything that actually makes America great.
**VoteVets is going to make sure these Veterans are victorious.** And if that sounds worth a donation to you, please:
[**Chip in $5 and help us defeat Republicans up and down the ballot next November.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-august25.hEpWPc&refcode=em250808-1-60&t=1&akid=34513%2E3013755%2E1klxOC)

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: re: Texas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
Friends , are you following what’s going on in Texas?
Republicans are attempting to draw new congressional maps in the middle of an election cycle to gerrymander five more seats for themselves.
Why? Because they know they’re losing. Their policies are so unpopular that they can’t build real public support – and now they’re feeling the political consequences.
But Democrats are fighting back. Most of Texas’s 62 Democratic state representatives fled Texas over the weekend – effectively preventing the Texas House from being able to move forward on their scheme. (They need at least 100 of the 150 total members present to conduct legislative business).
These brave lawmakers left their families and homes to stop Donald Trump’s latest scheme – and while they shouldn’t have had to do that, it’s exactly the kind of energy today’s GOP requires.
They try to pull stunts like this? We pull out ALL the stops to block them.
I’m grateful to these Texas lawmakers for taking action, even with the threat of fines and arrest. If you’d like to support them, you can chip in to the Texas House Democratic Caucus here. [https://riggedredistricting.com/]
SUPPORT TEXAS DEMS [https://riggedredistricting.com/]
While Republicans scheme to rig the map, I’m still focused on taking back the House in 2026.
We’re supporting incumbent Democrats who are defending their seats, Democratic challengers looking to flip red seats, and of course I’ve got my own re-election campaign to win, too.
If you want to be a part of this work, please consider chipping in today. Donating what you can, when you can is one of the most impactful ways you can help win the midterms and flip the House. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em]
One more thing: Here in California, we’re watching Texas very, very closely – and I can promise you if this shameful power grab continues, we WILL do something about it.
Thanks for reading.
–Sara

California’s 51st District

name: Crow HQ
subject: Republicans are focused on all the wrong things
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Let’s be honest, team: Republicans in Congress are focused on all the wrong things.

They’re busy handing out tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy, covering up Donald Trump’s involvement with Epstein, and doing everything they can to avoid accountability.

Meanwhile, Jason Crow is focused on what actually matters, like making life more affordable and livable for everyday people.

Because right now? Housing costs are out of control. Groceries are way too expensive. Gas prices, health care, child care... they’re all unaffordable.

People are frustrated as hell, and we can’t blame them. Jason hears their frustrations every time he’s back home in Colorado — and he shares them.

He’s working to bring down costs, fight corporate greed, and make sure every family has a fair shot at the American Dream again. That’s what drives him. Not headlines or partisan games. Real results are what matter.

If you’re with Jason in this fight, will you chip in today and help us keep up the momentum? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-aug2025?amount=]

name: Tobias Read
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Ban phones in public schools?
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250808em-rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250808em-rs]
As Oregon’s Secretary of State and a member of the State Board of Education, I take our state’s K-12 education system extremely seriously.
As parents and educators become increasingly aware of the impact of social media and cell phone usage on students, conversations about the potential need to ban cell phone use in schools have gained momentum.
That’s why I’m reaching out today. I wanted to get your input on this critical question for the future of education and the raising of our kids. Your input is very important to me.
So let me know: Do YOU support banning cell phones in public schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
The work to build a world-class education system for Oregon’s kids is never done.
There will always be more for us to do when it comes to building a public school system Oregon can be proud of — and I’m ready to dig in.
However, with such divisive questions facing our state over the next few years, I wanted to solicit your input on some of the most pressing issues.
So please, spare just a few seconds to let me know where you stand on the issue of cell phones in the classroom. Do you support banning them from our schools? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
ANSWER NOW >> [https://secure.ngpvan.com/x_Fnoahouk6YWF1th3cR3g2]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
Oregon Secretary of State
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

Dear Fellow American, Some elected officials can't take a joke.

And unfortunately, they think they have the power to do something about it.

After the governor of California saw a video parody of a politician, he responded by saying the video should be "illegal." Then the California legislature fast-tracked and passed two bills, banning certain political speech.

_The Babylon Bee_ and other plaintiffs filed a lawsuit against California officials because the bills censor free speech and punish people for posting certain political content online, including political memes and parodies of politicians.

Your voice today can tell government officials you believe the Constitution protects humor whether or not they find it funny.

Will you stand with _The Babylon Bee_?

Click this link and stand with _The Babylon Bee_ today to advance free speech for all: [https://adflegal.org/support/humor-first-amendment-statement](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/YemKHs7FO5qBFPQbWcZ1xE0L8nC7cooloYfy_uhUm4iOF0u-Kvz1Q44_KiVWP1vaOrK54IUYUYAo0S9Jnb0cZncoXMv3RDJgbJd6qV-bIYVFDZNFs0Py6M2t9ExweDQreVGeDMvmVsaDmN19EbsBigGCwZESh5kp_dEmu3mF3T_ET1jD7HDmLOEnMSYnhce3pH8Dy0PMaDUDpnrmGMYHtf4DYQg2dgStz77VSd0Y3AaWs1M7TGR0RffAWVn_3TOrTMn-PPz004sNDDPlujARC5FJNefs9BH74b3dc9ybQ_PL_g4ExQP9KrdlWJcomeUsCabIAwBpCLQfhzdHJ-bZM-gMeHfL79jpKbHN_Zj_A2j_tG-f63kZd-WjqI7lTR9C8EYSVUd3Bt70j95_9OWz6mz78281hLJi2siu5_Y_l0LOnFz0n31jvXrfZX6MLAj2OBEIQZthcqQpZFWBVtuaCgqnxltWHFveaLJF8NZRj588NGyC2dlPqkR8rTBc8z8rYMFQeMcqVUP1rSrCHUiYfr6XNjZWJw084-bro7ka6-_D6oOReI1turPAeYXzDaEvLIZ0jSyLi4FW_VgZ4Zsd4jwd4QopVS2AS8hnc6bZ69ea-jFbNWWTDmgDmr5RqnkT8UCL7tt1pc-agel9WMK-s4XPRoCHGFjiagrjDTIFhLR5Awmp-LuH2tdj50EXtD0LNs9BV7oxHOjg06fHC3t4t97a0Iey6-P7TP1vfHzFwmvgt_E/LI9mscMrfuzvPTTuXQCk8fUaI7V48KYz/11).

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Never thought it would come to this
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I never imagined that somebody who was at the Capitol on January 6th, somebody who yelled “KILL EM” while Capitol Police were getting beaten by rioters would go on to get a senior adviser job at the Department of Justice.
#

Peter,
I was on the House floor on January 6th.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250808-1-160&t=1&akid=3935%2E734936%2EDtmyfc)
I never imagined having to use my training to protect myself and my colleagues that day.
I never imagined I’d be teaching them how to put on a gas mask and regulate their breathing.
I never imagined I’d be helping people get to safety as insurrectionists started streaming into the Capitol.
I never imagined I’d stay behind after the Capitol security came in to do one more sweep for anybody who might have frozen and gone to cocoon somewhere hard to find.
And I’ve got to be honest with you... I never imagined that somebody who was at the Capitol on January 6th, somebody who yelled “KILL EM” while Capitol Police were getting beaten by rioters would go on to get a senior adviser job at the Department of Justice.
But here we are.
If my race for Senate taught me anything it’s that winning is a whole lot better than losing.
These days, when we lose, we really lose. The entire world changes. So for me, that means the most important thing I can do is help our friends in tough campaigns win next year.
**We have to win.** It’s our only chance at stopping this.
I fought in the Marines. I was ready to fight on January 6th. It was a real fight to defeat Kari Lake last year. And now, I am fighting to win the House and Senate in 2026.
[**We’ve got a lot of work ahead of us. If you can chip in anything to help me power this next fight, I’d be extremely grateful.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250808-1-160&t=2&akid=3935%2E734936%2EDtmyfc)
[DONATE](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-aug25.JsYhtJ&refcode=em250808-1-160&t=3&akid=3935%2E734936%2EDtmyfc)
Thanks for the help,
Ruben Gallego

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts. If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=4&akid=3935%2E734936%2EDtmyfc). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=3935%2E734936%2EDtmyfc). name: Democrat Mark Takano
subject: I didn’t stay silent then, and I won’t stay silent now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
The Trump administration has made countless attacks against our veterans and active-duty service members.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93393?refcode=em20250808-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g)
Hi Peter – it’s U.S. Congressman Mark Takano.
Over the past six months, the Trump administration has made countless attacks against our veterans and active-duty service members.
Just last month, it was announced that the Department of Veterans Affairs would be cutting 30,000 positions come September – _the largest staffing cut in VA history._
**These staffing cuts will have catastrophic effects on our veterans and their abilities to access vital services. Ultimately, our veterans will suffer from this decision.**
This decision showcases a disappointing and shocking dismissal of the dedicated workforce that helps serve our nation’s veterans.
**[Please join me in the fight now to protect our veterans' services by splitting a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93393?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93394?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93393?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g)
---
At the start of Trump’s second term, he slashed programs for veterans that prevent housing insecurity and homelessness.
I didn’t stay silent then, and I won’t stay silent now, Peter.
**But I need your help to keep me leading the fight in Congress against Trump’s devastating attacks on our veterans.**
**[Will you join me in fighting back against Trump’s attacks on veterans by splitting a donation between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/93393?refcode=em20250808-9245&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9245%2E614464%2EqLWB8g)**
