body:
As climate change progresses, it’s becoming more critical that snowmelt runoff measurements are accurate.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112981476/562249931/1435897075?refcode=email_080825_snow&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODQzNzUzNS04Mjc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wl6plsp7DLeWYC2gypiBcmWnKVWVwOZYZuHn29CKdxE=&emci=1c1ab996-eb72-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=18437535-8274-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=7280715) Folks, did you know that over 80% of Colorado’s annual surface water supply comes from snowmelt runoff? _And as climate change progresses, it’s only becoming more critical that we accurately predict and measure that runoff year over year._ **[That’s why John is proud to spearhead bipartisan legislation to reauthorize the Snow Water Supply Forecasting Program, improve our ability to monitor snowmelt runoff, and better manage water scarcity in the West. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

subject: Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into Texas Majority PAC
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
#
**FIRST:** Republicans in Texas tried to ram through an undemocratic redistricting scheme—one designed to take five Democratic-held seats.
**THEN:** Texas Democrats fought back. They broke quorum—risking backlash and putting their own political futures on the line—to stop this blatant authoritarian overreach and defend our democracy.
**NOW:** Greg Abbott and Ken Paxton are retaliating. They’ve already threatened fines, arrests, and removal from office, and now **Ken Paxton has launched politically motivated investigations into Powered by People and Texas Majority PAC—just for supporting the Democrats who took a stand.**
Let’s be clear: This is retaliation, plain and simple. They’re trying to intimidate us into silence. But we won’t back down.

That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust. Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

Friends,
We just wrapped another raw, raucous, no-holds-barred episode of _Welcome to the Party, Pal_ --and if you missed it live, trust me, you're gonna want to catch the replay. Joe Walsh and I cover everything from GOP corruption to the fight for a functional democracy, and we don't hold back.
🎙️ Here's what went down:
* **[00:03:00]** We dive straight into the bombshell about J.D. Vance's secret Epstein meeting, Trump's direct cover-up order, and why it's worse than anyone's admitting.
* **[00:05:00]** A raw, honest exchange on Israel-Palestine tensions inside the Democratic Party, where Joe shares what it's like being a pro-Israel Dem, and I challenge us all to have the hard convos.
* **[00:08:00]** We unpack the disturbing secret Epstein meeting with J.D. Vance, Trump's cover-up orders, and the chilling normalization of corruption at the highest levels.
* **[00:18:00]** Gerrymandering, census manipulation, and the terrifying erosion of democratic norms--it's all happening right now, and we break down why it should scare the hell out of you.
* **[00:29:00]** I go in on Alligator Alcatraz and Trump's cruelty toward trans vets--plus why moral clarity and backbone should define our strategy in 2026 and beyond.

This is a must-watch for anyone who cares about reclaiming decency, justice, and actual democracy in America. If you believe in the fight, if you want in on the plan, if you're tired of being afraid--this conversation is essential.

With urgency,
--Mike

Peter, The fight for democracy doesn’t stop at state lines. Right now, Democrats in Texas are taking a stand against one of the most brazen power grabs we’ve seen in recent history. Under Donald Trump’s direction, Texas Republicans are trying to force through a redistricting scheme designed to rig future elections in their favor. As fellow Democrats, we understand what’s at stake here. If they succeed in Texas, you can bet Republicans will use this strategy in other states and attempt to steal the 2026 midterm elections. Republicans want to lock in MAGA control — not just in Texas, but nationwide. But Texas Democrats aren’t backing down. Lawmakers have taken the extraordinary step of leaving the state to block this sham redistricting plan. They’re now facing an onslaught of attacks from Texas Governor Greg Abbott and his far-right allies. They’re holding the line, but they need our help to keep going. clean_body: | = Team, Vivek Ramaswamy recently laid out his plan for Ohio if he were to become governor: make Ohioans pay more so billionaires can pay less. That’s exactly what his megadonors are hoping for. His campaign is bankrolled by right-wing billionaires and backed by Donald Trump – and they’ll spend whatever it takes to buy the future they want for Ohio. While Ohioans are losing healthcare, facing layoffs, and working multiple jobs just to get by, Ramaswamy has been flying around in his $80,000 per month private jet campaigning. He’s shown us exactly who he’s working for, and it isn’t you. We’re fighting back to make sure we can defeat Ramaswamy at the ballot box next year, but unlike him, we’re powered by grassroots supporters like you, not by billionaire checks or special interests. = _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, Ohio Dems = | Ohio Democratic Party PO Box 130 Columbus, Ohio 43216 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112982352/562253109/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODAxMmMyNi04NTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFrZwoVE9wkio_xv_VU83JBi9Ohjit6c5LAQ_N_lcVs=)

Hi Peter, it’s Becca. I have a personal request: **Before you log off for the weekend, can you pitch in $10 or any amount to my campaign? ** Here’s the best link to donate: **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-aug2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112982355/562253141/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODAxMmMyNi04NTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFrZwoVE9wkio_xv_VU83JBi9Ohjit6c5LAQ_N_lcVs=)** I hate asking for your money, Peter. It’s by far my least favorite part of the job, but my team said we're behind on our fundraising. I get it. Times are tough, and people are tired of fundraising emails. But I need your support because I'm not in Washington to play it safe or schmooze with special interests. I'm there to speak truth to power, push back against the authoritarianism coming out of the GOP and the Trump administration, and stand up for working people like you. That's never going to change, and it means that Republicans can make me an easy target. The best way we can push back against that is by showing the strength of our grassroots movement — and every grassroots donation is a show of your support, no matter the amount. **So if you can give today, here’s that link one more time:** **[http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rab-em-aug2025](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112982360/562253149/-289842851?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODAxMmMyNi04NTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFrZwoVE9wkio_xv_VU83JBi9Ohjit6c5LAQ_N_lcVs=)** If not, thank you for reading and keeping up with my campaign. It will take all of us to fight back against Trump’s authoritarianism. Thanks for sticking with me in this fight. In solidarity, Becca
**[beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com](mailto:beccabalintvt@beccabalint.com)** | **Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont**
P.O. Box 291
Burlington, VT 05402

name: Saikat Chakrabarti
subject: See you tomorrow on the doors!
body:
We're going canvassing tomorrow (Saturday). I really hope to see you!

| | | | | [|
---](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=6c831364af&e=bf17056ae8)
| | | | | Dear Friend,I’m so excited to launch our volunteer canvassing operation this Saturday! Since [**our office opening party last week**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=ef43a3d56e&e=bf17056ae8), we’ve had more than EIGHTY people sign up to canvass this Saturday. Which is huge! Usually, you get this kind of activity a week or two before the election – and we’re still nearly a year out from our primary.Although this will be our first volunteer canvass, a bunch of us on the campaign have been knocking on doors over the last month and we’ve learned that this is going to be the way we win this race. We’re talking to a lot of people who usually don’t vote in the primary because they think change is impossible. We’re changing their minds at the doors, and they’re committing to vote.We’re also talking to a lot of people who’ve been voting for Nancy Pelosi for decades – and so many are telling us they’re ready for a change too. They’re grateful for a chance to learn about our campaign.We’ve got our work cut out for us, and it’s pretty simple: we need to reach as many San Franciscans as possible — especially those who may not be super dialed into politics (which is most people!).Knocking on doors is the way to do that.Plus, it’s really fun! You really do meet the most amazing people, and it’s incredible how many want to spend the time to talk with you, which is really something unique about San Francisco. I went canvassing yesterday morning and ended up in a fifteen-minute conversation with someone who works on police accountability with the city and I learned so much. I talked to someone else who hadn’t heard about the campaign, but by the end of our conversation, he was excited to volunteer.For all of you showing up on Saturday, I look forward to meeting you and going out on the doors with you. Come to the office at [**800 Irving St.**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=f9b5c8ba36&e=bf17056ae8) at 11:00 AM!Bring comfortable shoes, a fully-charged phone, and some water. If you can’t make it this Saturday – don’t sweat it. We’ll be doing this every week from now until next November. You can sign up for another day at [**saikat.us/canvass**](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=e93fdf9f19&e=bf17056ae8).
---
| [Sign up for Saturday canvassing](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=9814f461bb&e=bf17056ae8)
---
| See you all soon!Saikat Chakrabarti
(And yes, I really wrote this e-mail!)

---
|
---
| | | | | [](https://saikat.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6ed3ace2702e5b912b1693cee&id=80b94f9164&e=bf17056ae8)

name: Colin Allred
subject: Every American should be alarmed at what's happening in Texas right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112982339/562253023/-570383128?refcode=250808_MFC_Allred_Redistricting1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4M2MyM2FlMC04NDc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1qPLVxkqk9eRb34Y1rrQGvnVAIu8CFDIEB9PMqEDobk=) **Friend: Every American should be alarmed at the GOP's gerrymandering scheme in Texas.** I've been a voting rights lawyer for over 10 years, and this is the most brazen attack on our democracy and attempt to just openly steal congressional seats that I've ever seen. And what did my potential opponent, AG Ken Paxton, say in response to this? He said he would "hunt down" and arrest these Democrats who are standing up for Texans. Tennessee and 24 other states recently [weighed in](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/wDwcVAoDne4Z9iwmWPlf0xABVJqobAVuQKsbUeyRm0VuvWQb-Yvk0xodCWultgG6RcReFeRs3kadRhZh22Z_eKReJ_mbSsCckX9ps6KoG2OWKHzI_2_dAO5dQu4yKgbW8ErwpyGSa5md467-1BfPpRhhvrM86Wk88CM98pyDw-gh0k9rORLPX_00kvmYsVP7CF6-9ZxF90Qu1Gda4hb1xUmpmNmcvkp1OlTemUCdstAyMOI80Tru-Vllk0uwc4C4s76HoxKWuKuhsttZ3AAMS4MWFYWuCbrKKAmOfgcpSf_4Tz7HhfOrmO368vJzqrXpgHUgxmHjokuqDj3d___IH5AmXn0RVUfDRWYrsaekgBfTQdv-Xp0FwPt75q3gW9vHr7AyvoKEEv1rIQ_sT_4MEOg4p8oT2iONoVSsAQ7p6MUlOyySLpA7TtUPqMfE8QHgXtOk2XhacZx3lEX2Hy7XrmwnWeu5ab88pfMji8k6f6agDoOHjh1hTVa81AeiryqxrE6sBWtKcMrVSMdLg4_1ixqOnoLfEcb2_QHamr7DKXuQKQR9WWHtD50OR9PIvG02LEifnuD8xepkiu4Tt9AycFop2sm0KXISg3DOkRlg0VSU_-M86TlV/pCyFOmW88dIUVPNzf-VfKCAHGYd13759/11) on President Trump’s executive order to stop butchering kids—what a concept, right? [evidence](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/OIK3oh3DPxvTmJRb562F7sEXlQqgr0dlFDEHL3ODtKkmvSTf5xvwKC9X7iQTTwUUkJ4jbUy_DFRyuXTLxkVONcFjY1O4s8KdUdlXG5NKIG19y7hupWVH917_gOXp_XNOuGmoQgTAnz7ZbWEb26eskNQxXXConKMhXfx__nYARSjF2RJ7DATUdi3iE3dTyPcZeyBzLvBQkbm7bM-w04iwJtUgoLzCK0jxJPnVv8dMP0sEBzPtliBUFTlg7cMvp1i1ZgAeSNIKV7OsTzXqgVv2HZ4qI7BqmdoST5R0OF-xlSNhigq0OU3gdwqvfZSijpEHXLU2mISY0aVdocsS6lgPYHU-APDdbwIxbIABdN7sDUZ0iSC6p4vBkwoQnwnENBkOGPq4g0lqmq4lmxqzp07R4m4CfjzQsspRqr6tohLZDw4srZTMLYRUjCRv8bOI06uYRSq_RA94nAyh5zmtLNNFNZhNB0t7CkF2ROrWyhRSwK-DYEffHjULMmGfTd9VVmM3ddG4pHTOmIUwU7qzhpG0H9dxBlhEOk6FShww6DPSTbgy/WV8UdUTy53e4DEXtyDE8Vzur10_sJPLY/11) is mounting, and [brave victims](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/uu-hAO9svAi0WEDZWxNv_JCceoVD_UOmL05HfPWWk_JVRFaxaEeEYFBl89F6OIqF4Hm5l3KS_sQmV3sBPcc87cSsDaPsmveubmZfRpovZMN9IvBvoDbjblpw5LRjpYhUFEUvshTXiSZpu37R19WA-Ua91XSnjK7ACNtIea_rxO1YmCRtk7eqkv139x8GBb6WUxNZ9LBgYNtoFHgQSiYrCgwMEmOZZqW2DEPdITNn-OJCctH5ah2NOAy2HDa6eV2ogRzxuPcEhF65oWOE5uRJeQZBRdoJZbF3p1GnaBH1HcjshcLbnESlZMG8MJwYqY-LjGVbhOxygJzaMMS8csQB7SNQ14EDlmavgBeIar_bC6sLvM-Rrf8NTgvKB8lrSCnJ_o2Lk6uw-672L8carxu7EVIwhOWpdIvVFhGhuVTllGlQM4NttQpUazb_cdO9OzWOP3mIdffYZSDhMqO5AAlEeYV_ui_SPXOBSuz2iYRbsTT9r7aosH8gP94OWZwbTZLPC8rWvUWC2Uucy-wOz_aqDnBCGdF3cY0zOB7aTmKTXun5MnqDaLShy0bPCgu2C9_ghTvdxBkHqljB5NRIa8RLjhPVASQvOWc4qbZLAx1evxeIFfQ/zeZ3dm78FYLtWDjBdxKPGu8RAKwB76cq/11) are stepping forward to warn parents about their own experiences being manipulated by activist lies. They drank the Kool-Aid during their most vulnerable years—and now they have to live with a lot of regret. To be honest, it really makes you wonder where the grown-ups were when these kids needed someone to say, “this isn’t right.” The radical Left doesn’t give a rip about what’s right or wrong—and they sure don’t need facts to push their nonsense. All they care about is forcing their agenda on the rest of America, no matter the cost. Imagine being so deranged that you’re yelling in the streets, [fighting for the right](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/II3yiU6yb5nV4tBmfgAcgXqw_7LMZ5pE8d-1sZkv299iNC5twq_R3Tlfrc3WdOY1uUotElplvSkmto_gm_dgGqH-hHacZ4jfw_lsDPxJnebkq7z1iryE4ZYvI9uO-t74N-5uli3vR7xLkNqKKx4YAebkFDsXynfSZ3p5opEFP0u9S25GaF_k8f7rJt89Oi6hMG089ooQWps_mdLuIPsd1LRXtwq5HZ9-po0-t120sDruBBkunVWdHDc1VLD5XQx-fdlMUhdV_CT91c2H_t8LnhjKmDjcauchkiY9qO7OgZJULPTXcBk0M_IZZyQPIXbTT_DSYwBH_krrsTdm5Ej7uk1SBBtwuO1-jqxvZ3L0oR8_wb2L0CLdt7VpL7Nbu_Ix9bWQEeVOnx-xF_fCr4aCixs5FvN4mtI24rqjFI_5UjVtWCpirlYt03s8XoJkTolhJploJXHMIYEUjtRjfNSQ6zKO3BRO7kOiogCioBoa3imPAHFWeH34uOi_AOCED3krAHJLWXhElxd5t8-rUx54ablvutL94dS9MnXN1AiQ1vRtg7vKq_37VgpT7TVkUnu6H-tpKikg740w0QC1AOVmKOCQgUpD5kHHVuUAIk_B3A/AntWMzIUUUcUpA3Z0lLIDp55Ge36Jrhq/11) to butcher children. This is exactly why they [lost the American people](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/5mZWq9axVuB_zQjBzYqmKgGTfDis9TI_hiR0BeOgqYt5xWyluZkyDrJemmXswjWNRh5DuzE8HR_fEX9OHxO-PBADAcVetMMDRLP5PE3JgRECcp54nTs7ZBNh9i5_-LGceTdNx1leIxWSGIweVaaJc8TkPRT_HLdhPtnug8_DNwHky5C7nQhFVmzUejsFgScpCax-xZrZ7-5vsacUbn5c6VnuDl7sqrvgVMEaIKDQMuPTdYwFW1wAdWaOeXaHzh-fx88GVvyq3hIM8JNJJwTyU3Y0V21uIKQrFXUy9BJDJo9cJAJm8h71cl4Bc6PF5tzejlKK_w8YRwYtJgisG5JxIVEkqp9GjSXqU72N4JehCzwyxK8wQXt56KO9XX6lWdasVgGgjlSiX9qFlhqMj8Suw3TKP2HldzzqudH9ajVgskfVNeYo8fgA4tYmpK85qOFLpdU9CnvNPPwQJTAAj0wzqCPlNx0KI2jSWdqy1-AprkJ5kTm1E22pZVMqTLaN7oJ0MikYApfJUSE9bwp8NzyeCPMZVxIghPHTCSclhwcnbSzbqNKvwmAkqkMJHefU7r2tnhmxBKmfHJ6RvJyPGIGN3GpVBrSzQr3ugj9YSc-Lh6CSCe8yFgqNIB8kOo1QKLmSYNcpk80B0AdW2mItoAKHr7qjQAVsvNorPjguOaa5pX34jR54GpaxnDrEH9Y51jXgkaU_ZRw/ar2n6yaJe0VAO8yUOUu7uS-jKtdw8chv/11), but somehow the landslide didn’t teach them a dadgum thing. They’re still ready to double down on something that’s reckless and wrong. All we’re saying is this: No more surgeries, no more hormones, no more puberty blockers. Just let kids be kids until they’re 18. And yet, we’re the ones being called extremists? Give me a break. Protecting young people from irreversible medical experiments when their brains aren’t even fully formed is plain old common sense. If you ask me, we have a _responsibility_ to save our kids from this garbage. I stand with President Trump, with Tennessee, and with every American fighting for our kids—so let the liberals rage on. I’m completely confident you and I are on the right side of history.

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | The Fight To Protect Our Kids 💪 | | | | This is a big win, folks. Tennessee and 24 other states recently on President Trump’s executive order to stop butchering kids—what a concept, right? It may , but it sends a clear message: Leave our children alone. Some hospitals were already backing away from “gender-affirming care” because the is mounting, and are stepping forward to warn parents about their own experiences being manipulated by activist lies. They drank the Kool-Aid during their most vulnerable years—and now they have to live with a lot of regret. To be honest, it really makes you wonder where the grown-ups were when these kids needed someone to say, “this isn’t right.” The radical Left doesn’t give a rip about what’s right or wrong—and they sure don’t need facts to push their nonsense. All they care about is forcing their agenda on the rest of America, no matter the cost. Imagine being so deranged that you’re yelling in the streets, to butcher children. This is exactly why they , but somehow the landslide didn’t teach them a dadgum thing. They’re still ready to double down on something that’s reckless and wrong. All we’re saying is this: No more surgeries, no more hormones, no more puberty blockers. Just let kids be kids until they’re 18. And yet, we’re the ones being called extremists? Give me a break. Protecting young people from irreversible medical experiments when their brains aren’t even fully formed is plain old common sense. If you ask me, we have a responsibility to save our kids from this garbage. I stand with President Trump, with Tennessee, and with every American fighting for our kids—so let the liberals rage on. I’m completely confident you and I are on the right side of history. | | Trekking Across The District 🫡 | | | | There’s no shortage of action around Tennessee these days! My schedule has been across the state—and I’m loving every minute of it. From talks with the and to stopping by and American-made to recognizing some of our , I’ve met so many great folks over the past few days. I know I probably left a couple visits out, but just know that I’m grateful for each handshake. I love hearing all about what’s grinding your gears back here at home, and as I’ve said before, I take it all back to the sewer with me to fight for what you care about. Peter,

**After Amy Klobuchar backed away from facing my People-First Movement in 2026, there have been five likely contenders to emerge. I don’t care who I face; I know it’s GAME, SET, MATCH.**

clean_body: Game, Set, Match | Peter, After Amy Klobuchar backed away from facing my People-First Movement in 2026, there have been five likely contenders to emerge. I don’t care who I face; I know it’s GAME, SET, MATCH. But we need to start RIGHT NOW. From my days playing in Division 1 College Basketball and the NBA, I know the most important factor of success is KNOWING YOUR OPPONENTS and STUDYING THE FILM! So, let’s dive into each of these Radical Leftists... As the Governor of Minnesota, Walz has become one of the MOST RADICAL Leftists in American history. Just to name a few examples – he allowed Minneapolis to BURN DOWN during the BLM riots with ZERO consequences, expanded DEI throughout the state, and put illegals over Minnesotans. We all know how wacky and weird he is from his Vice Presidential run, and DON’T EVEN GET ME STARTED ON HIS WHITE LIBERAL WIFE! Ilhan Omar is a Leftist that I’m all too familiar with. I ran against her in 2022 for her Congressional seat, which was also my first-ever campaign. I could write a NOVEL about how TERRIBLE she is, but I’ll keep it brief. She consistently puts Somalians over Americans, called Republicans “stupid” and “idiots,” and is one of the founding and lead members of the most radical and progressive caucus – The Squad. I’ve learned A LOT about campaigning since I faced her, and I know she won’t win the rematch. From domestic abuse to borderline malpractice, Attorney General Keith Ellison has allowed Minnesota to become a waste haven of CRIME. Unlike me, Ellison has become a slave and servant to the Radical Left’s propaganda. His Deep State puppets tell him to jump, and he asks, “How high?” He was the Attorney General during the Minnesota BLM riots; that’s all you need to know (other than he domestically abused his ex-girlfriend). Congresswoman Angie Craig is a pathological liar who dissuaded voters into electing her in 2024, making them think she’s pro-Trump. She was at risk of LOSING to Republican Joe Teirab in a district that TRUMP WON! She temporarily turned her back on Minnesota Democrats in a desperate attempt to latch onto power, and she’s already back to opposing the America-First Movement. The Tulsi Gabbard wannabe won’t be able to use those same tactics against me. I’ll make sure ALL THE PEOPLE know where her loyalties really lie – with Barack Obama and his Radical Leftist clowns. Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan’s role model is Pocahontas, AKA Elizabeth Warren. She’s a White Liberal Woman who claims Native-American descent in order to bolster her DEI standing in the Radical Left’s sphere of influence. She’ll be my EASIEST opponent to defeat. The picture above should tell you all you need to know. She was in line to assume the Governor’s Office if Kamala and Tim Walz won, and now she’s ITCHING for more power over Minnesotans. If she runs, it’s GAME, SET, MATCH. After running for office twice, I learned a lot about how these campaigns and elections work. The odds are stacked against me. The Left controls the Media and has billionaire Deep State donors to support them. I don’t care who I face; I’m confident I’ll win no matter what. Minnesotans are waking up. I may not be “electable,” but the word “electable” is a SHAM word. “Electable” Republicans have been trying to take down the Left in Minnesota for years, but it hasn’t worked. We need someone who isn’t afraid to mince words and hold back. We need a free-thinking Black Republican who will NEVER be a slave or servant to the Left. All I need now is your support. Godspeed, Royce White | Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. - PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
...from Big Pharma, the fossil fuel industry, and the mega-donors who put profit over people. And I’m damn proud of it!
If you agree and are ready to put money where the fight is, chip in today—because they’ve got deep pockets, but we’ve got determination. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250808_Zilch_actrs]
JOIN THE FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250808_Zilch_actrs]
When I decided to run for Congress, I knew I wouldn’t accept a cent from Big Pharma or Big Oil...That’s why this campaign counts on grassroots supporters—people like you, our neighbors, our community. And it’s your support that keeps us moving forward. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250808_Zilch_actrs]
Here’s what that fight looks like:
I’m taking on Big Pharma by working to ban their direct-to-consumer advertising, which they use to justify jacking up the prices of medication. These ads are a billion-dollar industry for pharmaceutical companies, and much of their profits go toward promotion. This ban would help ensure medical decisions are made between patients and their doctors based on what works, not on who spends the most on advertising.
I’m standing up to Trump’s cruel deportation policies by demanding due process for Oregon families taken by ICE and CBP. When officials kidnapped Kilmar Abrego Garcia, I flew to El Salvador to demand his due process rights. I co-sponsored legislation to expand health coverage for families regardless of immigration status, and I pushed to block federal funds from going to Trump’s cruel ICE quotas.
I’m leading the charge for universal, accessible health care—including the right to abortion. While Donald Trump and his allies just pushed through the biggest Medicaid cut in history, I co-sponsored a bill to let states build and fund their own universal health care systems. And I co-sponsored another bill to stop states from blocking people who travel to access abortion care—because my daughter shouldn’t have fewer rights than her grandmother did.
Here’s the truth: we brought in nothing from the industries ripping off our communities because that’s exactly how I want it. But if we’re going to keep taking on these power players and winning, we need you in our corner.
This campaign runs on people power, not corporate cash. Chip in before tonight at midnight and show them that real change comes from the ground up. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250808_Zilch_actrs]
CHIP IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q3?refcode=x_250808_Zilch_actrs]
I can't be bought,
Maxine

name: Mark Kelly
subject: It’s time to stop stock trading in Congress, once and for all
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Most Democrats and Republicans agree that it’s wrong for members of Congress to trade stocks. The truth is a lot of people in Congress agree, too.
#

Team — I’m not going to take up too much of your time on this, because I’m pretty sure we’re already aligned on it.
Most Democrats and Republicans agree that it’s wrong for members of Congress to trade stocks. The truth is a lot of people in Congress agree, too. There’s a bill moving through the Senate that would ban congressional stock trading as we speak, and I want to make sure it passes.
There’s a lot wrong with politics, but this is something we can fix.
And if you agree with me, please: [**Add your name to tell Congress that they need to pass this bill and stop lining their pockets by trading stocks with insider information.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks_em_aug25/?source=em250808-1-600&refcode2=6146.6688874.4NUxvg&akid=6146%2E6688874%2E4NUxvg)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/stocks_em_aug25/?source=em250808-1-600&refcode2=6146.6688874.4NUxvg&akid=6146%2E6688874%2E4NUxvg)**
Thanks a lot,
Mark

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6146%2E6688874%2E4NUxvg).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

As you read this, Donald Trump and his allies are giving big polluters free rein to poison our communities while undoing nearly every piece of climate progress we've fought so hard for in Washington.
That’s what drives my fight every single day:
👉 Kids in Black and Brown communities forced to grow up thinking pollution is “normal”.
👉 Families watching their neighbors get sicker and sicker.
👉 Parents fearing their children will inherit a toxic, unlivable future, all so a handful of fossil fuel executives can get richer.
These corporate polluters are already coming after my seat, folks. They know that if they flip districts like mine, there’ll be no one left in their way.
**That's exactly why JanePAC has my back — and why I’m asking you to have ours. Because when we protect leaders who can’t be bought, we protect the communities corporate polluters are trying to sacrifice.**
**[I wouldn’t be asking again if it weren’t absolutely necessary: Will you split a contribution between my campaign and JanePAC today? By Jacqueline Garretson, Opinion Contributor

As Pritzker offers sanctuary to runaway Democrats, Illinois conservatives stay silent.

While Democrat lawmakers from Texas flee their responsibilities in a calculated political stunt, where do they seek refuge? Right here in Illinois — under the wing of Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker, a man whose name is synonymous with corruption, cronyism and political manipulation.

Let’s be clear: these lawmakers aren’t camping out in some middle-of-the-road motel. They’re staying at a luxury location owned by Wyndham Hotels, a corporation whose top shareholders include BlackRock and Vanguard — the same globalist powerhouses pushing DEI, child mutilation, suppressing American energy and funding the woke corporate takeover. This isn’t just political theater — it’s a full-blown play funded by elites, staged in Illinois and protected by the very governor who’s turned this state into a fortress for the far Left.

And yet we ask: Where are the Republican leaders in Illinois?

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/08/il-gop-governor-candidate-james-mendrick-on-democratic-texas-lawmakers-who-fled-theyre-not-criminals.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=e6a18b30b1-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823
(James Mendrick for Governor / Facebook)
By Illinois Review

The western suburbs of Chicago have become an unexpected focal point in a national political standoff, as Texas Democratic lawmakers take refuge at a secure hotel in St. Charles, Illinois.

Their departure from Texas was a strategic move to block a Republican-backed redistricting bill, prompting Republican Governor Greg Abbott to order their arrest.

On Tuesday, DuPage County Sheriff James Mendrick – a Republican candidate for governor – told Politico that the lawmakers “aren’t criminals.”

Since this publication first revealed the lawmakers’ location late Monday, Mendrick has been fielding calls questioning why, in his role as sheriff, he hasn’t taken action.

“They aren’t criminals,” Mendrick reiterated to reporter Shia Kapos. “People hear the rhetoric and that’s when the calls come in.”

Twitter () Facebook () IllinoisReview.com () Opinion: As Pritzker Plays Host to Runaway TX Democrats, IL Republican Leaders Play Dead () Ill. Gov. JB Pritzker and Texas Democrats hold a press conference in the suburbs of Chicago on Aug. 3. (JB Pritzker / X) By Jacqueline Garretson, Opinion Contributor As Pritzker offers sanctuary to runaway Democrats, Illinois conservatives stay silent. While Democrat lawmakers from Texas flee their responsibilities in a calculated political stunt, where do they seek refuge? Right here in Illinois — under the wing of Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker, a man whose name is synonymous with corruption, cronyism and political manipulation. Let’s be clear: these lawmakers aren’t camping out in some middle-of-the-road motel. They’re staying at a luxury location owned by Wyndham Hotels, a corporation whose top shareholders include BlackRock and Vanguard — the same globalist powerhouses pushing DEI, child mutilation, suppressing American energy and funding the woke corporate takeover. This isn’t just political theater — it’s a full-blown play funded by elites, staged in Illinois and protected by the very governor who’s turned this state into a fortress for the far Left. And yet we ask: Where are the Republican leaders in Illinois? name: Keith Ellison
subject: Protecting Minnesotans
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Donald Trump has spent his first eight months in office attacking Minnesotans. But I’m fighting back.

Just recently, we achieved two major victories fighting back against the illegal actions Trump took to block birthright citizenship and freeze funding for our students.

Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund.

We’re just getting started, but I know that this crucial work can’t be done without the support of people like you. Can I count on you to make a fully refundable $75 donation and help me continue to protect Minnesotans?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25] CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?refcode=other]

I’m proud to say we took Trump to court and won. Blocking his attacks on birthright citizenship and restoring education funding weren’t just legal victories—they were moral ones.

But the attacks keep coming. Trump and his billionaire allies keep trying to rig the rules for themselves—and it’s our most vulnerable neighbors who end up paying the price.

This fight won’t be easy. But I have your back—and I always will.
Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250807ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]

The Justice Department says Taylor Adam Lee, who held a [...]

# **[Walz Post Memory Of Him With Harris](http://trk.libertyledger._c2V5aWQ9In0/DCkqiEoSRbpm8vGSgB2cZQ)**
---
You’d think after the electoral curb-stomping Democrats took in 2024, the last thing they’d want to do is remind America of the charred remains of the Kamala Harris–Tim Walz campaign — a campaign so poorly run, so tone-deaf, and so internally divided that even the party’s most loyal strategists have all but sworn it off [...]

# **[Judge Blocks California Online Video Law](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Well, well, well — the First Amendment just delivered a little reality check to California’s favorite authoritarian, Gavin Newsom, and it came in the form of a smackdown from a federal judge who still remembers what the Constitution actually says. In a sharp rebuke to Newsom and his crew of speech-policing crusaders, U.S. District Judge [...]

# **[Mass Governor Comments On Texas](http://trk.libertyledger._A)**
---
Everyone, take a deep breath. Grab a cold one. Maybe put on a little Kenny G if it helps you relax. Because once again, we’ve got a classic case of a Northeastern liberal trying way too hard to stay relevant in a political fight she doesn’t understand — and shouldn’t be sticking her nose into [...]

# **[Hegseth Announces Return Of Memorial At Arlington National Cemetery](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth made it official on Tuesday: “The Reconciliation Monument,” a controversial Confederate-era statue by Moses Ezekiel, will be returning to its longtime home at Arlington National Cemetery. Hegseth didn’t sugarcoat the announcement. Posting on X, he called the statue “beautiful and historic” and slammed the Pentagon’s 2023 decision to remove it, blaming [...]

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985142/562262459/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRlZjk3NzEtOGI3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2uNHTI4NCVGMjE4Fjup5g7h6vEUx9Lv6vNF2SWxWRwQ=)
---
Dear friend, If we want to win in 2026, we need to act now and invest in what actually works. 2024 was tough for Democrats, and it’s clear we can’t keep throwing money at strategies that fail. So, let’s talk about what worked last year. Last year marked the third cycle in a row wherein native voters across Arizona were among the strongest supporters for Democrats in Arizona. **[Will you donate today to help us organize and win in 2026 by investing in what works, like Native voter outreach?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985144/562262461/-1520188172?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRlZjk3NzEtOGI3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2uNHTI4NCVGMjE4Fjup5g7h6vEUx9Lv6vNF2SWxWRwQ=)** Don’t believe me? Just look at the maps below: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985146/562262463/-1520188172?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRlZjk3NzEtOGI3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2uNHTI4NCVGMjE4Fjup5g7h6vEUx9Lv6vNF2SWxWRwQ=) __Left:_ Map of Arizona Tribal Lands
_Right:_ Map of partisan support distribution in the 2024 Arizona elections _ A strong Native electorate isn’t just important, it’s essential to electing Democrats up and down the ballot, both in 2026 and into the future. That is why I am asking you to make a powerful investment right now by splitting a donation between the Arizona Democratic Party and the Arizona Native Democrats (AND). AND is a completely unique organizing program. Right now, their team is on the ground on Arizona’s sovereign lands, registering voters and making sure people understand how the Trump administration is impacting their lives. Their work is rooted in community building and mutual aid, which has turned AND into one of the most trusted sources for information on sovereign lands. Most importantly, they get results.
* In 2024, turnout on sovereign lands increased by 1.6% over 2020, outperforming the rest of the state
* 97.2% of tribal voters who turned out voted for every race on their ballot, an 8% increase over 2020

| [Read AND’s 2024 Impact Report](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985148/562262466/-818146835?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTRlZjk3NzEtOGI3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2uNHTI4NCVGMjE4Fjup5g7h6vEUx9Lv6vNF2SWxWRwQ=&emci=38a07662-d573-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=94ef9771-8b74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=9307116)

In the 2025-26 cycle, Arizona Native Democrats will be launching a new relational organizing program and expanding out to six new tribes: San Carlos Apache, Yavapai Apache, Pascua Yaqui, Cocopah, Quechan, and Tohono O’odham. This is how we win in Arizona by organizing where it matters most.

clean_body: A huge development. Did you see our last email, Peter? Kim just got her first Republican opponent, and now, we’re relying on this grassroots team to help us stay ahead and on track for a win next November. The path through the majority runs through tough districts like WA-08. We can’t fall behind at such a critical time. = = \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Team Schrier, Election Update Date: Wed, Aug 7, 2025 Subject: BREAKING: A new Republican opponent has entered our race = Did you hear the news, team? Our first Republican challenger just announced their intent to unseat Kim and flip WA-08 red in 2026. And while next year's election may seem far away, Republicans are wasting no time trying to win back this seat and solidify their majority for two more years. The race for this district is officially on, and we have a tough fight ahead of us. Look: WA-08 is a true purple district, and it’s only a matter of time before more Republican candidates enter our race, which means we need to be ready for anything that comes our way and ensure this campaign is equipped with the resources it needs to respond to their attacks. We’ve seen this playbook before, and we know how tough these races can be. But here’s the good news: We have an incredible grassroots team by our side, and with your help, we can make sure this campaign is able to get ahead of the noise while we still can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Election Update Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: The First Petition Day Is Tomorrow—Will You Join?
body:
[](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/FA7m8fLhe_Vnk-TAnKXwr5rfkjHlTHx-Etkjair9JEY=417)Patriot–**Tomorrow’s the day—and we need you on the front lines.** Patriots across the country are stepping up for our first **national petition drive** in support of the **Safeguarding American Voter Eligibility (SAVE) Act** , and we want you with us. Whether you’ve already signed up or are just jumping in now, it’s not too late—we’ve got everything you need to hit the ground running.
* [_**Sign up to get involved**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fonly-citizens-vote-month%2F/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/Gqx6Jg3fRtXu77jg9XJZ5dVb3wr7hqxMi5xeTgUG9XY=417) and receive resources
* Watch the [_**on-demand training**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fevents.zoom.us%2Feo%2FAi3Kapz0NykpqnJmE0hfIfjgE5UTUyPDbAyLLOVb5P1TXYBltuSH~AggLXsr32QYFjq8BlYLZ5I06Dg/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/GiKPcnJqnz_sXsagwuRi4rS16NE0ax-Cyd9aSUyUQN8=417)
* [ _**Download and print the petition**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpp-resources.s3.amazonaws.com%2Fdocuments%2FTPPA-SaveAct-Petition.pdf/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/wNiJbDpd833Mv9p0ROUgyaymRvJfmE-wMkFrdOpq49s=417)

This isn’t just any grassroots effort—**it’s a coordinated, coast-to-coast movement to ensure only American citizens vote in American elections.** Every signature collected tomorrow helps send a powerful message to Congress ahead of our September 10th petition delivery in D.C.**Don’t sit this one out.** Be part of the momentum. Rally your friends, get out in your neighborhood, and help make August 9th a turning point for election integrity!In liberty,Jenny Beth Martin ** _The SAVE Act (Safeguard American Voter Eligibility Act)_**_is a commonsense bill that would require individuals to provide documentary proof of U.S. citizenship when registering to vote in federal elections. It closes loopholes in current law that allow noncitizens to register and even vote simply by checking a box. The SAVE Act is a critical step toward restoring integrity to our elections and ensuring that only American citizens vote._[ CONTRIBUTE](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/Hi3HYDCWp3UwKdUN9m4kmxeKfh7xYYamY3jfSysCaxA=417) _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. All rights reserved.__Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. operates as a social welfare organization under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. Contributions to Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc. are not deductible as charitable contributions for income tax purposes._ To donate by mail, send your check made payable to:[_**Tea Party Patriots Action**_](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Fwww.teapartypatriots.org%2Fdonate%2F/2/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/9AMWFNzu6cCaCfCncdTFtQDf4ed0q9y_jntboCILuoA=417)
2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Ste 116-314
Woodstock, GA 30189Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [unsubscribe](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/1/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/pGn1xsiPRpRlhuOStkMHmC1n-GOvnqNOet2SXidecTE=417) or [update your preferences](https://emails.teapartypatriots.org/CL0/https:%2F%2Ftpot.teapartypatriots.org%2Fcontact-preferences%2F01jp3rk1m05jb3jy5xyw9vqr5t%3Fct=1ebd6a5833cd%26et=a8fe34ad85d9/2/010001988b1d8ffd-460a5f0f-c33f-4394-867d-00c35b370877-000000/RfHkcDrfHgWsYp2qVsJQ8_acXASKrDS6TKklY5FOvSA=417).

name: No Oligarchs via Our Revolution
subject: Fight. Oligarchy.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1011&refcode=email-20250808_v&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Bernie is heading BACK on the road – this time taking his Fighting
Oligarchy tour to West Virginia and North Carolina.

Why is Bernie heading straight into Trump country? Because Trump and his
allies in Congress just voted to rip health care away from 15 million
people. They’re slashing SNAP so millions of kids, families, and seniors
go hungry. All so they could hand the billionaire oligarchs ANOTHER round
of obscene tax breaks.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25221?source=email-20250808&t=1060&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]Bernie tweet announcing he's heading back on tour to North Carolina and
West Virginia

And so Bernie is traveling the country with a simple message: ANY member
of Congress who voted to rip health care and food assistance away from the
working class must pay. But to hold them to account at the ballot box,
first we need to expose their lies – even in the cities and towns that
voted them into office.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250808nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]Our Revolution is working right alongside Bernie, deploying our Citizen
Action Team to key states to organize and fight back. But we can’t do it
without resources. Will you pitch in to strengthen Bernie’s message and
support Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team on the frontlines across the
country?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250808nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250808nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250808nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250808nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

When Bernie walks into packed stadiums and halls across the country, he’s
there to tell the truth: West Virginians will lose access to life saving
medication because a handful of moguls want one more yacht. North
Carolina’s children will see SNAP benefits stolen because hedge fund
managers want another tax loophole.

Bernie is calling out these injustices by name and naming the big
solutions – Medicare for All, living wages, green energy jobs for every
community, and no more political workarounds for the rich.

At every stop, Our Revolution’s Citizen Action Team is on the ground
alongside him – showing up at state capitols and in front of oligarchs'
homes, making sure no one forgets which elected officials voted to rob the
poor for the sake of the wealthy.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25192?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250808nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9149%2E5885482%2EWqpGiX ]Can you chip in to fuel our work to stop the oligarchs and bring the power
back to the working class? Every dollar raised goes to help organize in
key communities, elect progressives up and down the ballot, and expose the
oligarchs.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

name: Christina Bohannan
subject: Party elites are turning their backs on veterans
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRISTINA BOHANNAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985841/562264667/-975735282?refcode=em_logoheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5MTBkMS04Yzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CDUfiYIKyR0xJA005B6moGb4V3EZBGbWQoxgoAEqJs=)
Peter,

Our country asks so much of our service members and their families. They put everything on the line for us. But now, party elites are turning their backs on them.

The VA has announced it will halt nearly all abortions at VA medical centers and stop covering the procedure for the spouses and dependents of veterans. There will be no exceptions for rape, incest, or even when a pregnancy threatens the life of the pregnant person.

This is the most extreme abortion ban in the country, and it’s being imposed on those who’ve already given everything for us. We cannot accept this.

Abortion might not dominate the headlines the way it once did, but the attacks haven’t stopped. The GOP is using our veterans and their families to advance their agenda and endangering countless lives. It’s a cruel and calculated decision, and it has no place in a country that claims to honor its heroes.
**[We have to speak out. Add your name to demand Republicans stop playing politics with veterans’ reproductive care.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985843/562264668/1537660786?ms=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hpymyv+MRA3WZbBpNImlLL1dvqOvqZG98RUnpnueQZoI/zDdIy97lkOMxgmIxPt2bOk1vjWd2u5JZIkl3G+BE7VqBY8kP2KnjSFRdMpK8hhFXDRxFtIYXlrp6sQqA1JaWe/bCpKml6VXCAa1eU1w7VDHD1tXZQfjZICpG8Xc3RY=&refcode2=30c910d1-8c74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5MTBkMS04Yzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CDUfiYIKyR0xJA005B6moGb4V3EZBGbWQoxgoAEqJs=&emci=12db22f9-a773-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=30c910d1-8c74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)** **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112985847/562264669/1537660786?ms=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&refcode=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&source=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250808_VRAbor_fnd_gq_act___CB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=hpymyv+MRA3WZbBpNImlLL1dvqOvqZG98RUnpnueQZoI/zDdIy97lkOMxgmIxPt2bOk1vjWd2u5JZIkl3G+BE7VqBY8kP2KnjSFRdMpK8hhFXDRxFtIYXlrp6sQqA1JaWe/bCpKml6VXCAa1eU1w7VDHD1tXZQfjZICpG8Xc3RY=&refcode2=30c910d1-8c74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMGM5MTBkMS04Yzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4CDUfiYIKyR0xJA005B6moGb4V3EZBGbWQoxgoAEqJs=&emci=12db22f9-a773-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=30c910d1-8c74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=13891890)**

Thank you,

clean_body: | = Peter, Our country asks so much of our service members and their families. They put everything on the line for us. But now, party elites are turning their backs on them. The VA has announced it will halt nearly all abortions at VA medical centers and stop covering the procedure for the spouses and dependents of veterans. There will be no exceptions for rape, incest, or even when a pregnancy threatens the life of the pregnant person. This is the most extreme abortion ban in the country, and it’s being imposed on those who’ve already given everything for us. We cannot accept this. Abortion might not dominate the headlines the way it once did, but the attacks haven’t stopped. The GOP is using our veterans and their families to advance their agenda and endangering countless lives. It’s a cruel and calculated decision, and it has no place in a country that claims to honor its heroes. Thank you, Christina Bohannan Christina Bohannan is a mom, law professor, former engineer and state representative. She's running for Congress to defeat Mariannette Miller-Meeks and flip IA-01 blue. body:
The DLCC is calling on Democrats to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities to fight back against extreme GOP gerrymandering. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Last week, Texas state Republicans proposed new gerrymandered congressional maps that could add five GOP seats and hang onto Republicans’ majority in the U.S. House through 2028. **MAGA Republicans have made it clear that they will use their majorities in our statehouses to keep themselves in power.** In order to achieve redistricting parity and create an advantage for Democrats to protect democracy moving forward, Democrats must win back key state legislatures and increase our party’s majorities in states that require a two-thirds majority to pass new maps. That’s why I’m calling on Democrats to use _all_ state legislative power available to pursue mid-cycle redistricting opportunities – and we must focus our resources on winning battleground chambers and expanding our majorities to put our party back on offense. **We will _NOT_ sit back and watch as Republicans cheat the system. _Every_ option must be on the table. ** [Will you join the DLCC’s fight by making an urgent $7 donation to help win battleground chambers and give state Democrats their strongest chance in the redistricting fight ahead? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdl81rFp3mVpfeGD_3C3vGIrgyXq-IfFvpDauQ2fVaTRiIEhQGDYlI5x2OJQ3WIz5GVbULfDcAtj8m8AQsZ44MCJ68rfd0FLosz4__QHGJsyFo3WW7jDIu20d6KM8K8B4utYdNkS9271nNnNVZmgtOcqd4cwiUBDJsPfjyLzuhV60mGdaamgZ2ypuQrRWnG62VT70822YuHaUFllNl0FeHti2RIhlmQopXgjkx9XcKwDkjcSBSNS5Q0_E8BJOImUFQtDV0yW22hIbl8YKKN2EPhSjvYb4fb_6fw6BWXXMRrCANzL5xo7pLP7LXAXML42Lg8_vYumV2Bjmpl3RvSKWn6hzGf4IyIpMjy_2qnDM3RSarDQdD7Oqb1Lj6EgBGJtlHt82PydUfOhuna52O6fVKyA/4iv/8V8vEIUvS7qw0JEDflHt8g/h0/h001.F3KaSLXOHk2gWKELeHKCylzkrU-EuR5_naXR0lhJDAM) The make-up of our state legislatures will shape the future of our country – and we must make sure that Democrats are well-positioned to defend our democracy against the ever-rising threat of MAGA extremism.
* State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, **shaping over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 state legislative seats.**
* The fight to win and protect Democratic majorities in America’s statehouses and stop Republicans’ national gerrymandering agenda is happening now: **the DLCC has already defended 5 chamber majorities this year.**
* **Republicans currently hold 57 chamber majorities while Democrats hold 39.** If Democrats prioritize defending and expanding our majorities this year and next year, we can tilt the playing field against the GOP.

We know what we must do to protect our democracy. It’s time to meet this moment with the urgency it demands. Are you up to the task? **[Donate to elect state Dems →](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdl81rFp3mVpfeGD_3C3vGIrgyXq-IfFvpDauQ2fVaTRiIEhQGDYlI5x2OJQ3WIz5GVbULfDcAtj8m8AQsZ44MCJ68rfd0FLosz4__QHGJsyFo3WW7jDIu20d6KM8K8B4utYdNkS9271nNnNVZmgtOcoNukJE9tyDWR_cd5zHc1VGKMKjqsAKYUbGIXajHin8BdkjyJLXC3g-_-BrDyYObwraMydOTYvF6JbmmeMAphuF55HGeyOOsAnOvNlBg5Tah1Xbxgw39HdhSV_3chT_H0h2Bps8acL1Ya5kSHzqInjCRf2y0vamVks_nJCllvJMXRp4kQld3ztAaLJRTse9ShLUBJSsasIMJZRoD6AOzIAeNweZ8oQ8MyUMZlWnhllWiI1eqTa0GhGKUkbmO4lOd6g/4iv/8V8vEIUvS7qw0JEDflHt8g/h1/h001.45SWF90lbmd8pVra7GWHeSHpgkfi02X6wy7tkRsbIKU)** Together, Heather [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdl81rFp3mVpfeGD_3C3vGIrgyXq-IfFvpDauQ2fVaTRiIEhQGDYlI5x2OJQ3WIz5GVbULfDcAtj8m8AQsZ44MCJ68rfd0FLosz4__QHGJsyFo3WW7jDIu20d6KM8K8B4uldf4vE8xt52CRzdKA-evWyQMFBrSu1KMDi8VQCkBz8WoqyQjAEn4BqZESKfjyG0pNyWkEkFGLFML4bqVGMd7FlDPpDKD2HxGhpySw1bP_P8O3kIasOY07pLis7dvNbFhBZiMKVk0j5z2B9yRvMgo0EwwAMySMB42ulIXCe-muOxBilQMyf7I1KKLthslLGrB2KivOR4IfXEQKV2CKA1KJHun7hspxf6_3DAjJLEEvux1Fxro9nOIl0xUswXfZPt3OckrzY_DDhpKH4TRJRY8HY/4iv/8V8vEIUvS7qw0JEDflHt8g/h2/h001.7geKxfNNgi9YxXcCrqK6jOoc0aTvEdugnZO5jZ9pCfg) Heather Williams

name: Nellie Pou
subject: NJ Transit
body:
We need to invest in public transportation.

| |
---
Hi friend, I’m proud to represent a district that’s powered by hard work, and that means we need infrastructure that works. Commuter railroads and buses are a lifeline for working families across the state of New Jersey. It connects us to opportunity, reduces traffic and pollution, and helps build a cleaner, more sustainable future. But here’s the truth: **our transit system needs serious investment.** We need to modernize NJ Transit, build smart infrastructure, and fight for the federal dollars that will create jobs and make daily life better for thousands of commuters. And we need fighters in Congress to make sure that New Jersey working families get the investment they deserve. **[That’s why I’m here and why I’m fighting to stay here. Because New Jersey deserves a representative who believes in good ideas, big solutions, and real investment in our future. clean_body: We need to invest in public transportation. | | Hi friend, I’m proud to represent a district that’s powered by hard work, and that means we need infrastructure that works. Commuter railroads and buses are a lifeline for working families across the state of New Jersey. It connects us to opportunity, reduces traffic and pollution, and helps build a cleaner, more sustainable future. But here’s the truth: our transit system needs serious investment. We need to modernize NJ Transit, build smart infrastructure, and fight for the federal dollars that will create jobs and make daily life better for thousands of commuters. And we need fighters in Congress to make sure that New Jersey working families get the investment they deserve. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Let’s get to work. — Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . body:
They’re not going to apologize for voting to take healthcare and food assistance away from millions
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1751%2E791427%2EsR4H3W)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250808-1-180&t=2&akid=1751%2E791427%2EsR4H3W)
Friend, if you want to know how the GOP will respond, don’t hold your breath.
Rep. Randy Fine isn’t going to apologize for his racist attacks.
Neither is Donald Trump, JD Vance, Elon Musk, Senator Tommy Tuberville, or Rep. Brandon Gill, each of whom have attacked me for my background and my commitment to progressive values.
They’re not going to apologize for voting to take healthcare and food assistance away from millions, or for skyrocketing the cost of living with their reckless tariffs, or for using ICE to erode our civil rights, or for aiding and abetting the deadly humanitarian crisis in Gaza. They’re proud of it.
**That’s why we have to defeat them.**
Any hope that the GOP would do the right thing or play by the rules went out the window when Trump descended that escalator and announced his first run for President back in 2015.
They’re shameless, cruel, and only looking out for themselves and their billionaire buddies. That’s why my focus from now until the midterms next year will be rallying our progressive movement in Minneapolis and across the country to win big against the far-right Republicans.
**[Will you chip in today, and power my efforts? Support my campaign and this entire movement with a donation to help us fight back against the extremist agenda and racist attacks of the Republicans who control Washington.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-aug25.m0VVrI&refcode=em250808-1-180&t=3&akid=1751%2E791427%2EsR4H3W)

clean_body: Progressive Prosecutors EXPOSED| | | | | | | Peter, Headlines don’t always tell the whole story—but sometimes, they do. Look no further than these two headline: | | The Left is waging lawfare against conservatives—from rogue judges to Soros-funded prosecutors to the very thugs who brazenly enforce leftist “justice” on conservatives. It’s dangerous, immoral, and entirely preventable. But it’s all part of the Left’s agenda: prioritizing criminals over citizens, lawbreakers over law-abiders, and danger over decency. | | But it doesn’t have to be this way. All it takes is prioritizing the backbone of America—the hard-working, law-abiding, tax-paying working class that truly makes this country great. We can, and we will—the future of America depends on it! | | In Liberty, Senator Josh Hawley | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | | |

name: Texas Organizing Project PAC
subject: Broken quorum. Broken MAGA momentum.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Texas Organizing Project PAC, organizetexas
body:
Peter,
The resistance against Donald Trump and Greg Abbott’s racist redistricting scheme is in full effect and GROWING. Understanding the urgency of the moment, Texas House Democrats broke quorum this past weekend, blocking Republicans’ rigged congressional maps this special session.
These maps are an unconstitutional mess that would radically redraw districts across Austin, Dallas, Houston, San Antonio, and the Rio Grande Valley – all in an orchestrated effort to dilute Black and Latino voting power.
Trump is as ridiculous as ever, claiming this week that the GOP is somehow "entitled" [https://www.axios.com/2025/08/05/trump-texas-five-seats-entitled] to five more congressional seats in this manufactured redistricting scam. And Ken Paxton is absurdly asking the courts to vacate [https://www.sacurrent.com/news/texas-attorney-general-paxton-will-ask-courts-to-vacate-democratic-lawmakers-seats-38166965] the seats of Democrats who rightfully broke quorum. John Cornyn is even weaponizing the FBI [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/sen-cornyn-fbi-granted-request-locate-fleeing-texas/story?id=124446304] against them!
We need your help to keep up the fight against this authoritarian push.
DONATE to provide TOP PAC with the resources we need to counter this GOP extremism. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=bb9b3987-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=bb9b3987-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=bb9b3987-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]
Sitting this one out isn’t an option. There is absolutely too much on the line for us to stay silent about this gross attack on the voice of voters and the future of our state.
PITCH IN $5, $10, $20, or any amount you can to help TOP PAC mobilize against Trump and Abbott’s racist redistricting ploy. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=bb9b3987-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]
Texans across race, place, and background know their worth. Every person who calls our state home deserves fair representation from elected officials who respect the will of voters and our democracy, NOT those who are working to destroy it.
- Texas Organizing Project PAC
Contribute now! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode2=bb9b3987-8e74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b]

A place I knew well.**

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | Hi, This is Brigadier General James Emory Mace, U.S. Army (Retired). Today, I write to you not as a soldier... but as a father. I'm a Purple Heart veteran, and I’ve seen battle. I’ve worn the uniform. I’ve buried friends who never made it home. And I’ve felt the sting of a Nation that sometimes forgets what our sacrifices were for. Nancy was raised in the shadow of the flag. She saw the uniform. She lived with the deployments. She knew the cost. And instead of running from it, she ran toward it. When Nancy was 17, she dropped out of high school. Most kids in that situation fall apart. But not Nancy.She picked herself up, took a job at Waffle House, and fought her way back. By 21, she became the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s Military College. A place I knew well. Nancy then made it to Congress, where she represented the people of South Carolina’s First District. She’s been fighting her whole life; for herself, for her kids, for the truth, and now...for her state. It’s hard sitting back as a father and hearing the terrible things the media and the establishment say about her. I want to ask you something from one parent, one patriot, to another: She’s up against a machine that wants to erase the values of faith-based, service-minded Americans who believe in truth, family, and country. Nancy stood up for me. She stood up for EVERY veteran who was forgotten. She stood up when sanctuary sheriffs released illegal alien criminals onto South Carolina streets. She stood up when they tried to let biological men compete in women’s sports. She stood up when other Republicans stayed silent. And now, she’s standing up for YOU. But she needs your backup. Will you answer it with me today? Nancy’s not running to make friends. She’s running to win. To fight. To serve. That’s what she learned growing up in our home. That’s what she learned watching me go off to war. And that’s what she’ll carry with her to the Governor’s Mansion. Please, on this solemn day, join me in standing with my daughter. With respect, General James Emory Mace (Ret.)Proud Father of Nancy Mace | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter. Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained. At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground.Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks. She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history. Nancy is fighting to: Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR | | 295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186Charleston, SC 29492 |
