Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. _[If you were forwarded this newsletter, you can sign up to receive the Kernel every week by clicking here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987130/562268968/1416943042?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)_ [_**If you'd like to donate to the INDems' Reorganization Fund, you can do so by clicking here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987131/562268969/1764064610?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=) ****
_Democrats Rally at Statehouse Against Plot to Gerrymander Indiana Mid-Decade_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987132/562268970/1089648744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987133/562268971/1089648744?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) While Vice President JD Vance came into Indiana this week to attempt to carve up our state to gain just two seats in the US House, Hoosiers gathered in the halls of the Statehouse against this blatant and unprecedented power grab. Indiana’s maps are already unfair – Democrats are designed to win just 2 out of 9 seats, even though we take 40% of the vote on a regular basis in our state. Hundreds of Hoosiers from across the state came out to listen to state lawmakers, and hear directly from Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson. The bottom line: Republicans know their policies are losing nationwide and they want to rig the game to stay in power. They think Hoosiers won’t care about their blatant cheating. ****_State Republican Leaders Try and Bury AI Pornography Scandal in Beckwith’s Office_
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987134/562268972/1370173045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987135/562268973/1370173045?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) Micah Beckwith continues to be an embarrassment to Hoosiers, and this scandal is just the latest reason why. Reporting this week from a longtime Indiana expert alleges that high-level staffers in Beckwith’s office made an AI deepfake pornographic image of a lawmaker’s wife, and that the Lt. Governor saw the image and found it amusing. In response, Beckwith fired two of his staff - not for creating the deepfake, but for allegedly tipping off the press. Mike Braun and legislative leaders have been silent in response, leaving the lawmaker and his family without ample recourse. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987136/562268974/1306633966?pli=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) This week, we are highlighting the efforts of the Indiana Latino Democratic Caucus to stop the detention of ICE detainees at the Miami Correctional Facility near Peru, Indiana and at Camp Atterbury in South Central Indiana. Sign your name today to show your support for their efforts. Our communities should not be ripped apart over minor violations like traffic tickets, or people detained for committing no crimes at all, but that is what is happening under the watch of this administration. [Join their call today to support families and tell our Senators, Representatives, Governor, and State leaders that the public deserves full transparency about the use of our military facilities as detention camps.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987137/562268975/1306633966?pli=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535)

Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects**_ **INDOT –** INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. [Learn more and comment here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112987141/562268979/1956497106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzFlYzFiNC05MTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R2o-ZFxRNd7RLpiLUWtl6RWOLObzfYi24jQpSLZOcsY=&emci=aa067f92-8f74-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&emdi=6c1ec1b4-9174-f011-8dc9-6045bda9d96b&ceid=4925535) **IDOE –** The Indiana Department of Education is taking its first round of feedback on a plan to reassign A-F ratings to all Indiana schools. clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important facts - a kernel of truth - from the week. = ** Democrats Rally at Statehouse Against Plot to Gerrymander Indiana Mid-Decade While Vice President JD Vance came into Indiana this week to attempt to carve up our state to gain just two seats in the US House, Hoosiers gathered in the halls of the Statehouse against this blatant and unprecedented power grab. Indiana’s maps are already unfair – Democrats are designed to win just 2 out of 9 seats, even though we take 40% of the vote on a regular basis in our state. Hundreds of Hoosiers from across the state came out to listen to state lawmakers, and hear directly from Reps. Frank Mrvan and André Carson. The bottom line: Republicans know their policies are losing nationwide and they want to rig the game to stay in power. They think Hoosiers won’t care about their blatant cheating. State Republican Leaders Try and Bury AI Pornography Scandal in Beckwith’s Office Micah Beckwith continues to be an embarrassment to Hoosiers, and this scandal is just the latest reason why. Reporting this week from a longtime Indiana expert alleges that high-level staffers in Beckwith’s office made an AI deepfake pornographic image of a lawmaker’s wife, and that the Lt. Governor saw the image and found it amusing. In response, Beckwith fired two of his staff - not for creating the deepfake, but for allegedly tipping off the press. Mike Braun and legislative leaders have been silent in response, leaving the lawmaker and his family without ample recourse. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week, we are highlighting the efforts of the Indiana Latino Democratic Caucus to stop the detention of ICE detainees at the Miami Correctional Facility near Peru, Indiana and at Camp Atterbury in South Central Indiana. Sign your name today to show your support for their efforts. Our communities should not be ripped apart over minor violations like traffic tickets, or people detained for committing no crimes at all, but that is what is happening under the watch of this administration. Information on County Party events, Town Halls, protests, volunteer opportunities, and more can be found on our Make Your Voice Heard! Submit Public Input on Upcoming Indiana Projects INDOT – INDOT is taking comments on its proposed upgrades and changes to the I-80/94 corridor in Northwest Indiana (FlexRoad), which is the busiest stretch of interstate in Indiana. IDOE – The Indiana Department of Education is taking its first round of feedback on a plan to reassign A-F ratings to all Indiana schools. ** Upcoming Candidate Trainings Join the National Democratic Training Committee on Monday, August 11th from 1-2 pm ET for a free virtual live training on Fundamentals of Organizing. INDems IN the News WFYI: IndyStar: WTHR: Indiana Capital Chronicle: * Indiana Capital Chronicle: [content goes here] 101 W Washington St., #1110E Indianapolis, IN 46204 Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www.indems.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39992%2E3422442%2EreUHdZ)
Dear Peter,
A new poll just dropped in our race, and it shows our momentum growing.
**In the past four months, Katie’s support increased from 12% to 18%.** She’s the clear Democratic frontrunner, with a 13-point lead over the next closest Democrat. Our message is resonating with voters, and Katie’s efforts reaching into every part and pocket of California are paying off.
**But, the poll also shows that nearly 40% of voters are still undecided, so there’s a lot of work to do before the election to secure Katie’s victory.** We have to make sure that as many voters as possible hear about Katie’s plan to lower costs and safeguard our rights.
**[We can’t do this work without you, Peter. Will you chip in $5 to help us reach Californians up and down the state?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250808_1_ak?refcode=em20250808-39992&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39992_3422442_reUHdZ&akid=39992%2E3422442%2EreUHdZ)**

Thanks,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250808-39992&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39992_3422442_reUHdZ&akid=39992%2E3422442%2EreUHdZ)**

name: Indiana GOP
subject: Stronger Partnerships, Stronger Indiana
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| |
---
| | _**Stronger Partnerships, Stronger Indiana**_
---
Friends, Yesterday, Indiana welcomed Vice President JD Vance to Indianapolis for productive conversations with Governor Mike Braun, House Speaker Todd Huston, and Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray. The meeting covered a broad range of topics important to Hoosiers, and our Republican leadership expressed their appreciation for the Vice President’s visit and his partnership in advancing our state’s priorities. Governor Braun’s commitment to Hoosiers’ safety was underscored this week as Governor Braun announced new cooperation agreements between federal immigration authorities and key state agencies, including the Indiana Department of Homeland Security, Indiana State Police, Indiana Department of Correction, and Indiana National Guard. First outlined in his January 28th executive order, these agreements will ensure that alien criminals cannot remain in our state and that Indiana continues to uphold the rule of law. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with.
---
| |
---
| | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman
---
|
---
| | |
---
---
| | _**Governor Braun Meets with Vice President Vance alongside Indiana Legislative Leaders**_
---
---
Vice President JD Vance arrived in Indianapolis yesterday to speak with Governor Mike Braun, House Speaker Todd Huston, and Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray. The meeting covered a wide range of topics, and all three Hoosier leaders expressed their gratitude for the visit. "It was great to meet with Vice President Vance today. We discussed a number of issues, and I was pleased to highlight some of the great things happening in Indiana." \- Governor Braun via [X](http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/c/rD-CNzYqwrXWkpR9Y3eZA4KzOcSi1B9uynNpIlbExEaEChCHkXY34Y79O_1EUIe9rrx3f-9VPGzJNMMuwJd-PGGwhdcji0kgI9DfvyHoMOooIlO6KRstLbI8C9ST9P-kVV51bd6yW9R1CgeiH3vjzrObuJD4m_NchmEzzH3BXrDW--rYZmU-l-lrTv6vVIgNP4nc5d-2RmmYf-FAipD_bi6qAuwhFtcfUWHIUSdhjDexGCL4Xy0GPGXWeI4mpiJG67OllakDt_4xCCk6E-McLAHsgoSUOicXjUQpdLUvclqVx7bU2ZGdaLayx1s4lOHMN9d09K04fUUVj3Vt9amVyAA6reZsn_IVJHtaSHSxGfBtztC9jV6HyT7WfviIRgzO7c_pmfz_uqHfDVPh-SyhVJcgvxkUJvqkpA50MVjzPA/pxFaC7rKvk1oi1XLTyHqhLxlcyzD-YPr/11)
---
_**Governor Announces Cooperation Agreements with Federal Immigration Enforcement**_
---
---
Governor Mike Braun announced new cooperation agreements between federal immigration authorities and the Indiana Department of Homeland Security, Indiana State Police, Indiana Department of Correction, and Indiana National Guard. As first laid out in hid January 28th executive order, these agreements will prevent alien criminals from remaining in our state and enforce the rule of law in Indiana. "Indiana is not a safe haven for illegal immigration. clean_body: | | | | | | | Stronger Partnerships, Stronger Indiana Friends, Yesterday, Indiana welcomed Vice President JD Vance to Indianapolis for productive conversations with Governor Mike Braun, House Speaker Todd Huston, and Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray. The meeting covered a broad range of topics important to Hoosiers, and our Republican leadership expressed their appreciation for the Vice President’s visit and his partnership in advancing our state’s priorities. Governor Braun’s commitment to Hoosiers’ safety was underscored this week as Governor Braun announced new cooperation agreements between federal immigration authorities and key state agencies, including the Indiana Department of Homeland Security, Indiana State Police, Indiana Department of Correction, and Indiana National Guard. First outlined in his January 28th executive order, these agreements will ensure that alien criminals cannot remain in our state and that Indiana continues to uphold the rule of law. As always, thank you for being a part of our team. Please feel free to reach out if there's anything I can assist with. | | | | Lana Keesling, Indiana GOP Chairwoman | | | | | | Governor Braun Meets with Vice President Vance alongside Indiana Legislative Leaders Vice President JD Vance arrived in Indianapolis yesterday to speak with Governor Mike Braun, House Speaker Todd Huston, and Senate President Pro Tem Rodric Bray. The meeting covered a wide range of topics, and all three Hoosier leaders expressed their gratitude for the visit. "It was great to meet with Vice President Vance today. We discussed a number of issues, and I was pleased to highlight some of the great things happening in Indiana." \- Governor Braun via Governor Announces Cooperation Agreements with Federal Immigration Enforcement Governor Mike Braun announced new cooperation agreements between federal immigration authorities and the Indiana Department of Homeland Security, Indiana State Police, Indiana Department of Correction, and Indiana National Guard. As first laid out in hid January 28th executive order, these agreements will prevent alien criminals from remaining in our state and enforce the rule of law in Indiana. "Indiana is not a safe haven for illegal immigration. name: Team Jon Ossoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**A single $5 donation.**
That’s what we’re asking from you today, to help re-elect Jon Ossoff and take back the Senate majority for Democrats. We’ll explain more in a moment, but if you can make that $5 donation right now, chip in here: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-august25**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250808-1-f&t=1&akid=623%2E5691347%2ENujew8)
Ok, here’s the deal.
This Senate race in Georgia is going to be one of the closest and most expensive races in the entire history of the Senate. _We think you’ll agree:_
_Cook Political Report_ and _Inside Elections_ have both ranked this election “TOSS-UP,” and _NBC News_ says Jon Ossoff is the “most vulnerable Senator” running for re-election.
**And Republicans are already running full speed ahead._Multiple_ GOP candidates have jumped in the race, and right-wing Super PACs are _already_ spending millions of dollars attacking Jon.**
For us, winning is going to require building a movement that can face these challenges head-on. And we need to start building it right away.
**So we are humbly asking:**
**[Can you make a $5 contribution today to Jon Ossoff’s re-election campaign in Georgia? We are being pummeled by millions of dollars in Super PAC spending and need your help to fight back before it’s too late.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-august25.AuYWG3&refcode=em250808-1-f&t=2&akid=623%2E5691347%2ENujew8)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $10](https://act.electjon.com/go/1525?c0=ossoff-em-august25.JBs1o5&refcode=em250808-1-f&t=21&akid=623%2E5691347%2ENujew8)**

| **[Another Amount](https://act.electjon.com/go/34?c0=ossoff-em-august25.qJxmK-&refcode=em250808-1-f&t=26&akid=623%2E5691347%2ENujew8)**

Thank you for all you’ve done for Jon and for our campaign. Now let’s keep pushing and together we are going to build the largest grassroots organizing and mobilization effort this state has ever seen.

Team Jon Ossoff

name: Paul Dans, Director of Project 2025
subject: I have a new mission
body:
Help me retire RINO Lindsey Graham once and for all.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, South Carolina deserves a senator who fights for _you_ \- not the D.C. swamp.
**[I’m Paul Dans, architect of Project 2025, and I’m running to unseat Lindsey Graham in the 2026 Republican primary.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**
For too long, Graham has betrayed our values - backing Biden’s judges, pushing endless wars, and cozying up to the establishment while South Carolina conservatives boo him at Trump rallies. It’s time for his "Sunset Boulevard".

[FIRE LINDSEY GRAHAM](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Friend, at Project 2025, I built a blueprint to shrink government, secure our borders, and put America First.
Now, I’m bringing that fight to the U.S. Senate to deliver President Trump’s agenda and restore South Carolina’s voice. But I can’t do it alone, our grassroots campaign needs your support to take on Graham’s war chest and the D.C. insiders protecting him.

**The Problem** :Lindsey Graham’s been in Washington for 30 years, voting for Obama and Biden judges (over 200 confirmed!), cheerleading foreign wars, and failing South Carolina voters. In 2023, he was booed off the stage at a Trump rally in Pickens. He’s out of touch, and his donors are the swamp - not the people.****
****
**The Solution** :You. By donating today, you’re fueling a movement to replace Graham with a Senator who’ll fight for secure borders, lower taxes, and America First policies. Every dollar powers our team to knock doors, rally voters, and spread the word across South Carolina.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[JOIN TEAM DANS](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This isn’t just about one election, it’s about taking back our party from RINOs and building a Senate that stands with President Trump.
**[In 2024, South Carolina sent a message by backing Trump overwhelmingly. Now, let’s finish the job by electing a Senator who’ll do the same.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

**_[Your support today sends a clear signal: the swamp’s days are numbered, and South Carolina’s future is bright](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

_For America_ ,

**Paul Dans** Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aXtU/?__vbtrk=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzEwMDMxOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

Now, I’m bringing that fight to the U.S. Senate to deliver President Trump’s agenda and restore South Carolina’s voice. But I can’t do it alone, our grassroots campaign needs your support to take on Graham’s war chest and the D.C. insiders protecting him. The Problem :Lindsey Graham’s been in Washington for 30 years, voting for Obama and Biden judges (over 200 confirmed!), cheerleading foreign wars, and failing South Carolina voters. In 2023, he was booed off the stage at a Trump rally in Pickens. He’s out of touch, and his donors are the swamp - not the people.** The Solution :You. By donating today, you’re fueling a movement to replace Graham with a Senator who’ll fight for secure borders, lower taxes, and America First policies. Every dollar powers our team to knock doors, rally voters, and spread the word across South Carolina. This isn’t just about one election, it’s about taking back our party from RINOs and building a Senate that stands with President Trump. **. For America , Paul Dans Candidate for U.S. Senate, South Carolina | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

## Heroes Emerge on Park Avenue
Two [employees sprang into action](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OpDAQhU9jMrdMgcEdONiErDfdEBlcBm_7B9k1tLj9iLnCJKVPKunTe-_fa34ZH3za_pqI2m1uJpfnhJ8akAjLvBWTksdqkn17W1cTj_YZc6IZBEguFBdqtsaHa-4bqx0iYNegbkfZD6qTMDS7Vot4SsDnInEcRgVWyXYxq2rlAGNrbeP1bRNKKBBCgnyM49A6Nyi1ylZ168J6gdZTLo__2Sfa0YUrn1gea45N0DvRUVn3h8HEYErXkSvdLwbTLWYwCXWfjsH0Vfndj8G0Y8n8k8sbC6_mRMsVdyVHnq6VR1Mrr3vO5NPGl-vm80baMXKfKHPD15ArEoOpKdoeHx-Cr8PIerFF48NPOPr1qqeG7wAAAP__NmWMJA) to protect others during a gunman’s attempted attack on NFL headquarters at 345 Park Ave. in New York last week. Lobby greeter Andre Morris, 39, ushered a group of workers into a closet and held the door shut until help arrived. Just moments earlier, [an NFL employee](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2upSAUBeCn0Q4D-McpKKaxO9NOabawUWa2YACP49vfeF_h1itZWev7857f4MmH9TfsqN3q5uLiHPDKhKVgmtcEIXjMEOw_b7OB_RCvPYYySy57xhXjarbg6Z672mqHKLGtUYux7wbV9nKoN_0Spm0V8GVphXCDNQhKuLEblbWdMH3t9dPGFVeS8172zTgOwrlBKdML1Zql6jhaX2Jq_kYfyoaO7vjB1Ji416S3Uo5ctb8qOVVyuq6rcfH_8-LJKzmduZJTcMRwPyjeiCxvsTCKy3Kz9Qw7BHZBCmiZiUQI64mZnUcu4FNmC7qYkBmgh4q9hKiTtsfliXwexqrj6w6evseUHyt-tPwKAAD__2h1ij8) who was shot in the back used his phone not to call 911, but to warn colleagues upstairs, giving them precious time to take cover. The high-rise, home to major firms like the NFL and Blackstone, was thrown into chaos, but thanks to their [quick thinking](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAUheGnMVuQfY3BGTw0rSJ1SNeO1gVfg1tjp-AE8fYVfYWu50jf8H_e7A1DDGn8wJmMH70tPttE2xqpFFrsuGBKgVZM7ju4dcD5Ls5zTsUCB3Xi-sS1dRjibpvKGU8EJCsyolNNq6WCtpqM6l2jJYoehQLdiR61pAHOBBIkQl8Fc2hccw2cK1B117XC-1brQQkth541nFwoeam_ckhlIh_3_KSlHvJcRTOVcl-ZfGFwZXDdtq3e86M8ejr-Y8EyTExen0y-xcsl_0jx-r7zajHuvoUYw9p2rOHjjCH-keXfLZ4GfgMAAP__RM9y5w), more lives were spared.
## Mercy Ships Brings Healing to Africa's Coast
If you like reality shows with real heart, _The Mercy Ships_ premiered in June on the Angel Studios streaming service--and it's worth a watch. [Here's a trailer](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkbuO2zoQhp-G6mxQpCTShQrJl92Fj_dsLkicNALNm2hTpCDSS9hPH8iNkTpTzvf_U3zz89AdmLHG6Xc2yFpp1UXlOydTsDJGOXV6Ys4ZGZgTFyMCZ8OYrwbvYocgKheQLiDtBDP21hWZqJWUSOJM1jkpi4riElVZXxMhGeVCqlJhvoKMrFYVJphxxAq1Ijgz9XwNUkgRhCUql4RUuVIVpbzMKeYnUEApTPTT8uyNi71U9uY_5bTkfshs3cc4BoAbgHYA7VJKS-a0tDMFaBd6nwJAu0FO_LYIvZmzu2scuuCvE5cAb7T32soFEwGgig0jwK1m4snzv9azBWa0MwLgDUK0xBgXBOJn6DSxB4TNPL463v8_krztj-3tbftLT-a85b_v54Ugzw63j8r6DPfrL-fkxOu27Tc_mq9voXnpocZr1MuQLvA13U90fWnZFZbX0YyFwpPb39BLQ_aHjy7yb5i822qNPsx3zRoN07b5L3WJt9lUizEZa02oCCigHph5WMriPz__s0Z_AgAA__8oEcG-). The docuseries follows the U.S.-led [nonprofit Mercy Ships](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0cGK2zAYBOCnkW9_kCXLdg4-hBKzhaYs68LSk1GsX_bfylKQlLh--5K8wt6HGT7m8zJeNDny80-9YmdnO2YbRo9bcpgzxnGO2nvCpL35SyZNer2VxzX4PAouFPAWeDsaTW4fq8J0FlGgLLArG1XVrVSiLpaOo6pVZXndTPqqj1Kqo9S20aVEoyvdFNQ923jLW8G5EurQNHVpbd22kypbOV1ZxdFQDvHwJ5DPC1q3hwfGwxTWwnVLzrfE5ImJnol-27bD9Z7IY0obRXyGmOifKib6JazIRP8arIUUVVMeSyZ69Ez0F4zTDsNCtwTvOmaPMcFGeYGTn9HBkO-GQgIbIpz_Te6e6IHwQ9_9tECwcNp0NPBJ3pOf4QO1o7zDgJEwwa-3M1zOH99-w_D2_X0oYmduGzlHqW5YxedVk3uB8pefeHTifwAAAP__LfyeXw) as it delivers free surgeries aboard floating hospitals along Africa's coast. Produced by Telly Award-winner Tracy Trost, the show captures both the life-changing care and the [everyday American volunteers](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2upCAUBOCnwR0Gj3-4YNEbF5P0bGd2BuGgZwbBAN2m3_7G-wp3_SWVqvrzXJ6aPIXttz5Quc0txcUl4JU9loJp2ZIOgTDrYP-TzUYfZzMdMZQFBPRcSC7kYjX5z9JVVjlEwLZC1Yx9N8i2h6HaVWeGwTbSiQlA49RLuXYOpnFsJoedFRWpO01IIUGIHvp6HIfGuUFK0zeyNSvrBFoqMdX_IoWyo_Of-MZUm3hUXu2lnJm1DwYzg_m6rvrI4TYGMwb-ygzme9SNMXnLYPbRaM_DK2UKG8_lZTGUzHf0Jzc7eZswcL1GnSw_MJkPzzudnALXLpHRDGad-OPR_Pqr27VKyp4XeU95GFkntkOT_y5XfvzqW8FXAAAA__-9HY3d) who make it happen. One episode tells the story of Armane, a young boy from Madagascar whose cleft lip led his village to believe he was cursed--until a one-hour surgery aboard the ship helped restore his smile and his place in the community. _In this week's [Feel Good Flyover Podcast](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1SAyEcQPHTQJcdviEFhU1SRRsd7RgCfzYoCxmWJO7tHb2CB3hv5vd-ciefS67zs1_Apjm5kZqr8FgLjAHdzd3XmmH1NX7luAa_XOl-aXU4RpjcEbMjxkWfy-YEjjYBMOAYLNVSKMMlU_hiufZnrVQUe6BiL0AlogL1SRlBeWQBZ_t7I4YYRohkctJa0ZSUMUFSw8MZCQIxj9anz5bruEAqW7tDn0JbcLGXMa4r4k-IHRA7bO02btMZEDu8fPfj6_Hj_mYM7jZeH7mUvCqNBJkXn8tfP_4Nv1v2EwAA___-5myA), host Amy Hess interviews filmmaker Tracy Trost and discusses the experiences of the staff aboard. Make sure to catch it on [Spotify](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFOhDAYwPGnKduRtrRQhg4OMhgPo9EYXZoCX-HT0hLa3AWf3pyv4P7Pb_i_n83Zoscw93YF7WZnsosmwDV5yBl2M-82BIRkw_SNUxrturF2jSEbTrk8UXWiykwW_WFEMWkHwKEqQLNGilpVktfFolsn-dgqgJFVoFzNxMAGNghoVaUs2AL1TaOKKk6p5LJsmpo5Vys1SqaqcSCCwoQ57uVXxJAXcP6IF9jLMa6F10vOWyLVHeEd4V3cIJRpixndcQsI79ISr4R3or-8PDz9-Ofez2_94-tHuG_ZZ7Hrabui95jqhgg6rxb9n5z_veSi-W8AAAD__wvJdjI), [YouTube](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykzz1SAyEcQPHTQJcdviEFhU1SRRsd7RgCfzYoCxmWJO7tHb2CB3hv5vd-ciefS67zs1_Apjm5kZqr8FgLjAHdzd3XmmH1NX7luAa_XOl-aXU4RpjcEbMjxkWfy-YEjjYBMOAYLNVSKMMlU_hiufZnrVQUe6BiL0AlogL1SRlBeWQBZ_t7I4YYRohkctJa0ZSUMUFSw8MZCQIxj9anz5bruEAqW7tDn0JbcLGXMa4r4k-IHRA7bO02btMZEDu8fPfj6_Hj_mYM7jZeH7mUvCqNBJkXn8tfP_4Nv1v2EwAA___-5myA), or [Apple Podcasts](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAYhJ8Gb7bgx2AYGLp4S9eOiJofmxaDZWiivH2VqlIeIOvd6Tvp-7jYi4sp5vXd7WjCGmwLxWa81YSt4WnX0-Ucsbrsv6Ovi9sPpveSmwUKoqeqp8p6F9Pdjp03ARGQd2jYJEapuADZbUbJwMeghVBM6gVAaZi05xwC9Vwz3UXzoFFFFVAqQAzTJFkIUqlFMMWXTzJS9LGVc_gqMbcNQ7qXK57DUvYuma21oxL-RmAmMB_FL662OrjjSPiYEJh_6rMhMLcN-39G_0yjZ4pR4KAl607jj1tMKVY5kZGuu4vp76-9LOpq4DcAAP__55R72Q). _
## Kitten Hops NYC Train, Finds Forever Home
A [stray kitten who wandered](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2O6yAUBOCnsTssfozhFhS3cZdtt7QIHBw2GKLjk1h--1XyCltNM_o0mu_LcvG55Lp--Q1cWtNCqS0Vjr0AEeCyoq81w-5rvOe4B789xL-tVVokl5pxy7hdos_lXMY-ugQgQfXghNHjZJWWU39zMMkxcDDaBBmVUWCitlZbIeyV2wR9dm-NW24l51rqwZhJpDRZG7SwKly7kUPM1HD4abnSDVI52wtwCG3ri7sRPfZO_e_k3Mn5OI5hbS1uDWuuq98Ac_Dvaifn8Cz0ROjkvFPD85PoT3bPRFDZm98ZemLoAzB_bR4jq3Cws-GdCTkqroWyPbr4OHIpeZ9MN_J187l81tCfb3w5-RsAAP__AOeI1w) onto a New York City subway last week has found a new home and internet fame after being rescued by a fellow commuter. The tiny tabby, now named Emmie, boarded a downtown train and charmed passengers before Harlem resident Betsaida Mercado scooped her up and took her home. [Watch the video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUQOGnwVsszJ_xwFCp8pZKVVV1RMTca5NiiAyJ67ev0lfofKRvOF9ne3YhhjS_uRUMzmgrZptgLxFqhc3Om0spQHHJfwdfJrfeumHNqVpGmTxRfaLaehfiYUXjDQIw4A2YrpdCaS6ZahbToZScD1yoQeGEIJxHNTEtxMA58q4J5qlRTTWjVDLZ9r3qEJXWk-w0ny5EUPCh5q295pDqAhiP_ICtnfLaRLPUeiuEvxA2Ejbu-94e-V7vF3h2wsay5K0WwsbXz-vP8b7kj_PcbMbf9hBjKKongs6rC_HPq_8e8TDsNwAA__86GnLh). After a quick vet visit confirmed that Emmie wasn’t microchipped, Betsaida adopted her and introduced the kitty to her 13-year-old dog, King. Now settled into indoor life, Emmie is thriving, and yes, Betsaida still made it to work on time.

Welcome to The Feel Good Flyover. Here's some good news to start: If you've always wanted to invest in something you believe in, here's your chance. You can invest in The Flyover! Check out our special section below, or . We'd love to have you partner with us on our journey--building a better kind of news media company. This week's Feel Good Flyover Podcast features an in-depth conversation with filmmaker Tracy Trost--creator, writer, and executive producer of the Telly Award-winning docuseries The Mercy Ships. This special episode is available on , , or . Today's sponsor is . In a world where headlines feel more like battlegrounds, The Pour Over helps Christians stay informed, without getting pulled into the noise. Their free newsletter delivers the day's top news from a biblically grounded, politically neutral perspective. Not liberal. Not conservative. . | Heroes Emerge on Park Avenue Two to protect others during a gunman’s attempted attack on NFL headquarters at 345 Park Ave. in New York last week. Lobby greeter Andre Morris, 39, ushered a group of workers into a closet and held the door shut until help arrived. Just moments earlier, who was shot in the back used his phone not to call 911, but to warn colleagues upstairs, giving them precious time to take cover. The high-rise, home to major firms like the NFL and Blackstone, was thrown into chaos, but thanks to their , more lives were spared. Mercy Ships Brings Healing to Africa's Coast If you like reality shows with real heart, The Mercy Ships premiered in June on the Angel Studios streaming service--and it's worth a watch. -. The docuseries follows the U.S.-led as it delivers free surgeries aboard floating hospitals along Africa's coast. Produced by Telly Award-winner Tracy Trost, the show captures both the life-changing care and the who make it happen. One episode tells the story of Armane, a young boy from Madagascar whose cleft lip led his village to believe he was cursed--until a one-hour surgery aboard the ship helped restore his smile and his place in the community. In this week's , host Amy Hess interviews filmmaker Tracy Trost and discusses the experiences of the staff aboard. Make sure to catch it on , , or . Kitten Hops NYC Train, Finds Forever Home A onto a New York City subway last week has found a new home and internet fame after being rescued by a fellow commuter. The tiny tabby, now named Emmie, boarded a downtown train and charmed passengers before Harlem resident Betsaida Mercado scooped her up and took her home. . After a quick vet visit confirmed that Emmie wasn’t microchipped, Betsaida adopted her and introduced the kitty to her 13-year-old dog, King. Now settled into indoor life, Emmie is thriving, and yes, Betsaida still made it to work on time. | The Flyoveris an investment you can Feel Good about! There are 70+ million Americans out there we believe would love The Flyover if they knew about it, and we plan to use our capital raise to gas up our marketing efforts. ➤ Third, we’re not a moonshot. () ➤ A stray dog in Pittsburgh’s North Shore led a passerby to two unconscious people in a tent encampment. Emergency crews took both to the hospital. clean_body: I wanted to reach out and make sure you saw this news, Peter | | I wanted to reach out and make sure you saw this news, Peter: Texas Democrats have courageously refused to rubber stamp Donald Trump’s viciously gerrymandered congressional map. → Republicans are threatening to remove them from office – or even arrest them – in response. → The Trump administration is apparently weaponizing federal law enforcement to target their political adversaries. → There have even been threats of violence made against these brave lawmakers. \---------- Forwarded message ---------- Peter, the situation is changing by the second, so I’ll be quick: Texas Democrats have righteously refused to vote on a gerrymandered congressional map – risking arrest – to stop Donald Trump’s corrupt scheme. Understand this: – Democrats only need to flip THREE seats to take back the House majority. – The Republican agenda to rip healthcare away from millions is deeply unpopular with the American people – so Trump is ordering the Texas GOP to gerrymander FIVE seats in their favor. – Now, Texas Democrats are taking a bold stand – leaving the state at great personal cost – to stop Trump’s ploy to disenfranchise millions of voters and cheat his way to control of the House. | | | | Keep the faith, Hakeem Hakeem Jeffries is the Democratic Leader of the U.S. House of Representatives. Like many of us, Hakeem was raised by a working-class family; His mom was a social worker and his dad was a substance abuse counselor. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: One of my favorite parts of the job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Aloha, Peter, When people ask me what I enjoy most about being a United States Senator, I always tell them that it’s talking to folks like you. It’s true! Listening to your stories and hearing about the issues that you care most about drives me to keep up my fight in the Senate to deliver real results that make a difference in people’s lives. While I wish I could sit down and have a conversation with every single member of this grassroots team face-to-face, surveys like the one I hope you’ll take today are the next best way for me to hear from you directly. **[I want to hear everything you’d like to share, Peter — from your top priorities to the issues that matter most to you and your family. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: Demand Congress get Big Money out of politics.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
They’re dismantling everything from public education to the Social Security Administration to Medicare and Medicaid, just to pay for tax breaks for the rich. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWmecjbYzcnpbseJN9sTvu9kzATsUfzdCGZmeQDff-nPBoq89aILzJEXASLIRVzdW87E4QiEcwrsCLzU8yyqw3FrOTlcPOb99ZXE7HNLb5TvJiQLkQybTQWGeqTa7gSv6QOzG4StW7_k4SBdgNnyH_NK1nVMarifFkdwS8hAUURwNLPBI-nf6Vi12aJXZ73Y6YF5iE7Mroik2GjprHJ7_Dwg/4iv/-o7i4_PARe-DH3m2DXr0sA/h0/h001.lC7ex-7BcTev4Znak9_HKp-Ynsy0bN1tsEpgdy1bdwk)
---
Friend, When Congress votes to hand trillions of dollars in tax cuts to the wealthy and corporations while making the largest cut to healthcare in American history, they’re showing that our government is truly of, by, and for the billionaires. **They bought the presidential election, and now they control our government.** In fact, in 2024, just 100 billionaire families spent a record $2.6 billion―mostly to elect right-wing candidates who believe in fewer taxes for the rich and fewer rights for the rest of us. And now Trump has appointed the wealthiest presidential cabinet in U.S. history: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9osRFq5setnoPUPUKg2dRL5i2DWP84eBue997DK0S2CWIHjqfxUEV-dBagqKphqCunNAhfGcaArDSTHazAwfrK6uhU6_r2mo7jd_lvP7NoRI8ApO1UGTDFkcka1xIB0zdWQaiDU-ST972BRnQ2SqYjF8HjGomBrFNT-CpTkAiwZmdGG5Wcfcc1zuMaby6V1K-24KH8NcVXiM5YPtRRHYBj0GJsfPiq9Ec01PA6ez2yxKxVuRIyGYfkUCoFD9zgsDKsHT2CRwaYigtSCasUqaCNCgQucnJIdW0zXUt6icjoQvH3ZAEOffeWIawFa4hlaCwSdGCGu84iBk8tmZ4RrKFjQ/4iv/-o7i4_PARe-DH3m2DXr0sA/h1/h001.0BRTogQqP_KY_orXOjth_oXpWU956XbYLREw8nMzxEI) **I have proudly introduced and cosponsored legislation to get Big Money out of politics.** My **_Stop Politicians Profiting from War Act_****** would ban members of Congress from profiting off of war when they vote to support wars and weapons manufacturing. I’m proud to support the **_Protecting Our Democracy Act_** to hold elected officials accountable and get dark money out of politics, the **_DISCLOSE Act_** to require additional transparency in elections, and the **_Democracy for All Amendment_** to overturn _Citizens United_ and limit corporate campaign spending while encouraging public campaign financing. [**Will you join me by adding your name and demand Congress get Big Money out of politics?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9osRFq5setnoPUPUKg2dRL5i2DWP84eBue997DK0S2CWIHjqfxUEV-dBagqKphqCuK5Ed5DK6AQ1sHWLpX_s5WpJsQN2PYcAZeekk2iHu_-LRSeWrmMSOwflTHgnekxLbzpbNoVvx3m3tfi6EBoqNv_EEKO_ujHm16L1IOlVobRHTNhi60AjaOc1W08Ixz8VivPmL-PIemXLn1WXlpAEdaxiqONN2g2-s8GFOy4UnHE7PQUWBYR1GimwJT1hJSueXJKaK3Avn5AyLWoZUzUNQCHCyDmn0oLDHzYsf2M2odG-POt48vPlvaNYMxcI89vtMC7tzG7bpCpN6YYFnE8fM5Q/4iv/-o7i4_PARe-DH3m2DXr0sA/h2/h001.ILmNWaCibBV93q-T63_5dtqCAAULfq0QM1QYPA2Sh6s) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9osRFq5setnoPUPUKg2dRL5i2DWP84eBue997DK0S2CWIHjqfxUEV-dBagqKphqCuDSn6d4T_42Ko_RMjRQ-52Zb_R2BUtkxdNYBbVQFF4wKg8D5toNyHeXZ6YH8kK0zpDAhjNOh1rmhJBfwChkcnvhk8YhUcgk04MwoR603DEzvjSrZ7voZckxWj53Qbf-qwFx-YPobx3X1BKpDdDEx6QPZDj7MAItNE9-tFf_X7bf_v6BBGP63bPsaZPi0tr4w7ayW3ZL9O6rX6WNqzVg1KR_D9pIdqTa4b_qEd40_R6uI96QnMUFpE9Q5QIFvtWvORJoo_Uznj0zS1IOoLuBGlnw/4iv/-o7i4_PARe-DH3m2DXr0sA/h3/h001.emAI6AZchHiS8jELqhUSs1EKdbXDqXiC801MkPYkYYc)

We will never stop fighting for policies and a government that puts everyday people first, not billionaires.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: I was a CEO. I value directness.
body:
There aren’t many Republicans I’m going all in to support.
So, forgive me for being blunt:

| |
---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy:

I was the CEO of a big company, I always appreciated when people were direct with me.

**[**So, forgive me for being blunt. I’m personally asking you to donate $10, $25, or even $50 to re-elect MAGA Warrior – Marsha Blackburn – to the U.S. Senate >>**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=702d13cb3f164d59a5bb93f822be3ef0&_e=W8QicO47fWi9sz5TLpi34sGYfZJr-4YlyphuHlrfexNfh99loO8GjHRtj0d9KiDzuCOxUG3apqjfeb3KhgKMYmBTI3XXKc0VLNTUSk25MjnvXdxZC-uufHuZH7RXfJzSCNaWeihuZg5W40MOVQT0hHkxW7QmRkuGC729u35o75CqT7dlz3lxRXEtfLPM1T_DRHEwZXmRPq2Mx-bTw_xtIJgvyooyNkFNfsGEKt6I8nPPTjPkBnbwHPB0JiPu-rnam_j3WNUvbh2xeYGhZf6X9ofw8niog-9L6M-74hO3sKlf_6fDERIlTgvqd6Lkd990gxht9x18QEhABMsNyDRw5n-bo_eruyDZul5YeBROoejg35vvMOU4UwPgtHDMeMpsLT86seAyvA03SuJEJ2oPxYHs77HM0kGjIO_Xkdc_PyAoXiHvNdjw8-THUxb81RbZku66KAiyRq4MoKDQUcTjgJ3eCDtdEDhdB9XQc0F1NdfO6tOrdW5NDKEVx--WifekaNJXIQSanWjjhoW904gNH5bimEZPuzhTsSPLYEUXN86WiaVbD1Z7JtMomoRrhclqEKyQpv7FDXslAIVq3uFIfCjexJTSu39ioF4KCc7P3IC-NJ8Yf2M2rT5QkPKtg4Qx8IEE0NI-nkT9zK0f_sN5OWY5JXtcpwlRIP_5vWa16qV47cd1ngyoGiYS3sIRy2Mr "So, forgive me for being blunt. I’m personally asking you to donate $10, $25, or even $50 to re-elect MAGA Warrior – Marsha Blackburn – to the U.S. Senate>> ")**

There aren't many Republicans I'm going all in to support.

President Trump -> **Without question. **

A few other strong America First patriots -> **Definitely.**

Senator Marsha Blackburn -> **You don 't even need to ask.**

The truth is: Marsha has to win re-election in order for Republicans to win back the Senate. It's one of the biggest races in the country. If we lose her critical seat in Tennessee, Democrats could control the Senate for the better part of a decade.

That's why I'm going the extra mile to send you this email right now.

**[If you agree Marsha is the bee’s knees in the Senate, I’m kindly asking you to donate directly to her campaign here >>](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=702d13cb3f164d59a5bb93f822be3ef0&_e=W8QicO47fWi9sz5TLpi34sGYfZJr-4YlyphuHlrfexNfh99loO8GjHRtj0d9KiDzuCOxUG3apqjfeb3KhgKMYmBTI3XXKc0VLNTUSk25MjnvXdxZC-uufHuZH7RXfJzSCNaWeihuZg5W40MOVQT0hHkxW7QmRkuGC729u35o75CqT7dlz3lxRXEtfLPM1T_DRHEwZXmRPq2Mx-bTw_xtIJgvyooyNkFNfsGEKt6I8nPPTjPkBnbwHPB0JiPu-rnajIGbmIJ7ZtgDfxqp-x8lICaEaSOJW4lPWqzAoqtZ-X1U_U7AbduWRFdDYgeo6rV0cK4l9y4PyYrR6o5FkwbJp0zuNLPJl7iy6-PCQRIhKem5hb_oMC6JmEWFi9IPGMzLxflgwLoRO37sIj_c5nzTf9UHo10nS7ipw6N7V9A6ZszNupk38U9s9yECDbMAiIOteBVbbzHCrOoPO_JlolC4_yTIZbIISlwFqMFYRGllyHqMYB89VNEJhVjy9y6YDMhGIfE1Fdjeiwz1gXr9i_II_bQT7sz6q44xraJrTyeHPDgkGT0md6C8v__tpqNrS0qnRXxQD7D0n6487atDMdiN_JmCFpJlr5_H5LhxRxybgp8UxwYUk1z1tTaWKQ__fd7AgVSH8x-l-u2LKoEEplw5rs96ChiORdd0QTVkLmgpUnp8yqdar2Pbic9Use9ckgjm "If you agree Marsha is the bee’s knees in the Senate, I’m kindly asking you to donate directly to her campaign here>>")**

You see, Marsha is in a bit of a predicament. Her opponent is a full-blown radical who wants to change America into a socialist country. Can you imagine one of the best defenders of the values we hold dear **REPLACED** by one of the most liberal candidates in the entire country???

I can't either. It would be a disaster for America.

We could really use your help at a moment like this. Please make a contribution before closing out of this email.

Thank you,
Vivek Ramaswamy

clean_body: There aren’t many Republicans I’m going all in to support. So, forgive me for being blunt: | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Vivek Ramaswamy: I was the CEO of a big company, I always appreciated when people were direct with me. "So, forgive me for being blunt. I’m personally asking you to donate $10, $25, or even $50 to re-elect MAGA Warrior – Marsha Blackburn – to the U.S. Senate>> " There aren't many Republicans I'm going all in to support. President Trump -> Without question. A few other strong America First patriots -> Definitely. Senator Marsha Blackburn -> You don 't even need to ask. The truth is: Marsha has to win re-election in order for Republicans to win back the Senate. It's one of the biggest races in the country. If we lose her critical seat in Tennessee, Democrats could control the Senate for the better part of a decade. That's why I'm going the extra mile to send you this email right now. "If you agree Marsha is the bee’s knees in the Senate, I’m kindly asking you to donate directly to her campaign here>>" | | | "DONATE HERE" You see, Marsha is in a bit of a predicament. Her opponent is a full-blown radical who wants to change America into a socialist country. Can you imagine one of the best defenders of the values we hold dear REPLACED by one of the most liberal candidates in the entire country??? I can't either. It would be a disaster for America. We could really use your help at a moment like this. Please make a contribution before closing out of this email. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy | | Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add https:///info@updates.marshablackburn.com?recurring=true&utmcampaign=20240722CS-MAGANEWS-2.114677t1518308-1043&extid=20240722CS-MAGANEWS-2.114677t1518308-1043 to your address book. name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]Adam Schiff for Senate

I have some important news to share with you,
Derek:

Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official
named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]FIRST ON FOX: Attorney General Bondi has authorized a special
prosecutor, Ed Martin, to investigate allegations of mortgage fraud
involving Sen. Adam Schiff and Letitia James

Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the
District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent
insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other —
and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it.

Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As
Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump
administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs,
urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers
of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than
follow his unethical edicts.

Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero
prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending
insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing
bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed
neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly.

Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous
nomination.

When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed
Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to
go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list.

And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the
president’s political retribution, but his own, as well.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1005&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]Derek, this
is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out,
fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you
have my back and chip in to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his
sham investigation?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1006&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]DONATE

Derek,
Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official
named Ed Martin to go after me.

Martin is the head of a “weaponization” office that is tasked with going
after the president’s political enemies. After having led the effort to
kill his nomination for U.S. Attorney, I am at the top of the list.

I won’t back down. Not now. Not ever. I will keep fighting for the rule of
law with everything I’ve got.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1007&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]But I can’t do it alone — especially when Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, and
Ed Martin are personally coming after me. Please rush in a contribution to
help me fight back.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1015?c0=q32025_abs_em.yMOq2I&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1008&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]EXPRESS DONATE $10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1016?c0=q32025_abs_em.Buknaj&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1009&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]EXPRESS DONATE $25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1017?c0=q32025_abs_em.uHcj1U&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1010&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]EXPRESS DONATE $50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1018?c0=q32025_abs_em.JaOjw6&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1011&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]EXPRESS DONATE $100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1019?c0=q32025_abs_em.9BFHaA&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]EXPRESS DONATE $250

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Thank you, and more soon as we learn more.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250808_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1014&akid=8876%2E5257348%2EOpCllA ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner; text Schiff to 724433

name: All On The Line
subject: The Voting Rights Act is at risk
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The Supreme Court is opening up a path to gut the Voting Rights Act through a gerrymandering case coming out of Louisiana.
|
---

Peter,
Thjis week was the 60th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act — the crown jewel of the Civil Rights Movement. The Voting Rights Act makes America a better nation by expanding and protecting voters’ access to the ballot, particularly voters of color.
**But right now, its future is in danger. Sixty years after its passage and after decades of courts affirming it, the Supreme Court just announced it would consider whether the Voting Rights Act is constitutional.**
In a moment when our democracy is under unprecedented, extreme electoral attacks, the most effective law at protecting the right to vote in American history is at risk. _This is an all-hands-on-deck moment for our movement._
**[Make a donation today to help All On The Line keep up the fight to protect voting rights at every level – from the Texas legislature to far beyond.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112988494/562273433/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_VRA60th_email_20250808-AOTL-Tier1-VRA60th_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250808-AOTL-Tier1-VRA60th_&utm_campaign=VRA60th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZjlmN2EzLTk0NzQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vS2bYT6ktA6hA0u2aNWI-sNX6lwTMQikzuf8YTQCDHo=)**
You might remember that the Supreme Court decided to rehear _Louisiana v. Callais,_ the case involving Louisiana’s congressional map. Originally, the map included just one Black-opportunity district out of the state’s six, despite the fact that African Americans make up one-third of the state of Louisiana. Two years ago, the same Supreme Court ruled in _Allen v. Milligan_ that a similar map in Alabama was in violation of the Voting Rights Act — prompting a lower court to order Louisiana to redraw its map to include two Black-opportunity districts.
Now the Supreme Court wants to take another look, announcing it wants to consider whether the redrawn, fairer map violates the 14th Amendment rights of non-Black citizens. Put another way, we will soon see arguments in front of the highest court in the land that the _Voting Rights Act itself is unconstitutional._
**For anti-democracy extremists, this is their end goal: To gut the Voting Rights Act and run rampant with gerrymandering. They’re actively fighting this on all fronts — from redrawing Texas’s already-gerrymandered maps to gutting the Voting Rights Act through the courts.**
[**That’s why we have to fight back against this extremism with all our strength. In this existential moment for our democracy — and on the 60th anniversary of the Voting Rights Act — make a donation to fund our grassroots movement and fight back with everything we’ve got.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/112988495/562273434/174172392?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_VRA60th_email_20250808-AOTL-Tier1-VRA60th_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250808-AOTL-Tier1-VRA60th_&utm_campaign=VRA60th&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJmZjlmN2EzLTk0NzQtZjAxMS04ZGM5LTYwNDViZGE5ZDk2YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=vS2bYT6ktA6hA0u2aNWI-sNX6lwTMQikzuf8YTQCDHo=)

Peter,

Now that we’re just past the mid-point of this Congressional session, we’re looking back at everything Marie has accomplished for our district – and looking to the work still ahead.

From putting our tax dollars to work here at home, to speaking up when our values aren’t being represented, working across the aisle to deliver bipartisan solutions and more, Marie is staying true to her promises.
> Since taking office, Marie has held **dozens of town halls, community roundtables, and mobile office hour sessions**.
>

clean_body: | | Peter – Marie’s community-first approach has put her squarely in the crosshairs of far-right extremists whose only goal is to expand their power by further sowing division and chaos. With our race still in the national spotlight, we must be ready for any hurdles on the road ahead. There’s no time to lose: = – Kashia Begin Previous Message: Peter, Now that we’re just past the mid-point of this Congressional session, we’re looking back at everything Marie has accomplished for our district – and looking to the work still ahead. From putting our tax dollars to work here at home, to speaking up when our values aren’t being represented, working across the aisle to deliver bipartisan solutions and more, Marie is staying true to her promises. Since taking office, Marie has held dozens of town halls, community roundtables, and mobile office hour sessions. And this year alone, she has introduced 30 bipartisan bills , cast 213 votes on the House floor (nearly 70% of which were bipartisan), was named to the prestigious House Appropriations Committee , and just last month voted against a bloated partisan budget that explodes the deficit and funds tax cuts for the rich at the expense of everyday families. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = – Team Marie | | | = | Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is a fifth-generation Washingtonian, a small business owner and a pro-choice mother. body:
Ken Paxton is trying to scare us into silence. | Peter, On Sunday, August 3rd, Texas Democrats broke quorum and left the state to block Trump’s power grab as he tries to steal five Congressional seats in order to hold the majority in the U.S. House. This wasn’t easy. They left their families, homes, and careers behind to protect the people they represent from having their voices silenced. Now, not only is Greg Abbott threatening the Democrats who walked out with fines, arrest, and even removal from office, but **Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into Powered by People for standing with Texas Democrats.** Rather than listening to the people, the Governor and the impeached Attorney General are trying to intimidate us into silence. Turns out they don’t like it when you fight back! So let’s take this fight to them. With as much as we got, for as long as it takes. clean_body: Ken Paxton is trying to scare us into silence. | Peter, On Sunday, August 3rd, Texas Democrats broke quorum and left the state to block Trump’s power grab as he tries to steal five Congressional seats in order to hold the majority in the U.S. House. This wasn’t easy. They left their families, homes, and careers behind to protect the people they represent from having their voices silenced. Now, not only is Greg Abbott threatening the Democrats who walked out with fines, arrest, and even removal from office, but Attorney General Ken Paxton has launched an investigation into Powered by People for standing with Texas Democrats. Rather than listening to the people, the Governor and the impeached Attorney General are trying to intimidate us into silence. Turns out they don’t like it when you fight back! So let’s take this fight to them. With as much as we got, for as long as it takes. The future of our country hangs in the balance. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Powered by People and Roy Cooper: | = = = = = = In the fight with you, Beto O’Rourke mailto:info@roycooper.com | Cooper for North Carolina PO Box 1190 Raleigh, NC 27602 Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina Contributions or gifts to Cooper for North Carolina are not tax deductible. | | Hi there, Peter, I recently had the opportunity to meet with my fellow Democratic Lieutenant Governors at a DLGA Summit. Selfie included below ⬇️ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112989045/562275173/-76487485?source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_080825_DLGA_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ5YWUzZi05Nzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw6pOtFw5OAp9KvJk_6ZMawU-Q6TyyIvwfkAeUTESuo=) Getting to chat and brainstorm with my colleagues was incredibly inspiring given the challenges our country and our Commonwealth are facing right now.

[**Peter, if you’d like to support me as I take on all of the challenges the Trump administration is sending our way, would you chip in just $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112989046/562275174/-76487485?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_080825_DLGA_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ5YWUzZi05Nzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw6pOtFw5OAp9KvJk_6ZMawU-Q6TyyIvwfkAeUTESuo=) | | **[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112989047/562275175/-76487485?amount=10&source=SBD_AD_EM_FR_080825_DLGA_90DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjQ5YWUzZi05Nzc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Aw6pOtFw5OAp9KvJk_6ZMawU-Q6TyyIvwfkAeUTESuo=)**

body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ed1wsa9wu0tizdlef14kedlce98z4qejje0mh0ft0yevxnwqyabz3weruipli04ceupp9w3lov4pluc58b1xc52af9v1romp3ra3d0ibfs0nxaomnvshf7fgdcfpjl9d16vw1ty5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol1ed1wsa9wu0tizdlef14kedlce98z4qejje0mh0ft0yevxnwqyabz3weruipli04ceupp9w3lov4pluc58b1xc52af9v1romp3ra3d0ibfs0nxaomnvshf7fgdcfpjl9d16vw1ty5w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t0p142&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Voter Action Project Registration Team
subject: A tidal wave of new voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We can't stress this enough: For less than the price of a latte at your local coffee shop, you can help cover the costs of registering a new voter.
We have to start now to be ready for next year's elections. RUSH $24 or more today and help us register a tidal wave of new voters nationwide >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=080825_2&amount=24]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=080825_2&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=080825_2&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=080825_2&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080825_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=080825_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=BZEnvcRoML5MQ5a4fN6zMCvJxye9Tuw%2FQviqQ9rBGldabXB8NEL6j%2F43P1%2FgBmZzI95JVBzjuRWohkZg0BagmboQHEZiplJrD7h%2FO2NV0FrubMMbF1Mne0Sd4%2BmOIOYWwKSVYAHxbhQBbL3cdA0q82DvbmOyMLGGkvI0dTauUqfLFP7%2FsAl41KilAnVCmyyATMUvKpZz5wZBwwY9naB%2BkrQcf9Uj2BVqVZhF1TFIG8D%2BNb6m5CWBzr4HPB7DMnZCwdtuQmOvXx5FEqpQFbt7q%2BEI1qirisMmsnRL4VihUbUK3x9wwTEq0ZR4jYirz%2FfvZ95GnJ5v036f0fuQxtvn4DiLZDtXX4dPXjTOiNTXPh3qo5FDyxZX7aSlPPVddq2GAVyjXoslUqnSBDqZuaWDLuQ4IqkhtJZXugrkXWE4DnY%3D .

name: Deb Haaland
subject: Can I show you a few photos from a recent trip I took to Mora and Las Vegas?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Take a look at these photos.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)
Hey — it's Deb.
I’m emailing to tell you about a recent day I spent campaigning in Mora and Las Vegas, NM.
Before I share my recap of our day on the trail, **[would you chip in $5 to help us plan future campaign events? Every donation makes a meaningful difference in our budget as we travel across the state to meet voters.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)**
[****](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)_I want our strong supporters like you to know what our campaign is up to._
I started the day in Mora County, where I took a firsthand look at the devastating burn scars caused by the Hermits Peak Calf Canyon fires. It was a solemn reminder of the damage caused by the most destructive wildfire in our state’s history – and of the importance of investing in the people and systems we need to fight wildfires and protect our lands and communities.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)_We drove together through some of the damaged sites._
Next, we drove to Morphy Lake, where I joined acequia leaders to hear about their priorities to protect our sacred water. As part of our gathering, I returned some water from one of the acequias back to the lake.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)_Like many New Mexicans, I learned the value of water from my grandparents._
Afterwards, we all had time to enjoy a delicious and beloved New Mexico staple, Frito pies!
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)_Who doesn't love a Frito pie?_
To end our wonderful day, we listened to some live music in the plaza at Friday Night al Fresco. I got to say hello to so many new people, listen to their stories, and share our bold, compassionate vision for New Mexico’s future.
Thanks for taking the time to hear what my team and I have been up to recently! **Days like these on the campaign trail are so crucial as we scale up our campaign.** [**Will you contribute $5 – or any amount you can afford – to fund future campaign stops for my team and me?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250808_1_recap?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-3682&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250808-1&t=2&refcode2=3682_400544_5kRUoC&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=3682%2E400544%2E5kRUoC)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I know this team is not intimidated by hard work
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
We have to make each day left in this campaign count.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250808_2_spanberger?refcode=em20250808-1756&amount=5&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)
We have less than 100 days to go until Election Day!
I'm the only Democrat in the country who can flip a Governor's seat blue, and we're in the homestretch now. [**Before I lay out all we're doing to win the biggest race of 2025, will you consider splitting a contribution between my campaign and Chris Pappas to power our work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250808_2_spanberger?refcode=em20250808-1756&amount=5&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250808_2_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-1756&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)**
Since launching this campaign, I have visited communities all across the Commonwealth — from Farmville to Fairfax, Richmond to Roanoke — to hear directly from Virginians about the challenges they face.
_And that's informed what we communicate and how we spend our resources._
My opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, has shown she's in lockstep with Trump's agenda. She downplayed the White House laying off thousands of Virginia workers by saying, "don't fret." And she boasted that Trump's disastrous tax law does "so many great things." _We're talking about a policy that cuts $1 trillion from Medicaid and slashes resources for public schools here._
I've given voters my word: **As Governor, I will always put them first and stand up to the chaos coming out of Washington.**
We can't be defined by what we're against — we must focus on moving our Commonwealth forward.
That's why I have announced my plans to grow our workforce and raise the minimum wage, to reduce the cost of childcare, and to make life more affordable from healthcare and prescription drugs to housing costs and utility bills.
With the days left in this campaign, I'm counting on a surge of grassroots donations to:
✅ Visit every corner of Virginia.
✅ Reach undecided voters with ads and counter the GOP's attacks.
✅ Build the largest organizing operation our Commonwealth's ever seen.
It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond.
[**Everything depends on us raising what we need from grassroots donors. So, I'm asking: will you pitch in $5 or more to my campaign and Chris Pappas to help us win on November 4th and in the years ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250808_2_spanberger?refcode=em20250808-1756&amount=5&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250808_2_spanberger?amount=5&refcode=em20250808-1756&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)**
I'm grateful to have you on my team,
Abigail Spanberger
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250808-2?t=1&refcode2=1756_582294_erF-sQ&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1756%2E582294%2EerF-sQ)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

It's a major undertaking, but I know this team is not intimidated by hard work. No matter what the National Republicans throw at us, we'll be ready to respond. I'm grateful to have you on my team, Abigail Spanberger New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?
