clean_body: Nashville Shooter Manifesto Update [INSIDE JW] COURT GREENLIGHTS JUDICIAL WATCH LAWSUIT TO CLEAN UP OREGON VOTER ROLLS [] Judicial Watch continues to make progress in cleaning up voter rolls across the country. A federal court in Oregon ruled [] that our lawsuit filed on behalf of the Constitution Party of Oregon and two registered voters to force the clean-up of Oregon’s voter rolls may proceed. Our lawsuit alleges that Oregon violated the National Voter Registration Act [] (NVRA), which requires states to “conduct a general program that makes a reasonable effort to remove” from the official voter rolls “the names of ineligible voters” who have died or changed residence. In June, the U.S. Department of Justice filed a statement of interest [] in this lawsuit. In a June 6 Justice Department press release, Assistant Attorney General for the Civil Rights Division Harmeet Dhillon said [ “Accurate voter registration rolls are critical to ensure that elections in Oregon are conducted fairly, accurately, and without fraud.... States have specific obligations under the list maintenance provisions of the NVRA, and the Department of Justice will vigorously enforce those requirements.” We initially filed the lawsuit [] in October 2024 to enforce basic voter list maintenance provisions under Section 8 of the NVRA after uncovering [] a broad failure to clean up voter rolls in dozens of Oregon counties (Judicial Watch, et al. v. The State of Oregon et al. [] (No. 6:24-cv-01783)). In 2018, the Supreme Court confirmed [] that such removals are mandatory. In our complaint, we argue that Oregon’s voter rolls contain large numbers of old, inactive registrations and that 29 of Oregon’s 36 counties removed few or no registrations as required by federal election law. We assert that Oregon and 35 of its counties had overall registration rates exceeding 100%; and that Oregon has the highest known inactive registration rate of any state in the nation. Recently, federal courts in California and Illinois separately ruled [] that our lawsuits may proceed against those states to force them to clean up their voter rolls. Judicial Watch announced [] in May that its work led to the removal of more than five million ineligible names from voter rolls nationwide. We applaud the court’s decision to allow our case to continue in our effort to clean up voter rolls in Oregon. We now have three federal lawsuits against three states to clean potentially millions of names from the voter rolls. As you know, we are a national leader in voting integrity and voting rights. Our team of experienced voting rights attorneys stopped discriminatory elections in Hawaii and cleaned up voter rolls across the country, among other achievements []. Robert Popper, a Judicial Watch senior attorney, leads our election law program. Popper was previously in the Voting Section of the Civil Rights Division of the Justice Department, where he managed voting rights investigations, litigations, consent decrees, and settlements in dozens of states. Recently, the Commonwealth of Kentucky reported that 735,000 [] ineligible voter registrations had been removed from its voter rolls since 2019 by the State Board of Elections as part of its 2018 consent decree settling a lawsuit by Judicial Watch. As part of its 2022 settlement [], New York City alone has removed 918,139 ineligible names from its rolls. Recent data show 477,056 [] removals between March 2023 and February 2025, which is in addition to the 441,083 previously reported removals. In July, we filed its opening brief [] to the Supreme Court of the United States in a case filed on behalf of Congressman Mike Bost and two presidential electors, who are before the court to vindicate their standing to challenge an Illinois law extending Election Day for 14 days beyond the date established by federal law (Rep. Michael J. Bost, Laura Pollastrini, and Susan Sweeney v. The Illinois State Board of Elections and Bernadette Matthews [ (No. 1:22-cv-02754, 23-2644, 24-568)). MORE NASHVILLE SHOOTER MANIFESTO DOCUMENTS RELEASED TO JUDICIAL WATCH Judicial Watch received another 485 pages [] from the “manifesto” of the March 27, 2023, shooter, Audrey Hale (also known as Aiden Hale), who was the perpetrator of The Covenant School shooting in Nashville, TN. The records detail the shooter’s violent thoughts, the targeting and planning of the shooting attack on The Covenant School, and transgender-related obsessions. Police reported [] that Hale, 28, broke into the elementary school in Nashville, TN, where she had been a student, and shot and killed three students and three adults. In March 2025, Metro Nashville Police Department published [] its investigative case summary. The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) released the pages in response to our FOIA lawsuit (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:23-cv-01483)). After multiple releases containing zero records, the FBI finally began producing pages, stating they were no longer subject to law enforcement proceedings. Many names and faces in the photos were redacted, as were entire pages. These are the writings of a deeply disturbed individual, but there was no point in the Biden FBI hiding them. We appreciate the Trump administration’s transparency. This information may possibly help Americans avoid tragedies like this in the future. We previously obtained 112 pages [] of records in April 2025, and an additional 231 pages [] in June 2025—bringing the total number of pages released through this lawsuit to 828. The full “manifesto” consists of 2,056 pages, and the FBI is continuing to produce additional pages to us. Our lawsuit also seeks materials provided to the FBI by local law enforcement. The FBI is withholding these documents, claiming they are categorically exempt from disclosure under FOIA. We continue to press for their public release. In a separate case, in May 2023, we filed an open records lawsuit [] on behalf of retired Hamilton County Sheriff James Hammond and the Tennessee Firearms Association, Inc. (“TFA”) (Hammond et al. v. Metropolitan Govt of Nashville et al. [] (No. 23-0538-III)). The court later consolidated our lawsuit with several others related to release of public records from The Covenant School shooting. TRUMP ADMINISTRATION SAVING MILLIONS IN ‘SCIENCE’ GRANTS TO DEI PROJECTS The radicals running the Biden administration were liberally distributing your tax dollars through the National Science Foundation to their pet DEI projects at universities. Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog reports [ The Trump administration is saving American taxpayers a substantial amount of money by terminating [] [ of “science” grants that fund all sorts of preposterous Diversity, Equity and Inclusion (DEI) initiatives at dozens of universities and a few nonprofits throughout the United States. The cash is disbursed by the National Science Foundation (NSF), established by Congress in 1950 to promote the progress of science, advance national health, prosperity, and welfare and to secure national defense. Instead, under the Biden administration the agency went on a remarkable DEI spending frenzy that has supported a multitude of exclusionary leftist projects at private and public academic institutions nationwide as well as organizations that claim to advance minority causes. One of the country’s largest public universities alone has lost tens of millions of dollars in NSF grants identified by the Trump administration as supporting blatant DEI projects that are unlikely to further the agency’s mission. With an undergraduate enrollment of 142,000, Arizona State University (ASU) has received around $28.5 million from the NSF for over two dozen DEI initiatives recently placed on the chopping block. Among them is a $2.4 million project called Black Girls as Creators described as an intersectional learning ecosystem toward gendered racial equity in artificial intelligence education to help black girls focus on intersectionality and racial equity. An “institutional transformational” project that aims to reshape faculty policies for gender equity and intersectionality received nearly $3 million. A program that positioned engineering faculty to support black students through awareness, knowledge, capacity building and community got $733,633 and over half a million dollars went to a community transformation experiment that claims to increase justice, equity, diversity, and inclusion in academic standards. Public universities on opposite sides of the country are losing a total of $2 million for identical projects titled “Challenging Anti-Black-Racism in Civil and Environmental Engineering Curriculum” that claim to serve the national public interest by establishing education practices that acknowledge low-income communities of color are disproportionately exposed to air and water pollution. The University of South Florida in Tampa received $1.5 million for the environmental justice initiative and the University of California Berkeley $500,000. UC Berkeley also lost a $1.6 million allocation from the NSF to help center scientific and environmental literacy around the voices of communities of color since, according to the grant document, the entire field is “aligned with dominant views that can marginalize, exclude, and erase the knowledge and expertise of communities of color.” The renowned northern California university asserts that its study will “contribute new understandings of how race and culture influence learning, as well as how racism and biases have shaped research to date.” The list of canceled DEI science grants is extensive with many of the hefty awards—most around a million dollars—using similar language in the name of combatting widespread discrimination in the field. The University of Denver in Colorado got north of a million dollars to mobilize equity and raise inclusivity in Science, Technology, Engineering, and Mathematics (STEM) by creating a special coalition that will hire more faculty with “intersectional identities” and increase women as well as other underrepresented groups. The University of Missouri in St. Louis also got over a million dollars to advance equity in STEM academic careers by cultivating a climate where women, African Americans, Hispanics, and other historically underrepresented groups will thrive. The City University of New York (CUNY) received $999,839 to implement institutional transformation emphasizing the advancement of Black, Indigenous, and People of Color (BIPOC) faculty. A south Florida public university received $999,853 to focus on inclusive support for gender diversity and intersectional minorities, especially Latina, and African American women in hiring and retention. Among the nonprofits that saw their government money cut is the Children’s Museum of Pittsburgh, which received nearly $600,000 to address accessibility and inclusion issues at visitor-serving organizations such as museums, botanical gardens, and zoos that “tend to serve disproportionately white, able-bodied, and high-income audiences.” A Public Broadcasting Station (PBS) in New York, got over $3 million from the government to better engage underserved families in STEM by targeting low-income Latinx (a gender-neutral term fabricated by the left) families with media and text-based mechanisms. The stated goal is to build knowledge about how innovative, culturally responsive tools can help Latinx and low-income families engage in fun STEM learning at home. These are just some examples from a drawn-out list documenting the waste of over a billion dollars spent by the previous administration to appease the left. The complete list [] of cancelled NSF grants can be viewed here. **Did you see the DLCC in _The New York Times_? ** [](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDeUFlx0nSsedpxN7Wr7zCdl81rFp3mVpfeGD_3C3vGIrW7p8lm1SDiagvkmd2pKAdifcag21gtL68UrWs6_iFZiN6dJPP4eriIQbPrf-8w7ndm_RaPmwA1E6GMrU7cx9HC9odPIHhSgkEQbT-2GHX7K13YhC1b53YsRq-oFz4WIzJxjDwgN7g4X0yUQolIR4WImQK_YG6xBeBjzc3YPrwkQmut1I_sqYZZEmJGZwrepTYJ3JEhul8SMe4vf54z29u8TZn5ZtVJdKEk5BX2OnDA52BxgJWxgZnWdfjfyH5AwKF78Yq5psEWAlAwWg8CxFdWtFSGAuybOcyGj08go_Y9iCew9jpaaU3hL_vCKqJJwAaY4WaLGdXIum2iuvFVmPh53FOAwlD5emsZpVJEVP_KQ/4iv/TeIK4OW1QzCXpLMBZyW6Wg/h0/h001.ortC9fdW3V-ZC7EqFWfB35kBX1FdQagwpmCxz9tRrWs) _The New York Times, August 4, 2025._ Team DLCC is getting national attention for calling state Democrats into action to fight back against Republican gerrymandering. _**Here’s what you need to know:**_
* State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, drawing over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative seats.
* Republican gerrymandering in the states is one of the biggest obstacles to Democrats’ progress in this country.
* With enough support and resources, **state Democrats can use their power to pursue redistricting mid-cycle in order to protect our democracy** and expand Democratic power to even the playing field.

We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. clean_body: We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. | | | | | ---|--- Did you see the DLCC in The New York Times? The New York Times, August 4, 2025. Team DLCC is getting national attention for calling state Democrats into action to fight back against Republican gerrymandering. Here’s what you need to know: State legislatures play a critical role in the redistricting process, drawing over 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative seats. Republican gerrymandering in the states is one of the biggest obstacles to Democrats’ progress in this country. With enough support and resources, state Democrats can use their power to pursue redistricting mid-cycle in order to protect our democracy and expand Democratic power to even the playing field. We are not going to sit back and allow the GOP to continue cheating the system to keep themselves in power. The fight for our future starts in the states, and right now, it starts with redistricting. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC ** | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Ten Paradoxes of Our Age
body:
|
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf5lxIteknop5I6ITme3mct50&s=OCICMHEAMEABHNFJ&req=l%3DD0I2xuf5abIteknop5I6ITme3mct50%26s%3DIPOGKFGMACFOOICL)
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | | [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf5lxIteknop5I7ITme3mct50&s=OCICMHEAMEABHNFJ&req=l%3DD0I2xuf5abIteknop5I7ITme3mct50%26s%3DIPOGKFGMACFOOICL)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how our world seems full of contradictions lately?
Prosperity is rising. Yet freedom, in many places, is retreating.

Global diplomacy expands. But so do threats.

Cultural traditions persist. Still, they're strained by mass migration and ideological division.
---
|
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf5lxIteknop5I8ITme3mct50&s=OCICMHEAMEABHNFJ&req=l%3DD0I2xuf5abIteknop5I8ITme3mct50%26s%3DIPOGKFGMACFOOICL)
---
| | These aren't just abstract concepts--they're reshaping the world we live in right now.

And if we don't understand them, we risk misunderstanding the forces at work and misjudging our response.

That's why the Hoover Institution is sharing a **powerful new analysis from Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson:_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_.**

In it, he outlines ten defining paradoxes of our time, including:
* Why economic growth doesn't always bring political freedom
* How diplomacy can coexist with rising global insecurity
* What happens when cultural pressures outpace integration

Whether you're concerned about America's future role in the world or seeking clarity amid global confusion, this piece offers a timely perspective.

These paradoxes are reshaping our world, and understanding them is crucial.

"If we do not understand the paradoxes of our age, we will continue to be confused by the outcomes." -- Victor Davis Hanson

**Download your free copy of '_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_ ' now and gain the insights you need to navigate our complex world.**

Access your free copy today: [https://resources.hoover.org/ten-paradoxes-of-our-age](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf5lxIteknop5I9ITme3mct50&s=OCICMHEAMEABHNFJ&req=l%3DD0I2xuf5abIteknop5I9ITme3mct50%26s%3DIPOGKFGMACFOOICL)Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

[Make a Gift to Hoover](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuf5lxIteknop5IaITme3mct50&s=OCICMHEAMEABHNFJ&req=l%3DD0I2xuf5abIteknop5IaITme3mct50%26s%3DIPOGKFGMACFOOICL)
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA

subject: This is something that I really care about as a vetern

Patriot,

I wanted to tell you about something I care about - the MAGA Act.

Before you jump to conclusions, it's probably not what you're thinking, but it will help Make America Great Again.

The MAGA Act, or Make American Guns Again, would ensure that all American small arms used in the defence of our great country are produced here at home. This would eliminate the chance of subversive forces sabotaging our supply lines, and ensure our men and women are firing only the best, **American made weapons.**

I know this isn't as exciting as the tax cuts or the sweeping reforms President Trump and our majority have made, but it is just as important.

We cannot mess around when it comes to our defence, and our soldiers deserve the best.

If you're willing to help me pass this initiative, I need your help to get it through Congress before it gets bogged down in bureaucratic red tape and forgotten about.

[ If you have a few seconds, please click HERE or the button below. ](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=d11f17cb3dac47f5890269162dbbe06f&_e=fG-Jq9uhDdtdJwfYmZB6dXYyHelyXu99IWEwX_aqbzJfMEL7GIVpHFa-QsFQ6R5Cpjfm7XUpdwGOApVFcP4Scw2o97izAfn6_uNmk8vtXIPUrM5Gzj808XuWtwtdaMS1aBNHuYqnXfyG-qVYHKuNbVgyd_UxivkNrIS3oLD2VqTYoAyE4uCG_PEti-nTiHtCf2AmZdpnc_oJ7ZFHRHAz_M_HlpOJkiF7af9X4qQ2B69tWdq_nxApnCutz-Jo5kHWEQrCNcsta1u6gdNf2IF9AfqXsE0zu1fyQ2OXiTQxNiGEONTcaRgOGq97CujNNo3uouEeZ65lOrgCyz7SPWORsnCEeZIETdApLFfodriwDgB4QiQzFTnt_pwS666sZU21EbQajW2GmPdPfdV9QzkrI6dOIqQq3-FvMv5SN7Lb_fDXrO8zGXdHRkFlDPQE3f6KsbCUyVKJwfKMvw_XY8qZTSFSSw8fUtvYRAeOQMSgI7W_uZkngTaZ5qMduUbvlWSy)

President Donald Trump has **[reportedly secretly authorized military force](https://substack.com/redirect/1833f07c-0fa9-4bab-b690-548c8134eb02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** against Latin American drug cartels designated as foreign terrorist organizations, giving U.S. forces permission to engage groups trafficking fentanyl and other drugs across the US-Mexico border.
"The president is determined to not just dismantle - but completely destroy - [Venezuelan dictator Nicolas] Maduro's Cartel de Los Soles and obliterate their operations in the Western Hemisphere," a source close to the White House said, **[according to the NY Post.](https://substack.com/redirect/8f5849e6-d5fa-4bd3-aede-577db2bb2660?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1833f07c-0fa9-4bab-b690-548c8134eb02?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The anti-cartel effort involves multiple agencies** including Defense, Justice, Homeland Security, Intelligence, and Treasury departments, with a particular focus on "completely destroying" Venezuelan dictator Nicolas Maduro's Cartel de Los Soles operations.
* **Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum clarified that U.S. military action would not involve Mexican territory** , stating the operations have "nothing to do with Mexican territory" and are focused on U.S. country matters.
* **The administration has escalated pressure through multiple channels** , including a $50 million bounty on Maduro, extradition of 29 cartel members, tariff threats against Mexico and Canada, and sanctions on violent groups like Cartel del Noreste and Tren de Aragua.
"Maduro uses foreign terrorist organizations like TdA (Tren de Aragua), Sinaloa and Cartel of the Suns (Cartel de Soles) to bring deadly violence to our country," Bondi said in a video message. "He is one of the largest narco-traffickers in the world and a threat to our national security."

* * *
**[Together with Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/9c084817-99de-4474-8cb1-df35f4150e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Investors are watching this fast-growing tech company](https://substack.com/redirect/9c084817-99de-4474-8cb1-df35f4150e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c084817-99de-4474-8cb1-df35f4150e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
No, it's not Nvidia... It's **Mode Mobile** , 2023's fastest-growing software company according to Deloitte.
Their EarnPhone has helped users earn and save over $325M, driving $75M+ in revenue and **[an eye-popping 32,481% growth](https://substack.com/redirect/9c084817-99de-4474-8cb1-df35f4150e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).** And having secured partnerships with **Walmart** and **Best Buy** , Mode's not stopping there...
Like Uber turned vehicles into income-generating assets, Mode is turning smartphones into **[an easy passive income source](https://substack.com/redirect/9c084817-99de-4474-8cb1-df35f4150e20?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.**** The difference is that you have a chance to invest in Mode's pre-IPO offering at just $0.30/share.
They've just been granted the stock ticker _**$MODE**_ by the Nasdaq and the time to invest at their current share price is running out.

| | Team — It’s simple: Republicans are scared of losing power in next year’s midterm elections, so they’re trying to cheat. Look no further than the Texas GOP’s new gerrymandering scheme, which could allow them to cling onto House control: **CNN: “Texas Republicans release new House maps as they attempt to take five Democratic seats”** As the state was recovering from devastating floods, Texas Governor Greg Abbott called for a special session — not to solely discuss how to support communities, but to discuss how to redraw the congressional map in Republicans’ favor ahead of the 2026 midterms. This is an unprecedented move — and is a deliberate attempt to silence voices and further disenfranchise voters. It goes against everything we stand for at Fair Fight. They’d rather gerrymander maps instead of working to earn votes. [**At Fair Fight, we believe voters should choose their leaders — not the other way around. That’s why we oppose this brazen powergrab by MAGA. But in this moment, when Republican politicians are gerrymandering to entrench minority rule, the only way to protect fair representation is to fight back with equal force. Defending democracy means using every tool we’ve got — because the other side already is. Normally, maps are redrawn every 10 years based on new census data. But recently, maps are being redrawn more frequently thanks to extreme partisan politics.
Just last month, the Florida Supreme Court upheld a map that dilutes the power of Black voters in the state, gutting a district that was historically Black. They broke up the district into FOUR separate districts in an effort to unseat a long-time Black representative.
And now, a case currently pending before the U.S. Supreme Court — which is dominated by a far-right, MAGA majority — could potentially dismantle the Voting Rights Act as we know it.
**Gerrymandering is undemocratic — and it’s long been used to suppress Black political power.** Now, MAGA politicians are escalating to rig the 2026 midterms and entrench minority rule. In moments like this, protecting fair representation means fighting fire with fire — we can't pretend this is politics as usual.
**From Texas’ attempt to disenfranchise voters in order to pick up five congressional seats, to the upcoming voter purge in Georgia, it’s not difficult to see the Republican strategy: Suppress voters, silence the people, and remain in power by engaging in the most anti-democratic strategy possible. **
[**Fair Fight is fighting back — on the ground, in the courts, and at the ballot box. clean_body: What Texas Republicans are forcing through should alarm all of us. Here’s why: | | | Team — It’s simple: Republicans are scared of losing power in next year’s midterm elections, so they’re trying to cheat. Look no further than the Texas GOP’s new gerrymandering scheme, which could allow them to cling onto House control: CNN: “Texas Republicans release new House maps as they attempt to take five Democratic seats” As the state was recovering from devastating floods, Texas Governor Greg Abbott called for a special session — not to solely discuss how to support communities, but to discuss how to redraw the congressional map in Republicans’ favor ahead of the 2026 midterms. This is an unprecedented move — and is a deliberate attempt to silence voices and further disenfranchise voters. It goes against everything we stand for at Fair Fight. Hi Peter, I'm Suhas Subramanyam — a dad, a lifelong public servant, and the Democratic Congressman for Virginia's 10th District.
_**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112992884/562287230/-1771017186?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgxNGUwMDgtYTY3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QlJkOZ4DX2MNToyvwizSsj2wWqk0xT1XUdR3vXUg_Jk=)**_
I'm writing today because I believe Virginia holds the keys to Democrats winning in 2025 _and_ 2026.
This November, we have a real chance to flip the Governor's office by electing Abigail Spanberger. Abigail is a fearless leader and a proven champion for Virginians — and if we win that race, we'll take a huge step forward for reproductive freedom, public education, and the future of our Commonwealth.
But here's the thing: **if we want to take back power at the state level and build momentum toward flipping the U.S. House, we must also protect the gains we've already made.**
I represent VA-10 — a true swing district that I won by just 4.6% in 2024. National Republicans have already marked my seat as a top target. My opponent announced last month, and outside groups are already sniffing around.
That's why I'm asking: [_**Will you split a donation today between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger's to help us win next year and protect our path forward?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112992885/562287231/-1771017186?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-08-08_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTgxNGUwMDgtYTY3NC1mMDExLThkYzktNjA0NWJkYTlkOTZiIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=QlJkOZ4DX2MNToyvwizSsj2wWqk0xT1XUdR3vXUg_Jk=)

clean_body: I'm Rep. Suhas Subramanyam, and I'm defending one of the top toss-up districts in Virginia. = Hi Peter, I'm Suhas Subramanyam — a dad, a lifelong public servant, and the Democratic Congressman for Virginia's 10th District. = I'm writing today because I believe Virginia holds the keys to Democrats winning in 2025 and 2026. This November, we have a real chance to flip the Governor's office by electing Abigail Spanberger. Abigail is a fearless leader and a proven champion for Virginians — and if we win that race, we'll take a huge step forward for reproductive freedom, public education, and the future of our Commonwealth. But here's the thing: if we want to take back power at the state level and build momentum toward flipping the U.S. House, we must also protect the gains we've already made. I represent VA-10 — a true swing district that I won by just 4.6% in 2024. National Republicans have already marked my seat as a top target. My opponent announced last month, and outside groups are already sniffing around. That's why I'm asking: = = = = = = = This is our moment to show that Democrats are still organizing, still winning tough races, and still building power where it matters most. Thanks for standing with us, Suhas Subramanyam U.S. Representative, VA-10 By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Friend, I know I’m not the only one asking this question: _Where is David Schweikert?_ Arizona is facing multiple wildfires that are tearing through our state, our utility bills are skyrocketing, and prices at the grocery store are up. Schweikert should be in the district talking with his constituents, but he is nowhere to be found. We **_need_** new leadership.
We **_need_** new solutions.
We **_need_** someone who will _show up_. Families shouldn’t have to pick between groceries and keeping their lights on. WASHINGTON — “You’re up,” Sen. Katie Britt recalls Majority Leader John Thune telling her as they began the 119th Congress with the Laken Riley Act as the first bill on the Senate floor in January.

Six months after the immigration bill that Britt spearheaded became law, sitting in her Senate office for an interview, Alabama’s junior senator looked back on how she’s been able to advance some of her key priorities this year, sometimes with the help of Democrats.

U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, has partnered with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, D-New York, to introduce the Guarding Unprotected Aging Retirees from Deception (GUARD) Act, a bipartisan bill designed to shield older Americans from financial scams—particularly those exploiting cryptocurrency and blockchain technologies.

The GUARD Act would allow state and local law enforcement to use federal grant funding they already receive to hire personnel, train staff and deploy resources to investigate financial crimes involving blockchain. It would also authorize federal law enforcement to assist with advanced tracing tools, often unavailable to local agencies.

U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) recently introduced legislation to ban illegal aliens from voting in Washington, D.C. elections.

The legislation, joined by 21 of Britt's Republican Senate colleagues, including U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Auburn), seeks to stop the 2022 law passed by the Washington, D.C. City Council allowing noncitizens to vote in local elections. The D.C. law allowed for illegal aliens and foreign embassy staff members the ability to vote in elections for mayor, attorney general and city council members.

I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. **I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come.** Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. **This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.** Will you stand with me?

clean_body: | | | | | | | WASHINGTON — “You’re up,” Sen. Katie Britt recalls Majority Leader John Thune telling her as they began the 119th Congress with the Laken Riley Act as the first bill on the Senate floor in January. Six months after the immigration bill that Britt spearheaded became law, sitting in her Senate office for an interview, Alabama’s junior senator looked back on how she’s been able to advance some of her key priorities this year, sometimes with the help of Democrats. | | U.S. Senator Katie Britt, R-Alabama, has partnered with Senator Kirsten Gillibrand, D-New York, to introduce the Guarding Unprotected Aging Retirees from Deception (GUARD) Act, a bipartisan bill designed to shield older Americans from financial scams—particularly those exploiting cryptocurrency and blockchain technologies. The GUARD Act would allow state and local law enforcement to use federal grant funding they already receive to hire personnel, train staff and deploy resources to investigate financial crimes involving blockchain. It would also authorize federal law enforcement to assist with advanced tracing tools, often unavailable to local agencies. | | U.S. Sen. Katie Britt (R-Montgomery) recently introduced legislation to ban illegal aliens from voting in Washington, D.C. elections. The legislation, joined by 21 of Britt's Republican Senate colleagues, including U.S. Sen. Tommy Tuberville (R-Auburn), seeks to stop the 2022 law passed by the Washington, D.C. City Council allowing noncitizens to vote in local elections. The D.C. law allowed for illegal aliens and foreign embassy staff members the ability to vote in elections for mayor, attorney general and city council members. | | | | | | | I didn’t run for Senate to sit on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and proud to stand for every corner of Alabama—our cities, small towns, and rural communities alike. I’m rooted in faith, built on family, and committed to making Alabama stronger and better for generations to come. Alabama is a place of hard work, strong values, and unyielding independence. But the Left is trying to tear that all down. I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for every Alabamian who feels forgotten and left behind. Whether it’s securing our borders, protecting our children, or defending our way of life, I’m here fighting for Alabama’s future. This fight isn’t easy, but it's worth it. And I’m not going anywhere. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: No means to defend myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
This is the situation I’m caught in:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e22746850/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvMzV4Q2hGREhUQg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA4MDg/LbmNscTYxaHhScA/qP2hpZHM9bmNqa0JTN1hLSXdQcHpscw/gaJZ7LA/sfr87ee0b6f)

| [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot,
---
Asking for help has never been my strong suit, but today, I’m asking that you spare just a minute of your time to understand my situation.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State thugs are cashing in on a years-long scheme to **JAIL** me for the rest of my life.
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
_As it stands, I’m simply out of options._
---
Several years ago, the Democrats began their plot by having Joe Biden’s FBI unlawfully raid my home at the crack of dawn.
---
Then, they had me unjustly arrested and booked in one of the most violent jails in America under _booking # 2313757_.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
__
---

But as the lawyer who successfully defended President Trump from the Democrats’ impeachment witch hunt, I felt reassured in knowing I could **_at least defend myself_** from the Left’s bogus charges...
---
_...Or so I thought!_
---
**_The Democrats’ cronies even _STRIPPED_ me of my law licenses!_**
---
**Left with no means to defend myself, no way to be pardoned by President Trump for _state-level_ charges, no cavalry coming over the hill, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance was to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
_They knew full well this was exactly the kind of defense I couldn’t afford!_
---
Patriot, the situation I find myself in today is simple, but sadly, bleak.
---
My last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust.
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)

---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund

name: Justice Democrats
subject: What Bernie said
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
what Bernie Sanders had to say about our newest Justice Democrats
candidate, Donavan McKinney?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250808-dm?refcode=em20250808-36914&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36914_1203867_asks35&akid=36914%2E1203867%2Easks35 ]A post on X from Bernie Sanders reading 'Donavan McKinney has dedicated
his life to fighting for Medicare for All, a Green New Deal and housing
for all. @DonavanMI13 is ready to help lead the fight against the
billionaire class. I'm proud to support him.' It includes a screenshot of
a video of Donavan McKinney saying 'why isn't government working for us?'
The video is captioned 'DONAVAN MCKINNEY. Running for Congress,
Michigan-13. MI State Representative.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250808-dm?refcode=em20250808-36914&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36914_1203867_asks35&akid=36914%2E1203867%2Easks35 ]Split a donation between Donavan’s campaign and Justice Democrats now
to help send him to Congress >>

Bernie and Justice Democrats endorsed Donavan because he is exactly the
kind of leader we need in Washington right now.

Donavan knows the struggles of Detroit – and working people across the
country – because he’s lived them himself. That’s why he’s spent his life
fighting to reform the broken systems that hold working people back.

In Congress, he’ll be a fierce advocate for Medicare for All, a Green New
Deal, a living wage, and so much more. He won’t back down from corporate
Democrats who fail to deliver for the working-class or fight Trump’s
far-right agenda.

But to get there, he needs our support.

Our teams are working hard to get his message to voters in Michigan’s 13th
district and win this Democratic primary next year, but this race won’t be
easy. His opponent is one of the richest members of Congress and is backed
by corporate PACs that will spend whatever it takes to defeat Donavan.

We know organized people can defeat organized money. That’s why we’re
asking you to step up, Peter.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250808-dm?refcode=em20250808-36914&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36914_1203867_asks35&akid=36914%2E1203867%2Easks35 ]Will you stand with Bernie Sanders and Donavan McKinney by splitting a
donation of $5 between Donavan’s campaign and Justice
Democrats today?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250808-dm?refcode=em20250808-36914&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36914_1203867_asks35&akid=36914%2E1203867%2Easks35 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250808-36914-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36914_1203867_asks35&akid=36914%2E1203867%2Easks35

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. | | Hi Friend, There’s not enough room in this email to list all the ways Donald Trump has taken us backwards in his first 200 days back in office. You’ve seen it. Cuts to Medicaid and food assistance. Escalating threats to immigrants, to LGBTQ+ Americans, to working families just trying to get by. And more tax breaks for billionaires while the rest of us are told to make do with less. But I’ve also seen something else: **People refusing to give up. Organizing. Showing up. Taking care of their neighbors and friends. Fighting for a future rooted in care, dignity, and justice.** That’s the work I carry with me into Congress every single day. And if we’re going to win the fights ahead, we need to show we’re ready—now. [_**We can’t afford to sit out the next 200 days. clean_body: There’s not enough room in this email to list all the ways Donald Trump has taken us backwards in his first 200 days back in office. | = = | | Hi Friend, There’s not enough room in this email to list all the ways Donald Trump has taken us backwards in his first 200 days back in office. You’ve seen it. Cuts to Medicaid and food assistance. Escalating threats to immigrants, to LGBTQ+ Americans, to working families just trying to get by. And more tax breaks for billionaires while the rest of us are told to make do with less. But I’ve also seen something else: People refusing to give up. Organizing. Showing up. Taking care of their neighbors and friends. Fighting for a future rooted in care, dignity, and justice. That’s the work I carry with me into Congress every single day. When I first stepped into the political arena to run for U.S. Senate, I was told I didn’t stand a chance.
[](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=870ff3a83b434ce0b7c027949cbd14bd&_e=G-Z6cj-9CEakSxbiCuGflCKFPBwKZrGjAbt3zyU1QDIHzTik9R0laK_uJE5rqQWrJanRZslTo7kKbG1wAxFK3DKjIMjxwjrEpr9_-W__ATH5vGAZTZaDKj5eesPlhNSNTzUKujTnaNBlENu07OjBDNT_oO3odXh6AuEV6GtLkoxxVuEinFWtUl8bT4xmz3laxGoyO-Sh5rLq360duAOuoeRwckXqKdMUoojm9Xape79E1S6FKT_ciojwjU5OlT31He2syMDadzCLuChpYqxfcQU1R_q27JJG3k5xNgh2F43Id4jnpuzrVikonvlLc2Gb03RPFMbibeJk4oWuK9PTWnjaa0I0M6JBVD-caaC5KHh_VkdpkFKMO2yXOiJ6VAECCksrvB0-5HnyvRM---3jaM1ejrBCYSmSTJ3x0eN_iLKyRugfK7EQNoHf4-iqDDw5mMv6LfMePIrOUpTBZvbEdQ5ZCJegQpOR8LtNb5U2x0p6dGrtpdGN0Biw6ZRuI24uEfA1JAnnsW2mat5Lh9rCPzy-kO6I8Tyfcb_eW3PW-7clMpBQ56SmP_b4hNMj_Qt3W5lHt7ntNrR9HI0u_Ln1LGpm_ACKJorjxf6npvu6LUpPL1863tWJRTZPLB39bWa4nPacqDWSS6xjikrds2oiUZ63o9a1KyAUOJhjYT30ap7Oli18ojLzQEEO7mxefhtNhEODrh77r7A7qzMKOhJk8Yr00d1N00i_J1OCdTQ2hvc06zQXKDbyWVCGrEWtWnDL)When I first stepped into the political arena to run for U.S. Senate, I was told I didn't stand a chance.
The talking heads of legacy media mocked me.
The Democrat Machine dumped $55 million into Ohio to crush my campaign.
They outspent us 3-to-1. Every liberal group in America piled on.
They didn't just want to beat me. They wanted to humiliate me. To send a message: outsiders like me aren't welcome.
But I had one thing they didn't: YOU.
We clawed our way through, dollar by dollar, grassroots supporter by grassroots supporter - and we won. Not by a little. By over six points!
Now, I'm watching that same story unfold again - this time with my friend Vivek Ramaswamy in his race for Governor of Ohio.
And just like in my race, the Democrat Machine is already unloading millions, launching smears, and pulling out every dirty trick in the book to end his campaign.
[That’s why I’m asking – respectfully – for you to help Vivek like you helped me:](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=870ff3a83b434ce0b7c027949cbd14bd&_e=G-Z6cj-9CEakSxbiCuGflCKFPBwKZrGjAbt3zyU1QDIHzTik9R0laK_uJE5rqQWrJanRZslTo7kKbG1wAxFK3DKjIMjxwjrEpr9_-W__ATH5vGAZTZaDKj5eesPlhNSNTzUKujTnaNBlENu07OjBDNT_oO3odXh6AuEV6GtLkoxxVuEinFWtUl8bT4xmz3laxGoyO-Sh5rLq360duAOuoeRwckXqKdMUoojm9Xape79E1S6FKT_ciojwjU5OlT31He2syMDadzCLuChpYqxfcSU9pWo0QDXtkB8tyfYIzQTYFhIBh4WxNbrJQ73kGAVgdTcWCCSg0vj0W1KQ8MKDwDb3T4U2WCQ9qEA4lWirYE01f66YHLJw6wU7HKP7nGndUryGWBJCuN_ktS5Ewjvh9SyzzqHGwP_wsYRZn95bKEoMzQ8ivzY67ljKiwhLUQKEXgqPDxKhJGpdnRydjtEyTzMQwFLEUDOyWNkX4tbaTlatWRNquOMWNkmJCIe4J2CZvyZfNMtP5aLwjmsNeIpdxtiqaudDaZ5JE-qXgX8UcOuXsS5j6BJqD0Is6aT39jfvgM4iN-opleZeVbQ6ZAQhv3eoPN4uMT9FlLfvbnV-SJ6jt1nVFDwl8W2_8ZR-FMQ97FA4W4W7GHa0P4B5wU_OCHzStNrTzKqdTvTEI1spxd-WPLQnbycJQ8bfIxKfCj4nsvOrjktEWQ0SvmPf_P876O0jdBqh00XRVG7g1kdMjEQamlGcFtwEV4ndE6aR5okg)[CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS

He's a problem for The Establishment and bureaucratic class.**
**He 'll gut the Deep State -- from Columbus to Washington.He'll deport every illegal alien - enforce law and order.He'll roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors. He'll terminate all DEI programs - root out woke propaganda. He'll overhaul failing schools - expand school choice and reward excellent teachers.He'll obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - take a hacksaw to government bloat. He'll restore national identity - promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood.**
**President Trump and I are working every day to deliver the America First agenda you voted for. But we can 't do it alone. We need MAGA leaders in every state - especially battlegrounds like Ohio.
[So here’s my ask: Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to help Vivek win this race?](http://links.conservativesfordjt.com/u/click?_t=05b03ef2209247bcbdad7fd5099cd670&_m=870ff3a83b434ce0b7c027949cbd14bd&_e=G-Z6cj-9CEakSxbiCuGflCKFPBwKZrGjAbt3zyU1QDIHzTik9R0laK_uJE5rqQWrJanRZslTo7kKbG1wAxFK3DKjIMjxwjrEpr9_-W__ATH5vGAZTZaDKj5eesPlhNSNTzUKujTnaNBlENu07OjBDNT_oO3odXh6AuEV6GtLkoxxVuEinFWtUl8bT4xmz3laxGoyO-Sh5rLq360duAOuoeRwckXqKdMUoojm9Xape79E1S6FKT_ciojwjU5OlT31He2syMDadzCLuChpYqxfcR4i02YrWDV4HHCYhVzjrWCKajBVIUFWN-IZUoxoXHOC9YSMQ9bfxUhmaoREaxxJZX0JWjVWN0yk6g9CduoJi779MNxal__8jAL7U5SvVcc0KdYIH2T3CqWOhCdlPrnj-OqvGlGnCh32EzjZYCv_trvzfwG7dH_Ip0YGmxYkP8rlaGKW8KSFiSY-uSBFYlXt57XfBKizYJKlNhjMsFnAqTPwk4Xs9wWA2ylBbv2RdAPg7p4aEqL5EYM13ngqs8a6k7XqRI25svHK4vUORZmNMtB4JpdINFC2apCC8lhV99mh1vnM6oUnthy5w5GBvpLZl15g2CQHW82l46SKxegxKe_pdwsZAsI6FBRaXn-qJ6tSYAJhQi9h6V5N5hf6yHuunTzU1l06cKcIFwdrJRR4jj_MvUKRkWKgKzPpAGZIwSEtY51G5iPy8m8GfUxq7H4l61YTe4JyVss6i-arPy0-TmuTWkBLIUJQ0OPHj9Kos2o3)[CHIP IN A FEW BUCKS

I know what it takes to win, and I know Vivek has what it takes to lead.**
**But it won 't happen unless MAGA patriots from around the country step up and help him. **
**I hope I can count on you to be one of them.

clean_body: When I first stepped into the political arena to run for U.S. Senate, I was told I didn’t stand a chance. I first stepped into the political arena to run for U.S. Senate, I was told I didn't stand a chance. The talking heads of legacy media mocked me. The Democrat Machine dumped $55 million into Ohio to crush my campaign. They outspent us 3-to-1. Every liberal group in America piled on. They didn't just want to beat me. They wanted to humiliate me. To send a message: outsiders like me aren't welcome. But I had one thing they didn't: YOU. We clawed our way through, dollar by dollar, grassroots supporter by grassroots supporter - and we won. Not by a little. By over six points! Now, I'm watching that same story unfold again - this time with my friend Vivek Ramaswamy in his race for Governor of Ohio. And just like in my race, the Democrat Machine is already unloading millions, launching smears, and pulling out every dirty trick in the book to end his campaign. not a politician. He's a problem for The Establishment and bureaucratic class. He 'll gut the Deep State -- from Columbus to Washington.He'll deport every illegal alien - enforce law and order.He'll roll back transgenderism - ban men in women's sports, no sex changes for minors. He'll terminate all DEI programs - root out woke propaganda. He'll overhaul failing schools - expand school choice and reward excellent teachers.He'll obliterate the managerial bureaucracy - take a hacksaw to government bloat. He'll restore national identity - promote merit and patriotism, and reject victimhood. President Trump and I are working every day to deliver the America First agenda you voted for. But we can 't do it alone. We need MAGA leaders in every state - especially battlegrounds like Ohio. been in this exact fight. I know what it takes to win, and I know Vivek has what it takes to lead. But it won 't happen unless MAGA patriots from around the country step up and help him. I hope I can count on you to be one of them. God bless you and God Bless America, VanceVice President. Proud Ohioan. is Vivek. I'm building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence: Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country. But I can't do it alone. I need your voice behind me. | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I have some breaking news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team. **Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112993838/562290028/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.08_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxZWViYi1hYTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4F97_hiYymRZF2zpx531pPYCBtslpSTewT2GR1bOlc=) Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. _Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination._ When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. **And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. ** [**_This is going to get ugly. But I will not be deterred from speaking out, fighting back, and holding Trump accountable every single day. Will you have my back and split a contribution between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to help me fight back against Ed Martin and his sham investigation?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112993839/562290029/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.08_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxZWViYi1hYTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4F97_hiYymRZF2zpx531pPYCBtslpSTewT2GR1bOlc=) | | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112993840/562290030/-1123211171?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.08.08_Adam-Schiff-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzMxZWViYi1hYTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s4F97_hiYymRZF2zpx531pPYCBtslpSTewT2GR1bOlc=)
---
Thank you,

clean_body: This is Adam Schiff. I have some important news to share with you, team. Attorney General Pam Bondi has reportedly asked a corrupt DOJ official named Ed Martin to lead a baseless investigation against me. = Ed Martin, if you don’t remember, was the Interim U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia. A former defense lawyer for violent insurrectionists, he was patently unfit for that office — or any other — and I put a hold on his nomination, and successfully helped kill it. Ed Martin is exactly the type of loyal attack dog Donald Trump adores. As Interim U.S. Attorney, he threatened perceived “enemies” of the Trump administration, fired January 6th prosecutors for simply doing their jobs, urged the opening of criminal cases without evidence, and used the powers of his office to deter free speech. Career prosecutors quit rather than follow his unethical edicts. Before he was nominated to be a U.S. Attorney, Ed Martin had zero prosecutorial experience. Instead, he spent his time defending insurrectionists who broke into the Capitol on January 6 and advancing bogus claims of election fraud. He is close friends with an avowed neo-Nazi, appearing with and praising him repeatedly. Because of all of that, we were able to stop Ed Martin’s dangerous nomination. When his nomination was defeated, Attorney General Pam Bondi appointed Martin to lead a “weaponization” task force at the Justice Department to go after the president’s enemies. I was at the top of the list. And now, Ed Martin is investigating me and carrying out not just the president’s political retribution, but his own, as well. = | | = Thank you, Adam Schiff * =

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 8/8/2025
body:
Colorado Democrats set the house on fire, then send you the insurance bill
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
🎙️ Check out today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Wildfires near Meeker have [scorched over 20,000 acres](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), prompting Governor Polis to deploy the National Guard. In Teller County, a family is fighting to keep a $60,000 greenhouse they built under [Colorado’s Farm Stand Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), now facing demolition orders from local officials. New state laws aim to [better protect domestic abuse survivors](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), targeting coercive control and other overlooked forms of abuse. And in Colorado Springs, the search continues for a suspect accused of [ramming ICE agents with a vehicle](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) during a failed arrest attempt.
**🇺🇸 On the National Stage...** Apple CEO Tim Cook announced a [$100 billion expansion of U.S. manufacturing](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), bringing Apple’s total domestic investment to $600 billion under Trump-era economic policy. Meanwhile, ICE Director Todd Lyons reports an [800% surge in violent attacks on agents](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) since Trump took office, blaming radical left agitators for fueling violence like the recent ICE facility riot in Los Angeles.
**🗣️ Commentary Spotlight...** John DiGirolamo reveals how predators are using manipulative new tactics to [target children online](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), urging parents to be vigilant. Greg Walcher urges the U.S. to [break its reliance on China](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) for rare earth minerals, citing a Wyoming mine as key to energy security. C.J. Garbo slams Colorado Democrats for [driving up insurance premiums](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) through failed regulations and market interference. And Russ Minary argues that Trump’s [merit-based hiring order ](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)is a necessary correction—favoring performance over DEI and seniority in public service.
This is the Mountain Minute for Friday, August 8, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Garbo: Colorado Democrats set the house on fire, then send you the insurance bill](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY C. J. GARBO, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
_If you’re a Colorado homeowner staring down another massive insurance premium hike – welcome to the consequences of single-party rule. For over a decade, Democrats have run this state. For the last four years, they’ve enjoyed unchecked supermajorities. And yet, while your coverage hasn’t improved, your bill has exploded._
_In just two years, my own homeowners insurance jumped 190%:_ _– 2023–24: $3,029_ _– 2024–25: $5,230 (+72.66%)_ _– 2025–26: $8,768 (+67.65%)_
_I’ve filed zero claims. My house hasn’t changed. But the policies passed under Democratic control have made everything worse. This is what happens when public policy is written by unskilled, untalented, uninformed people who face no meaningful opposition or accountability._
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[DiGirolamo: The predator playbook every parent needs to know about](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Predators use a manipulative “grooming playbook”—starting with innocent conversations to build trust, fulfill unmet emotional needs, and isolate kids from trusted adults before escalating to requests for explicit content or exploitation.

* Tactics include catfishing, sextortion, AI-generated threats, and bribery—with criminals often offering money, pretending to be modeling agents, or using stolen devices to access compromising content.

* Parents are urged to stay vigilant—through regular conversations, monitoring phone apps, and recognizing warning signs like secrecy or emotional distress to protect children from online predators.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[800% spike in ICE attacks blamed on ‘radical left’ by agency director](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [DAILY SIGNAL](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* ICE Director Todd Lyons reported an 800% spike in attacks on immigration officers since President Trump took office, calling it the worst violence he’s seen in his 25-year career.

* Lyons blamed radical left agitators for stoking anti-ICE sentiment, pointing to the recent Los Angeles riots where agents were assaulted and federal buildings torched under a foreign flag.

* Despite the severity of the violence—which required the deployment of National Guard and Marines—Lyons criticized the media and public for moving on without accountability.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[Minary: Why merit beats seniority and DEI in hiring and leadership](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY ROSS MINARY****| COMMENTARY | AUGUST 7** _With the federal debt now topping $35 trillion, it’s clear there’s too much fraud, waste, abuse, corruption, redundancy, reckless spending and status quo. Change is in order._
__

**[Daniel: Colorado’s political ruling class has turned common sense upside down](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BOBBIE DANIEL | COMMENTARY | AUGUST 5** _There was a time when Colorado ran on common sense. We valued hard work, local control, and the idea that if you played by the rules, you’d get a fair shake. But somewhere along the way, the folks running this state traded those values for political theater and personal ambition._
__

**[“We absolutely back the badge”: Mesa County defends deputy in federal suit](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN | LOCAL | AUGUST 5** _Mesa County is taking Colorado’s top political figures to court. On Tuesday, commissioners unanimously voted to authorize a federal lawsuit against Governor Jared Polis and Attorney General Phil Weiser over what they called “politically motivated litigation” targeting local law enforcement under a controversial new state law._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor+Interest+%28via+Mountain+Minute%29)) or send us a message on social media to chat
|
---
|
---
**🐘 DID YOU KNOW?** The man with the **world’s deepest voice** can make sounds humans can’t hear The man, Tim Storms, can sing a note that’s nearly impossible for humans to hear—but elephants can. It’s eight octaves below the lowest G on a piano. Storms holds the Guinness World record for having the widest vocal range: 10 octaves.
|
---
**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "We don't have a trillion-dollar debt because we haven't taxed enough; we have a trillion-dollar debt because we spend too much." – Ronald Reagan

name: Abbott's Threat:
subject: Silence voters, hand Republicans total control
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ISAIAH MARTIN FOR CONGRESS
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/109386/images/IRM_wrapper-email.jpg]
friend, hey — it’s Isaiah Martin.
Greg Abbott just said the quiet part out loud:
If Democrats don’t bend the knee and return to Austin, he’ll hand Republicans EIGHT more seats in Congress.
That’s not democracy . That’s hostage-taking.
Abbott isn’t redrawing maps to “represent Texans” — he’s weaponizing gerrymandering to silence Black, Brown, and working-class voters who dare to hold him accountable. And he’s threatening to erase your voice from the ballot entirely unless Democrats give him what he wants.
Here's the truth:
* Abbott would rather rig elections than compete in them.
* He’s hellbent on cementing MAGA rule for a generation.
* And if we don’t fight back right now, those eight stolen seats could be the difference between a Democratic majority and another Trump supermajority.
Texas Democrats are risking arrest and their political careers to protect fair representation. The least we can do is have their backs.
We can’t out-bribe Abbott . But we can out-organize him. And if we raise the resources we need to mobilize voters in every corner of Texas, we can stop him in his tracks.
Chip in now to fight Abbott’s gerrymander [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
Express Donate: $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]

Or, donate another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/klemail_imartin?express_lane_other=true&refcode=express_lane_other]
This isn’t just Texas’ fight — it’s the fight for democracy itself.
In the fight,
Isaiah Martin
Texas’s 18th Congressional District

| | **_Meet Russell:_** Born and raised in Surfside Beach, SC, Congressman Russell Fry is the proud and homegrown Representative for South Carolina’s 7th Congressional District. Growing up in a cinder block home with no heating or air conditioning, Russell learned at an early age that hard work and perseverance pave the only true path to the American Dream. He watched his parents work day in and day out to make ends meet. And the values they instilled in him during his upbringing led Russell to self-fund both his undergraduate education at the University of South Carolina, and later his law studies at the Charleston School of Law. At Charleston, Russell served as the President of the Student Bar Association and even helped the school achieve its American Bar Association accreditation. He went on to practice law in the Grand Strand area for over a decade before entering the political arena to serve in the South Carolina House of Representatives for State House District 106 (Horry County). During his seven-year tenure in the SC House, Russell fought to safeguard Constitutional liberties, lower taxes, and put the best interests of South Carolina families above all else. He climbed the ranks to become Chief Majority Whip, and also chaired the House Opioid Prevention Study Committee. Under Russell’s leadership, 18 policy initiatives to combat the opioid crisis were signed into law. Since the first day he stepped foot in Washington, Russell has strived to shake up the corrupt status quo and deliver real change for the American people. He believes adamantly that so long as the American people stand united, we can keep the American Dream alive for every citizen of our great nation. Russell is a dedicated husband to his wife, Bronwen, and a loving father to his son, James. The family lives in Murrells Inlet with their chocolate lab, Jasper.

Peter,

Did you know that the month of **August is National Shooting Sports Month?**

Did you also know that this week, _**President Donald J. Trump**_ issued a powerful Presidential Message in celebration of **National Shooting Sports Month,** reaffirming his unwavering commitment to the Second Amendment and the fundamental freedoms it protects?
_[“And above all, we recommit to the eternal truth that our constitutional rights do not come from the hands of government, but from the hands of Almighty God.”**\- Donald J. name: Seth Magaziner
subject: an update from me: recent wins for working people
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=23hPbM4Wte8NMRuSPXd3sVeYvJlvcsJ%2Bnz3yDRH%2FxbHzONa8sNpo57Qyd2zUYBzrY%2BHeStzUOQn2ZppfbEbmzgLAxRWlG3nNFkKt5YrnFcFeQ04HBjtWAGwha8e8xru%2BsimodceFKB0BmvnYL1R3WGbtmMm4bYR7r9pfUsV2TUHJ7T5DFq7m0CyQ0W08wIA4a6e%2Bj2SAq%2Ftxnwz5BvSyVoDgX9UG0R6kB2v%2FA%2Bqees8Juz4r%2BrMuESJX3n5WoHkE7gX2CE1n7Hwj6LeJBgQnzQbU%2B642OBwmMB8DF0X3FvvZwEx2AQiTxyScs59qnhlCCkzSXeH0tG6lZJ%2BuSoV9%2F%2BA%2BAFdZYU1ySgR44561CSzf0AI%2B06l0KButIj6oFfZZsnsNGEKL%2FMoj67%2BEq9DbzTUzY9pTYKGF3aj%2BBQhvbSbidEutHL%2BlzAgC25Ttz1wQ)
---
| |
---
Good afternoon Peter,

I’m here with another roundup of good news, because it is important to know that even in these tough times, when we fight we can win.
1. After weeks of pressure we forced the Trump Administration to **_release the education funding it illegally froze — including $29.3 million for Rhode Island_** for after school programs, English language learning, teacher training, and more. This cut would’ve been devastating to Rhode Island kids, and I’m thrilled that our advocacy helped to deliver this win.

2. We protected coastal states like ours by **_restoring $42.5 million to the Integrated Ocean Observing System (IOOS) at the NOAA_** — money the Trump Administration illegally withheld. Now, Rhode Islanders and other coastal Americans will be able to continue receiving critical weather data for weather forecasting, and to keep fishermen and other Rhode Islanders who make their living on the water safe.

Even in these challenging times, we are still able to score important victories for hard working Rhode Islanders.

**And this is why we have to flip the House — with a majority in the House, we will be able to do even more to deliver for the American people and ensure that our legislation serves everyone.

If you’re able to contribute something, you’ll put us one step closer to defending this seat and winning back the House. Your personalized donation link is here: _[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sm-august25/Peter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/112995094/562294104/1542275803?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_SM_20250808_FR_GoodNews_0_6MO_Seth_NA_NA_Wins&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzE5NWQ4NC1iMTc0LWYwMTEtOGRjOS02MDQ1YmRhOWQ5NmIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=68hgshBLzpyzBzWHmvG696LlABddB3xF44rZjbayN-A=)_**

I’m proud to fight for all of us Rhode Islanders in Washington.

Seth

body:
It’s up to all of us to send a powerful message:
---
$3. That’s the contribution we’re asking you to make to the DNC today, Derek. $3 because right now, Trump and the GOP are trying to give themselves FIVE new House seats in Texas — and we will all suffer the consequences if they succeed. $3 because Democrats are fighting back. Texas Democrats _left their state_ to prevent a vote on this blatant power grab. $3 because it’s up to all of us to send a powerful message: **Democrats will fight fire with fire to protect free and fair elections.** Derek, in the last few days, thousands of Democrats have chipped in to help stop Republicans from cheating. **Now, they’re counting on you to join them.** [**If you’re with us, please use this link to pitch in $3 to support the DNC today:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?refcode=em_20250808_4213_fr&amount=3&refcode2=4213_22930333_h-oBZ8&akid=4213%2E22930333%2Eh-oBZ8) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_ | | | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-august-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250808_4213_fr&refcode2=4213_22930333_h-oBZ8&akid=4213%2E22930333%2Eh-oBZ8)**
